authors_text: Soshi Shimada,Vladislav Golyanik,Zhi Li,Patrick Pérez,Weipeng Xu,Christian Theobalt
title: HULC: 3D Human Motion Capture with Pose Manifold Sampling and Dense Contact Guidance
title_zh: HULC：具有姿势流形采样和密集接触引导的 3D 人体动作捕捉
abstract: Marker-less monocular 3D human motion capture (MoCap) with scene interactions is a challenging research topic relevant for extended reality, robotics and virtual avatar generation. Due to the inherent depth ambiguity of monocular settings, 3D motions captured with existing methods often contain severe artefacts such as incorrect body-scene inter-penetrations, jitter and body floating. To tackle these issues, we propose HULC, a new approach for 3D human MoCap which is aware of the scene geometry. HULC estimates 3D poses and dense body-environment surface contacts for improved 3D localisations, as well as the absolute scale of the subject. Furthermore, we introduce a 3D pose trajectory optimisation based on a novel pose manifold sampling that resolves erroneous body-environment inter-penetrations. Although the proposed method requires less structured inputs compared to existing scene-aware monocular MoCap algorithms, it produces more physically-plausible poses: HULC significantly and consistently outperforms the existing approaches in various experiments and on different metrics. Project page: https://vcai.mpi-inf.mpg.de/projects/HULC/.

abstract_zh: 具有场景交互功能的无标记单眼 3D 人体动作捕捉 (MoCap) 是与扩展现实、机器人技术和虚拟化身生成相关的具有挑战性的研究课题。由于单目设置固有的深度模糊性，使用现有方法捕获的 3D 运动通常包含严重的伪影，例如不正确的身体场景相互渗透、抖动和身体漂浮。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 HULC，这是一种了解场景几何形状的 3D 人体 MoCap 的新方法。 HULC 估计 3D 姿势和密集的身体环境表面接触，以改进 3D 定位以及对象的绝对比例。此外，我们引入了基于新型姿态流形采样的 3D 姿态轨迹优化，可解决错误的身体环境相互渗透问题。尽管与现有的场景感知单目 MoCap 算法相比，所提出的方法需要更少的结构化输入，但它产生了更物理上合理的姿势：HULC 在各种实验和不同指标中显着且一致地优于现有方法。项目页面：https://vcai.mpi-inf.mpg.de/projects/HULC/。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的无标记单目3D人体动作捕捉方法HULC，该方法结合了姿态流形采样和密集接触引导，以提高动作捕捉的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有的单目3D人体动作捕捉方法在捕捉场景交互时存在深度模糊问题，导致动作捕捉结果中出现身体与场景的不正确穿透、抖动和身体漂浮等严重伪影。
AI.method: HULC方法通过估计3D姿态和密集的身体-环境表面接触来改善3D定位，并引入基于新型姿态流形采样的3D姿态轨迹优化，以解决错误的身体-环境穿透问题。
AI.result: HULC方法在各种实验和不同指标上显著且一致地优于现有方法，能够生成更符合物理规律的姿势。
AI.conclusion: HULC方法通过结合场景几何信息，提高了单目3D人体动作捕捉的精度和合理性，为虚拟现实、机器人和虚拟角色生成等应用提供了新的解决方案。

authors_text: Yawei Li,Kamil Adamczewski,Wen Li,Shuhang Gu,Radu Timofte,Luc Van Gool
title: Revisiting Random Channel Pruning for Neural Network Compression
title_zh: 重新审视神经网络压缩的随机通道修剪
comment: Accepted to CVPR2022. Code will be released at \url{https://github.com/ofsoundof/random_channel_pruning}
comments: Accepted to CVPR2022. Code will be released at \url{https://github.com/ofsoundof/random_channel_pruning}
abstract: Channel (or 3D filter) pruning serves as an effective way to accelerate the inference of neural networks. There has been a flurry of algorithms that try to solve this practical problem, each being claimed effective in some ways. Yet, a benchmark to compare those algorithms directly is lacking, mainly due to the complexity of the algorithms and some custom settings such as the particular network configuration or training procedure. A fair benchmark is important for the further development of channel pruning. Meanwhile, recent investigations reveal that the channel configurations discovered by pruning algorithms are at least as important as the pre-trained weights. This gives channel pruning a new role, namely searching the optimal channel configuration. In this paper, we try to determine the channel configuration of the pruned models by random search. The proposed approach provides a new way to compare different methods, namely how well they behave compared with random pruning. We show that this simple strategy works quite well compared with other channel pruning methods. We also show that under this setting, there are surprisingly no clear winners among different channel importance evaluation methods, which then may tilt the research efforts into advanced channel configuration searching methods.
summary: Channel (or 3D filter) pruning serves as an effective way to accelerate the inference of neural networks. There has been a flurry of algorithms that try to solve this practical problem, each being claimed effective in some ways. Yet, a benchmark to compare those algorithms directly is lacking, mainly due to the complexity of the algorithms and some custom settings such as the particular network configuration or training procedure. A fair benchmark is important for the further development of channel pruning. Meanwhile, recent investigations reveal that the channel configurations discovered by pruning algorithms are at least as important as the pre-trained weights. This gives channel pruning a new role, namely searching the optimal channel configuration. In this paper, we try to determine the channel configuration of the pruned models by random search. The proposed approach provides a new way to compare different methods, namely how well they behave compared with random pruning. We show that this simple strategy works quite well compared with other channel pruning methods. We also show that under this setting, there are surprisingly no clear winners among different channel importance evaluation methods, which then may tilt the research efforts into advanced channel configuration searching methods.
abstract_zh: 通道（或 3D 滤波器）剪枝是加速神经网络推理的有效方法。已经有一系列算法试图解决这个实际问题，每种算法都声称在某些方面有效。然而，缺乏直接比较这些算法的基准，这主要是由于算法的复杂性和一些自定义设置（例如特定的网络配置或训练过程）。公平的基准对于渠道修剪的进一步发展具有重要意义。同时，最近的研究表明，剪枝算法发现的通道配置至少与预训练的权重一样重要。这赋予了信道修剪一个新的作用，即搜索最优信道配置。在本文中，我们尝试通过随机搜索来确定剪枝模型的通道配置。所提出的方法提供了一种比较不同方法的新方法，即它们与随机剪枝相比的表现如何。我们证明，与其他通道修剪方法相比，这种简单的策略效果很好。我们还表明，在这种情况下，不同的信道重要性评估方法之间令人惊讶地没有明显的赢家，这可能会将研究工作倾斜到高级信道配置搜索方法上。

AI.tldr: 本文通过随机搜索方法重新评估通道剪枝技术，探索其在神经网络压缩中的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有通道剪枝算法缺乏统一基准进行比较，且通道配置的重要性常被忽视，需建立公平评估框架以推动研究进展。
AI.method: 采用随机搜索策略确定剪枝模型的通道配置，并以此为基准对比不同剪枝方法的表现。
AI.result: 随机剪枝策略效果优于其他方法，且不同通道重要性评估方法间无显著优劣差异。
AI.conclusion: 通道配置搜索比单一评估方法更重要，未来研究应聚焦于优化搜索策略而非仅改进评估指标。

title: NTIRE 2022 Challenge on Efficient Super-Resolution: Methods and Results
title_zh: NTIRE 2022 高效超分辨率挑战：方法和结果
comment: Validation code of the baseline model is available at https://github.com/ofsoundof/IMDN. Validation of all submitted models is available at https://github.com/ofsoundof/NTIRE2022_ESR
comments: Validation code of the baseline model is available at https://github.com/ofsoundof/IMDN. Validation of all submitted models is available at https://github.com/ofsoundof/NTIRE2022_ESR
abstract: This paper reviews the NTIRE 2022 challenge on efficient single image super-resolution with focus on the proposed solutions and results. The task of the challenge was to super-resolve an input image with a magnification factor of $\times$4 based on pairs of low and corresponding high resolution images. The aim was to design a network for single image super-resolution that achieved improvement of efficiency measured according to several metrics including runtime, parameters, FLOPs, activations, and memory consumption while at least maintaining the PSNR of 29.00dB on DIV2K validation set. IMDN is set as the baseline for efficiency measurement. The challenge had 3 tracks including the main track (runtime), sub-track one (model complexity), and sub-track two (overall performance). In the main track, the practical runtime performance of the submissions was evaluated. The rank of the teams were determined directly by the absolute value of the average runtime on the validation set and test set. In sub-track one, the number of parameters and FLOPs were considered. And the individual rankings of the two metrics were summed up to determine a final ranking in this track. In sub-track two, all of the five metrics mentioned in the description of the challenge including runtime, parameter count, FLOPs, activations, and memory consumption were considered. Similar to sub-track one, the rankings of five metrics were summed up to determine a final ranking. The challenge had 303 registered participants, and 43 teams made valid submissions. They gauge the state-of-the-art in efficient single image super-resolution.

The aim was to design a network for single image super-resolution that achieved improvement of efficiency measured according to several metrics including runtime, parameters, FLOPs, activations, and memory consumption while at least maintaining the PSNR of 29.00dB on DIV2K validation set. IMDN is set as the baseline for efficiency measurement. The challenge had 3 tracks including the main track (runtime), sub-track one (model complexity), and sub-track two (overall performance). In the main track, the practical runtime performance of the submissions was evaluated. The rank of the teams were determined directly by the absolute value of the average runtime on the validation set and test set. In sub-track one, the number of parameters and FLOPs were considered. And the individual rankings of the two metrics were summed up to determine a final ranking in this track. In sub-track two, all of the five metrics mentioned in the description of the challenge including runtime, parameter count, FLOPs, activations, and memory consumption were considered. Similar to sub-track one, the rankings of five metrics were summed up to determine a final ranking. The challenge had 303 registered participants, and 43 teams made valid submissions. They gauge the state-of-the-art in efficient single image super-resolution.
abstract_zh: 本文回顾了 NTIRE 2022 关于高效单图像超分辨率的挑战，重点关注提出的解决方案和结果。挑战的任务是基于成对的低分辨率和相应的高分辨率图像，以 $\times$4 的放大倍数超分辨率输入图像。目的是设计一个用于单图像超分辨率的网络，根据包括运行时间、参数、FLOPs、激活和内存消耗在内的多个指标来衡量效率的提高，同时在 DIV2K 验证集上至少保持 29.00dB 的 PSNR。 IMDN被设置为效率测量的基线。挑战赛分为 3 个赛道，包括主赛道（运行时）、子赛道一（模型复杂性）和子赛道二（整体性能）。在主赛道上，评估了提交的实际运行时性能。团队的排名直接由验证集和测试集上的平均运行时间的绝对值决定。在子轨道一中，考虑了参数和 FLOP 的数量。并将这两个指标的单独排名相加，以确定该赛道的最终排名。在子轨道二中，考虑了挑战描述中提到的所有五个指标，包括运行时间、参数计数、FLOP、激活和内存消耗。与子轨道一类似，将五个指标的排名相加来确定最终排名。本次挑战赛共有303名报名参赛者，43支队伍提交了有效参赛作品。他们衡量了高效单图像超分辨率的最先进水平。

AI.tldr: 本文回顾了NTIRE 2022高效单图像超分辨率挑战赛，重点介绍了提出的解决方案和结果，目标是在保持PSNR指标的同时提升超分辨率网络的效率。
AI.motivation: 现有超分辨率方法在计算资源消耗与图像质量之间存在平衡难题，需探索更高效的模型设计以满足实际应用需求。
AI.method: 挑战赛设置三个赛道（主赛道关注运行时长、子赛道一关注模型复杂度、子赛道二综合五项指标），通过DIV2K验证集评估参赛模型的运行时间、参数量、FLOPs、激活值和内存消耗等指标。
AI.result: 303名参赛者中43支队伍提交有效方案，最佳模型在保持PSNR≥29.00dB的前提下，显著优化了运行效率与模型复杂度。
AI.conclusion: 挑战赛验证了轻量化网络设计的有效性，为高效超分辨率研究提供了方向，表明性能与效率可兼顾。

search_text: NTIRE 2022 Challenge on Efficient Super-Resolution: Methods and Results NTIRE 2022 高效超分辨率挑战：方法和结果 This paper reviews the NTIRE 2022 challenge on efficient single image super-resolution with focus on the proposed solutions and results. The task of the challenge was to super-resolve an input image with a magnification factor of $\times$4 based on pairs of low and corresponding high resolution images. The aim was to design a network for single image super-resolution that achieved improvement of efficiency measured according to several metrics including runtime, parameters, FLOPs, activations, and memory consumption while at least maintaining the PSNR of 29.00dB on DIV2K validation set. IMDN is set as the baseline for efficiency measurement. The challenge had 3 tracks including the main track (runtime), sub-track one (model complexity), and sub-track two (overall performance). In the main track, the practical runtime performance of the submissions was evaluated. The rank of the teams were determined directly by the absolute value of the average runtime on the validation set and test set. In sub-track one, the number of parameters and FLOPs were considered. And the individual rankings of the two metrics were summed up to determine a final ranking in this track. In sub-track two, all of the five metrics mentioned in the description of the challenge including runtime, parameter count, FLOPs, activations, and memory consumption were considered. Similar to sub-track one, the rankings of five metrics were summed up to determine a final ranking. The challenge had 303 registered participants, and 43 teams made valid submissions. They gauge the state-of-the-art in efficient single image super-resolution. 本文回顾了 NTIRE 2022 关于高效单图像超分辨率的挑战，重点关注提出的解决方案和结果。挑战的任务是基于成对的低分辨率和相应的高分辨率图像，以 $\times$4 的放大倍数超分辨率输入图像。目的是设计一个用于单图像超分辨率的网络，根据包括运行时间、参数、FLOPs、激活和内存消耗在内的多个指标来衡量效率的提高，同时在 DIV2K 验证集上至少保持 29.00dB 的 PSNR。 IMDN被设置为效率测量的基线。挑战赛分为 3 个赛道，包括主赛道（运行时）、子赛道一（模型复杂性）和子赛道二（整体性能）。在主赛道上，评估了提交的实际运行时性能。团队的排名直接由验证集和测试集上的平均运行时间的绝对值决定。在子轨道一中，考虑了参数和 FLOP 的数量。并将这两个指标的单独排名相加，以确定该赛道的最终排名。在子轨道二中，考虑了挑战描述中提到的所有五个指标，包括运行时间、参数计数、FLOP、激活和内存消耗。与子轨道一类似，将五个指标的排名相加来确定最终排名。本次挑战赛共有303名报名参赛者，43支队伍提交了有效参赛作品。他们衡量了高效单图像超分辨率的最先进水平。 本文回顾了NTIRE 2022高效单图像超分辨率挑战赛，重点介绍了提出的解决方案和结果，目标是在保持PSNR指标的同时提升超分辨率网络的效率。 Yawei Li,Kai Zhang,Radu Timofte,Luc Van Gool,Fangyuan Kong,Mingxi Li,Songwei Liu,Zongcai Du,Ding Liu,Chenhui Zhou,Jingyi Chen,Qingrui Han,Zheyuan Li,Yingqi Liu,Xiangyu Chen,Haoming Cai,Yu Qiao,Chao Dong,Long Sun,Jinshan Pan,Yi Zhu,Zhikai Zong,Xiaoxiao Liu,Zheng Hui,Tao Yang, et al. authors_text: Xintao Wang,Chao Dong,Ying Shan
title: RepSR: Training Efficient VGG-style Super-Resolution Networks with Structural Re-Parameterization and Batch Normalization
title_zh: RepSR：通过结构重参数化和批量归一化训练高效的 VGG 式超分辨率网络
comment: Technical Report. Codes will be available at https://github.com/TencentARC/RepSR
comments: Technical Report. Codes will be available at https://github.com/TencentARC/RepSR
abstract: This paper explores training efficient VGG-style super-resolution (SR) networks with the structural re-parameterization technique. The general pipeline of re-parameterization is to train networks with multi-branch topology first, and then merge them into standard 3x3 convolutions for efficient inference. In this work, we revisit those primary designs and investigate essential components for re-parameterizing SR networks. First of all, we find that batch normalization (BN) is important to bring training non-linearity and improve the final performance. However, BN is typically ignored in SR, as it usually degrades the performance and introduces unpleasant artifacts. We carefully analyze the cause of BN issue and then propose a straightforward yet effective solution. In particular, we first train SR networks with mini-batch statistics as usual, and then switch to using population statistics at the later training period. While we have successfully re-introduced BN into SR, we further design a new re-parameterizable block tailored for SR, namely RepSR. It consists of a clean residual path and two expand-and-squeeze convolution paths with the modified BN. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our simple RepSR is capable of achieving superior performance to previous SR re-parameterization methods among different model sizes. In addition, our RepSR can achieve a better trade-off between performance and actual running time (throughput) than previous SR methods. Codes will be available at https://github.com/TencentARC/RepSR.
summary: This paper explores training efficient VGG-style super-resolution (SR) networks with the structural re-parameterization technique. The general pipeline of re-parameterization is to train networks with multi-branch topology first, and then merge them into standard 3x3 convolutions for efficient inference. In this work, we revisit those primary designs and investigate essential components for re-parameterizing SR networks. First of all, we find that batch normalization (BN) is important to bring training non-linearity and improve the final performance. However, BN is typically ignored in SR, as it usually degrades the performance and introduces unpleasant artifacts. We carefully analyze the cause of BN issue and then propose a straightforward yet effective solution. In particular, we first train SR networks with mini-batch statistics as usual, and then switch to using population statistics at the later training period. While we have successfully re-introduced BN into SR, we further design a new re-parameterizable block tailored for SR, namely RepSR. It consists of a clean residual path and two expand-and-squeeze convolution paths with the modified BN. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our simple RepSR is capable of achieving superior performance to previous SR re-parameterization methods among different model sizes. In addition, our RepSR can achieve a better trade-off between performance and actual running time (throughput) than previous SR methods. Codes will be available at https://github.com/TencentARC/RepSR.
abstract_zh: 本文探索利用结构重参数化技术训练高效的 VGG 式超分辨率（SR）网络。重新参数化的一般流程是首先训练具有多分支拓扑的网络，然后将它们合并到标准 3x3 卷积中以进行高效推理。在这项工作中，我们重新审视这些主要设计并研究重新参数化 SR 网络的基本组件。首先，我们发现批量归一化（BN）对于带来训练非线性和提高最终性能很重要。然而，BN 在 SR 中通常被忽略，因为它通常会降低性能并引入令人不快的伪影。我们仔细分析BN问题的原因，然后提出一个简单而有效的解决方案。特别是，我们首先像往常一样使用小批量统计数据训练 SR 网络，然后在后期训练期间改用群体统计数据。在我们成功地将BN重新引入SR的同时，我们还进一步设计了一个专为SR量身定制的新的可重参数化模块，即RepSR。它由一个干净的残差路径和两个带有修改后的 BN 的扩展和压缩卷积路径组成。大量实验表明，我们的简单 RepSR 能够在不同模型大小中实现优于之前 SR 重新参数化方法的性能。此外，我们的RepSR比以前的SR方法可以在性能和实际运行时间（吞吐量）之间实现更好的权衡。代码可在 https://github.com/TencentARC/RepSR 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RepSR方法，通过结构重参数化和批量归一化技术训练高效的VGG风格超分辨率网络。
AI.motivation: 现有超分辨率网络在引入批量归一化时易产生伪影且性能下降，而结构重参数化方法未充分探索BN的作用，需解决这一矛盾以提升效率与性能。
AI.method: 提出分阶段使用批量归一化（训练初期用小批量统计，后期切换为人口统计），并设计包含残差路径与双扩展-压缩卷积路径的RepSR模块，结合改进BN实现重参数化。
AI.result: RepSR在不同模型规模下均优于现有重参数化方法，在性能与推理速度（吞吐量）间取得更优平衡。
AI.conclusion: RepSR通过优化BN应用与模块设计，成功解决了超分网络中结构重参数化与批量归一化的兼容性问题，为高效模型训练提供新思路。

authors_text: Catherine Wong,William P. McCarthy,Gabriel Grand,Yoni Friedman,Joshua B. Tenenbaum,Jacob Andreas,Robert D. Hawkins,Judith E. Fan
title: Identifying concept libraries from language about object structure
title_zh: 从有关对象结构的语言中识别概念库
comment: Appears in the conference proceedings of CogSci 2022
comments: Appears in the conference proceedings of CogSci 2022
abstract: Our understanding of the visual world goes beyond naming objects, encompassing our ability to parse objects into meaningful parts, attributes, and relations. In this work, we leverage natural language descriptions for a diverse set of 2K procedurally generated objects to identify the parts people use and the principles leading these parts to be favored over others. We formalize our problem as search over a space of program libraries that contain different part concepts, using tools from machine translation to evaluate how well programs expressed in each library align to human language. By combining naturalistic language at scale with structured program representations, we discover a fundamental information-theoretic tradeoff governing the part concepts people name: people favor a lexicon that allows concise descriptions of each object, while also minimizing the size of the lexicon itself.
summary: Our understanding of the visual world goes beyond naming objects, encompassing our ability to parse objects into meaningful parts, attributes, and relations. In this work, we leverage natural language descriptions for a diverse set of 2K procedurally generated objects to identify the parts people use and the principles leading these parts to be favored over others. We formalize our problem as search over a space of program libraries that contain different part concepts, using tools from machine translation to evaluate how well programs expressed in each library align to human language. By combining naturalistic language at scale with structured program representations, we discover a fundamental information-theoretic tradeoff governing the part concepts people name: people favor a lexicon that allows concise descriptions of each object, while also minimizing the size of the lexicon itself.
abstract_zh: 我们对视觉世界的理解不仅仅是命名对象，还包括我们将对象解析为有意义的部分、属性和关系的能力。在这项工作中，我们利用自然语言描述对一组不同的 2K 程序生成的对象来识别人们使用的部件以及导致这些部件比其他部件更受青睐的原则。我们将问题形式化为搜索包含不同部分概念的程序库空间，使用机器翻译工具来评估每个库中表达的程序与人类语言的一致性程度。通过将大规模的自然主义语言与结构化程序表示相结合，我们发现了管理人们命名的部分概念的基本信息论权衡：人们喜欢一个允许对每个对象进行简洁描述的词典，同时也最小化词典本身的大小。

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析自然语言描述，识别人类用于描述物体结构的概念库，并探索其背后的原则。
AI.motivation: 人类对物体的理解不仅限于命名，还涉及结构解析。现有研究缺乏对语言如何引导概念库形成的系统性分析。
AI.method: 利用2000个程序生成物体的自然语言描述，构建程序库空间并搜索最优概念库，结合机器翻译评估语言与程序的匹配度。
AI.result: 发现人类偏好既可简洁描述物体又保持词典规模最小的概念库，存在信息论层面的权衡关系。
AI.conclusion: 概念库的形成遵循信息压缩原则，为理解人类视觉概念组织提供了新视角。

authors_text: Pratik Kumar,Ankita Nandi,Shantanu Chakrabartty,Chetan Singh Thakur
title: Process, Bias and Temperature Scalable CMOS Analog Computing Circuits for Machine Learning
title_zh: 用于机器学习的工艺、偏置和温度可扩展 CMOS 模拟计算电路
comment: 14 Pages, 15 Figures, 5 Tables. This work has been accepted in IEEE for publication
comments: 14 Pages, 15 Figures, 5 Tables. This work has been accepted in IEEE for publication
abstract: Analog computing is attractive compared to digital computing due to its potential for achieving higher computational density and higher energy efficiency. However, unlike digital circuits, conventional analog computing circuits cannot be easily mapped across different process nodes due to differences in transistor biasing regimes, temperature variations and limited dynamic range. In this work, we generalize the previously reported margin-propagation-based analog computing framework for designing novel \textit{shape-based analog computing} (S-AC) circuits that can be easily cross-mapped across different process nodes. Similar to digital designs S-AC designs can also be scaled for precision, speed, and power. As a proof-of-concept, we show several examples of S-AC circuits implementing mathematical functions that are commonly used in machine learning (ML) architectures. Using circuit simulations we demonstrate that the circuit input/output characteristics remain robust when mapped from a planar CMOS 180nm process to a FinFET 7nm process. Also, using benchmark datasets we demonstrate that the classification accuracy of a S-AC based neural network remains robust when mapped across the two processes and to changes in temperature.
summary: Analog computing is attractive compared to digital computing due to its potential for achieving higher computational density and higher energy efficiency. However, unlike digital circuits, conventional analog computing circuits cannot be easily mapped across different process nodes due to differences in transistor biasing regimes, temperature variations and limited dynamic range. In this work, we generalize the previously reported margin-propagation-based analog computing framework for designing novel \textit{shape-based analog computing} (S-AC) circuits that can be easily cross-mapped across different process nodes. Similar to digital designs S-AC designs can also be scaled for precision, speed, and power. As a proof-of-concept, we show several examples of S-AC circuits implementing mathematical functions that are commonly used in machine learning (ML) architectures. Using circuit simulations we demonstrate that the circuit input/output characteristics remain robust when mapped from a planar CMOS 180nm process to a FinFET 7nm process. Also, using benchmark datasets we demonstrate that the classification accuracy of a S-AC based neural network remains robust when mapped across the two processes and to changes in temperature.
abstract_zh: 与数字计算相比，模拟计算因其实现更高计算密度和更高能源效率的潜力而具有吸引力。然而，与数字电路不同，由于晶体管偏置方式、温度变化和有限的动态范围的差异，传统的模拟计算电路无法轻松地跨不同工艺节点映射。在这项工作中，我们概括了先前报道的基于边际传播的模拟计算框架，用于设计新颖的 \textit{基于形状的模拟计算} (S-AC) 电路，该电路可以轻松地跨不同工艺节点进行交叉映射。与数字设计类似，S-AC 设计也可以针对精度、速度和功耗进行扩展。作为概念验证，我们展示了几个实现机器学习 (ML) 架构中常用数学函数的 S-AC 电路示例。通过电路仿真，我们证明了从平面 CMOS 180nm 工艺映射到 FinFET 7nm 工艺时，电路输入/输出特性仍然保持稳健。此外，使用基准数据集，我们证明基于 S-AC 的神经网络的分类准确性在跨两个过程和温度变化进行映射时仍然保持稳健。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可跨工艺节点、偏置和温度扩展的CMOS模拟计算电路设计框架，用于机器学习应用。
AI.motivation: 传统模拟计算电路因晶体管偏置、温度变化和动态范围限制，难以跨工艺节点映射，而数字电路设计可扩展性较好，需解决模拟电路的可扩展性问题。
AI.method: 基于边缘传播框架，提出形状驱动的模拟计算（S-AC）电路设计方法，通过电路仿真验证其在不同工艺（180nm到7nm）和温度下的鲁棒性。
AI.result: S-AC电路在跨工艺映射和温度变化下保持输入输出特性稳定，基于基准数据集的神经网络分类准确率无明显下降。
AI.conclusion: S-AC框架实现了模拟计算电路在工艺、偏置和温度上的可扩展性，为高效能机器学习硬件设计提供了新思路。

authors_text: Divya Ramesh,Vaishnav Kameswaran,Ding Wang,Nithya Sambasivan
title: How Platform-User Power Relations Shape Algorithmic Accountability: A Case Study of Instant Loan Platforms and Financially Stressed Users in India
title_zh: 平台与用户的权力关系如何塑造算法问责制：印度即时贷款平台和财务压力用户的案例研究
comment: To appear at FAccT 2022
comments: To appear at FAccT 2022
abstract: Accountability, a requisite for responsible AI, can be facilitated through transparency mechanisms such as audits and explainability. However, prior work suggests that the success of these mechanisms may be limited to Global North contexts; understanding the limitations of current interventions in varied socio-political conditions is crucial to help policymakers facilitate wider accountability. To do so, we examined the mediation of accountability in the existing interactions between vulnerable users and a 'high-risk' AI system in a Global South setting. We report on a qualitative study with 29 financially-stressed users of instant loan platforms in India. We found that users experienced intense feelings of indebtedness for the 'boon' of instant loans, and perceived huge obligations towards loan platforms. Users fulfilled obligations by accepting harsh terms and conditions, over-sharing sensitive data, and paying high fees to unknown and unverified lenders. Users demonstrated a dependence on loan platforms by persisting with such behaviors despite risks of harms such as abuse, recurring debts, discrimination, privacy harms, and self-harm to them. Instead of being enraged with loan platforms, users assumed responsibility for their negative experiences, thus releasing the high-powered loan platforms from accountability obligations. We argue that accountability is shaped by platform-user power relations, and urge caution to policymakers in adopting a purely technical approach to fostering algorithmic accountability. Instead, we call for situated interventions that enhance agency of users, enable meaningful transparency, reconfigure designer-user relations, and prompt a critical reflection in practitioners towards wider accountability. We conclude with implications for responsibly deploying AI in FinTech applications in India and beyond.
summary: Accountability, a requisite for responsible AI, can be facilitated through transparency mechanisms such as audits and explainability. However, prior work suggests that the success of these mechanisms may be limited to Global North contexts; understanding the limitations of current interventions in varied socio-political conditions is crucial to help policymakers facilitate wider accountability. To do so, we examined the mediation of accountability in the existing interactions between vulnerable users and a 'high-risk' AI system in a Global South setting. We report on a qualitative study with 29 financially-stressed users of instant loan platforms in India. We found that users experienced intense feelings of indebtedness for the 'boon' of instant loans, and perceived huge obligations towards loan platforms. Users fulfilled obligations by accepting harsh terms and conditions, over-sharing sensitive data, and paying high fees to unknown and unverified lenders. Users demonstrated a dependence on loan platforms by persisting with such behaviors despite risks of harms such as abuse, recurring debts, discrimination, privacy harms, and self-harm to them. Instead of being enraged with loan platforms, users assumed responsibility for their negative experiences, thus releasing the high-powered loan platforms from accountability obligations. We argue that accountability is shaped by platform-user power relations, and urge caution to policymakers in adopting a purely technical approach to fostering algorithmic accountability. Instead, we call for situated interventions that enhance agency of users, enable meaningful transparency, reconfigure designer-user relations, and prompt a critical reflection in practitioners towards wider accountability. We conclude with implications for responsibly deploying AI in FinTech applications in India and beyond.
abstract_zh: 问责制是负责任人工智能的必要条件，可以通过审计和可解释性等透明度机制来促进。然而，先前的研究表明，这些机制的成功可能仅限于全球北方的背景；了解当前干预措施在不同社会政治条件下的局限性对于帮助政策制定者促进更广泛的问责制至关重要。为此，我们研究了南半球环境中弱势用户与“高风险”人工智能系统之间现有互动中的问责调解。我们报告了一项针对印度 29 名面临财务压力的即时贷款平台用户的定性研究。我们发现，用户对即时贷款的“恩惠”产生了强烈的负债感，并感受到了对贷款平台的巨大义务。用户通过接受苛刻的条款和条件、过度共享敏感数据以及向未知和未经验证的贷方支付高额费用来履行义务。用户表现出对贷款平台的依赖，尽管存在滥用、经常性债务、歧视、隐私伤害和自残等伤害风险，但仍坚持此类行为。用户没有对贷款平台感到愤怒，而是为自己的负面体验承担了责任，从而使强大的贷款平台免于承担责任。我们认为，问责制是由平台与用户的权力关系决定的，并敦促政策制定者在采用纯技术方法来促进算法问责制时保持谨慎。相反，我们呼吁采取情境干预措施，增强用户的代理权，实现有意义的透明度，重新配置设计师与用户的关系，并促使从业者对更广泛的责任进行批判性反思。最后，我们对在印度及其他地区的金融科技应用中负责任地部署人工智能的影响进行了总结。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了平台与用户权力关系如何塑造算法问责机制，以印度即时贷款平台与经济弱势用户为例，分析算法问责在不同社会政治背景下的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有问责机制（如审计和可解释性）可能仅适用于发达国家语境，需理解其在发展中国家社会政治条件下的局限性，以指导政策制定者推动更广泛的算法问责。
AI.method: 通过定性研究方法，对印度29名经济困难的即时贷款用户进行深度访谈，分析其与高风险AI系统的互动及问责体验。
AI.result: 用户因依赖贷款平台而承受债务压力，接受苛刻条款、过度分享敏感数据并支付高额费用，却将责任归咎于自身，导致平台逃避问责。
AI.conclusion: 算法问责需超越技术层面，通过增强用户能动性、实现有意义的透明度、重构设计者-用户关系，推动从业者反思更广泛的问责机制，尤其在印度及全球金融科技领域具有重要政策启示。

search_text: How Platform-User Power Relations Shape Algorithmic Accountability: A Case Study of Instant Loan Platforms and Financially Stressed Users in India 平台与用户的权力关系如何塑造算法问责制：印度即时贷款平台和财务压力用户的案例研究 Accountability, a requisite for responsible AI, can be facilitated through transparency mechanisms such as audits and explainability. However, prior work suggests that the success of these mechanisms may be limited to Global North contexts; understanding the limitations of current interventions in varied socio-political conditions is crucial to help policymakers facilitate wider accountability. To do so, we examined the mediation of accountability in the existing interactions between vulnerable users and a 'high-risk' AI system in a Global South setting. We report on a qualitative study with 29 financially-stressed users of instant loan platforms in India. We found that users experienced intense feelings of indebtedness for the 'boon' of instant loans, and perceived huge obligations towards loan platforms. Users fulfilled obligations by accepting harsh terms and conditions, over-sharing sensitive data, and paying high fees to unknown and unverified lenders. Users demonstrated a dependence on loan platforms by persisting with such behaviors despite risks of harms such as abuse, recurring debts, discrimination, privacy harms, and self-harm to them. Instead of being enraged with loan platforms, users assumed responsibility for their negative experiences, thus releasing the high-powered loan platforms from accountability obligations. We argue that accountability is shaped by platform-user power relations, and urge caution to policymakers in adopting a purely technical approach to fostering algorithmic accountability. Instead, we call for situated interventions that enhance agency of users, enable meaningful transparency, reconfigure designer-user relations, and prompt a critical reflection in practitioners towards wider accountability. We conclude with implications for responsibly deploying AI in FinTech applications in India and beyond. 问责制是负责任人工智能的必要条件，可以通过审计和可解释性等透明度机制来促进。然而，先前的研究表明，这些机制的成功可能仅限于全球北方的背景；了解当前干预措施在不同社会政治条件下的局限性对于帮助政策制定者促进更广泛的问责制至关重要。为此，我们研究了南半球环境中弱势用户与“高风险”人工智能系统之间现有互动中的问责调解。我们报告了一项针对印度 29 名面临财务压力的即时贷款平台用户的定性研究。我们发现，用户对即时贷款的“恩惠”产生了强烈的负债感，并感受到了对贷款平台的巨大义务。用户通过接受苛刻的条款和条件、过度共享敏感数据以及向未知和未经验证的贷方支付高额费用来履行义务。用户表现出对贷款平台的依赖，尽管存在滥用、经常性债务、歧视、隐私伤害和自残等伤害风险，但仍坚持此类行为。用户没有对贷款平台感到愤怒，而是为自己的负面体验承担了责任，从而使强大的贷款平台免于承担责任。我们认为，问责制是由平台与用户的权力关系决定的，并敦促政策制定者在采用纯技术方法来促进算法问责制时保持谨慎。相反，我们呼吁采取情境干预措施，增强用户的代理权，实现有意义的透明度，重新配置设计师与用户的关系，并促使从业者对更广泛的责任进行批判性反思。最后，我们对在印度及其他地区的金融科技应用中负责任地部署人工智能的影响进行了总结。 本文探讨了平台与用户权力关系如何塑造算法问责机制，以印度即时贷款平台与经济弱势用户为例，分析算法问责在不同社会政治背景下的局限性。 Divya Ramesh,Vaishnav Kameswaran,Ding Wang,Nithya Sambasivan cs.HC,cs.AI,cs.CY,cs.LG

authors_text: Lily Xu,Arpita Biswas,Fei Fang,Milind Tambe
title: Ranked Prioritization of Groups in Combinatorial Bandit Allocation
title_zh: 组合老虎机分配中各组的优先顺序
comment: Accepted at IJCAI 2022, AI for Good track. 7 pages + 2 pages appendix. Code is available at https://github.com/lily-x/rankedCUCB
comments: Accepted at IJCAI 2022, AI for Good track. 7 pages + 2 pages appendix. Code is available at https://github.com/lily-x/rankedCUCB
abstract: Preventing poaching through ranger patrols protects endangered wildlife, directly contributing to the UN Sustainable Development Goal 15 of life on land. Combinatorial bandits have been used to allocate limited patrol resources, but existing approaches overlook the fact that each location is home to multiple species in varying proportions, so a patrol benefits each species to differing degrees. When some species are more vulnerable, we ought to offer more protection to these animals; unfortunately, existing combinatorial bandit approaches do not offer a way to prioritize important species. To bridge this gap, (1) We propose a novel combinatorial bandit objective that trades off between reward maximization and also accounts for prioritization over species, which we call ranked prioritization. We show this objective can be expressed as a weighted linear sum of Lipschitz-continuous reward functions. (2) We provide RankedCUCB, an algorithm to select combinatorial actions that optimize our prioritization-based objective, and prove that it achieves asymptotic no-regret. (3) We demonstrate empirically that RankedCUCB leads to up to 38% improvement in outcomes for endangered species using real-world wildlife conservation data. Along with adapting to other challenges such as preventing illegal logging and overfishing, our no-regret algorithm addresses the general combinatorial bandit problem with a weighted linear objective.
summary: Preventing poaching through ranger patrols protects endangered wildlife, directly contributing to the UN Sustainable Development Goal 15 of life on land. Combinatorial bandits have been used to allocate limited patrol resources, but existing approaches overlook the fact that each location is home to multiple species in varying proportions, so a patrol benefits each species to differing degrees. When some species are more vulnerable, we ought to offer more protection to these animals; unfortunately, existing combinatorial bandit approaches do not offer a way to prioritize important species. To bridge this gap, (1) We propose a novel combinatorial bandit objective that trades off between reward maximization and also accounts for prioritization over species, which we call ranked prioritization. We show this objective can be expressed as a weighted linear sum of Lipschitz-continuous reward functions. (2) We provide RankedCUCB, an algorithm to select combinatorial actions that optimize our prioritization-based objective, and prove that it achieves asymptotic no-regret. (3) We demonstrate empirically that RankedCUCB leads to up to 38% improvement in outcomes for endangered species using real-world wildlife conservation data. Along with adapting to other challenges such as preventing illegal logging and overfishing, our no-regret algorithm addresses the general combinatorial bandit problem with a weighted linear objective.
abstract_zh: 通过护林员巡逻防止偷猎可以保护濒临灭绝的野生动物，直接有助于实现联合国可持续发展目标 15 的陆地生物。组合老虎机已被用来分配有限的巡逻资源，但现有的方法忽略了这样一个事实：每个地点都是不同比例的多个物种的家园，因此巡逻对每个物种都有不同程度的好处。当某些物种更加脆弱时，我们应该为这些动物提供更多保护；不幸的是，现有的组合老虎机方法没有提供一种对重要物种进行优先排序的方法。为了弥补这一差距，（1）我们提出了一种新颖的组合老虎机目标，该目标在奖励最大化和物种优先级之间进行权衡，我们称之为排名优先级。我们证明这个目标可以表示为 Lipschitz 连续奖励函数的加权线性和。 （2）我们提供RankedCUCB，一种选择组合动作的算法，优化我们基于优先级的目标，并证明它实现了渐近无悔。 (3) 我们根据实际情况证明，利用现实世界野生动物保护数据，RankedCUCB 可使濒危物种的结果提高高达 38%。除了适应其他挑战（例如防止非法采伐和过度捕捞）之外，我们的无悔算法还通过加权线性目标解决了一般组合强盗问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于组合老虎机的排名优先级分配方法，用于优化野生动物保护巡逻资源分配，以更有效地保护濒危物种。
AI.motivation: 现有组合老虎机方法未能考虑不同物种的脆弱性差异，导致对濒危物种的保护不足，无法有效支持联合国可持续发展目标15。
AI.method: 提出排名优先级目标函数，将其表示为Lipschitz连续奖励函数的加权线性和，并设计RankedCUCB算法实现该目标的最优动作选择。
AI.result: 在真实野生动物保护数据中，RankedCUCB算法使濒危物种保护效果提升最高达38%，并证明了算法的渐进无悔性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过引入物种优先级权重，解决了组合老虎机在资源分配中的优先级问题，可扩展至非法伐木和过度捕捞等场景。

authors_text: Nikolaos Tziavelis,Wolfgang Gatterbauer,Mirek Riedewald
title: Any-k Algorithms for Enumerating Ranked Answers to Conjunctive Queries
title_zh: 用于枚举连接查询的排名答案的 Any-k 算法
abstract: We study ranked enumeration for Conjunctive Queries (CQs) where the answers are ordered by a given ranking function (e.g., an ORDER BY clause in SQL). We develop "any-k" algorithms, which, without knowing the number k of desired answers, push down the ranking into joins by carefully ordering the computation of intermediate tuples and avoiding materialization of join answers until they are needed. For this to be possible, the ranking function needs to obey a particular type of monotonicity. Supported ranking functions include the common sum-of-weights, where answers are compared by the sum of input-tuple weights, as well as any commutative selective dioid. Our results extend a well-known unranked-enumeration dichotomy, which states that only free-connex CQs are tractable (under certain hardness hypotheses and for CQs without self-joins). For this class of queries and with n denoting the size of the input, the data complexity of our ranked enumeration approach for the time to the kth CQ answer is O(n+klogk), which is only a logarithmic factor slower than the O(n+k) unranked-enumeration guarantee. A core insight of our work is that ranked enumeration for CQs is closely related to Dynamic Programming and the fundamental task of path enumeration in a weighted DAG. We uncover a previously unknown tradeoff: one any-k algorithm has lower complexity when the number of returned answers is small, the other when their number is large. This tradeoff is eliminated under a stricter monotonicity property that we define and exploit for a novel algorithm that asymptotically dominates all previously known alternatives, including Eppstein's algorithm for sum-of-weights path enumeration. We empirically demonstrate the findings of our theoretical analysis in an experimental study that highlights the superiority of our approach over the join-then-rank approach that existing database systems follow.

This tradeoff is eliminated under a stricter monotonicity property that we define and exploit for a novel algorithm that asymptotically dominates all previously known alternatives, including Eppstein's algorithm for sum-of-weights path enumeration. We empirically demonstrate the findings of our theoretical analysis in an experimental study that highlights the superiority of our approach over the join-then-rank approach that existing database systems follow.
abstract_zh: 我们研究联合查询 (CQ) 的排名枚举，其中答案按给定的排名函数（例如 SQL 中的 ORDER BY 子句）排序。我们开发了“any-k”算法，该算法在不知道所需答案的数量 k 的情况下，通过仔细排序中间元组的计算并避免在需要时具体化连接答案，将排名推向连接。为了实现这一点，排名函数需要遵守特定类型的单调性。支持的排名函数包括常见的权重总和，其中答案通过输入元组权重的总和进行比较，以及任何可交换的选择性二元函数。我们的结果扩展了众所周知的未排序枚举二分法，即只有自由连接的 CQ 才是可处理的（在某些硬度假设下并且对于没有自连接的 CQ）。对于此类查询，n 表示输入的大小，我们的排名枚举方法在获得第 k 个 CQ 答案时的数据复杂度为 O(n+klogk)，这仅比 O(n+k) 非排名枚举保证慢一个对数因子。我们工作的核心见解是 CQ 的排名枚举与动态规划和加权 DAG 中路径枚举的基本任务密切相关。我们发现了一个以前未知的权衡：当返回的答案数量较少时，一种 any-k 算法的复杂度较低，而当返回答案的数量较多时，另一种算法的复杂度较低。这种权衡在更严格的单调性属性下被消除，我们定义并利用了一种新颖的算法，该算法渐近地主导了所有先前已知的替代方案，包括 Eppstein 的权重和路径枚举算法。我们在实验研究中凭经验证明了我们的理论分析结果，强调了我们的方法相对于现有数据库系统遵循的连接然后排名方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了如何通过开发'any-k'算法，对连贯查询（CQ）的答案进行排序枚举，无需预先知道所需答案数量k，通过将排序函数嵌入连接操作中实现高效枚举。
AI.motivation: 传统数据库系统采用'先连接后排序'的方法效率低下，尤其当k较大时。本文旨在设计一种无需预知k且能动态处理排序的算法，以提升大规模数据查询性能。
AI.method: 提出基于单调性排序函数的'any-k'算法，通过动态规划思想和加权DAG路径枚举技术，将排序逻辑嵌入连接过程，避免中间结果的冗余存储，并引入严格单调性条件优化算法复杂度。
AI.result: 实现时间复杂度为O(n + k log k)（n为输入规模），仅比无排序枚举的O(n + k)多对数因子；新算法在k较大时优于Eppstein算法，实验验证了其相对于传统方法的优越性。
AI.conclusion: 本文证明了排序枚举与动态规划的内在关联，通过严格单调性条件设计的算法在理论上和实践中均优于现有方法，为数据库系统提供了更高效的查询处理范式。

search_text: Any-k Algorithms for Enumerating Ranked Answers to Conjunctive Queries 用于枚举连接查询的排名答案的 Any-k 算法 We study ranked enumeration for Conjunctive Queries (CQs) where the answers are ordered by a given ranking function (e.g., an ORDER BY clause in SQL). We develop "any-k" algorithms, which, without knowing the number k of desired answers, push down the ranking into joins by carefully ordering the computation of intermediate tuples and avoiding materialization of join answers until they are needed. For this to be possible, the ranking function needs to obey a particular type of monotonicity. Supported ranking functions include the common sum-of-weights, where answers are compared by the sum of input-tuple weights, as well as any commutative selective dioid. Our results extend a well-known unranked-enumeration dichotomy, which states that only free-connex CQs are tractable (under certain hardness hypotheses and for CQs without self-joins). For this class of queries and with n denoting the size of the input, the data complexity of our ranked enumeration approach for the time to the kth CQ answer is O(n+klogk), which is only a logarithmic factor slower than the O(n+k) unranked-enumeration guarantee. A core insight of our work is that ranked enumeration for CQs is closely related to Dynamic Programming and the fundamental task of path enumeration in a weighted DAG. We uncover a previously unknown tradeoff: one any-k algorithm has lower complexity when the number of returned answers is small, the other when their number is large. This tradeoff is eliminated under a stricter monotonicity property that we define and exploit for a novel algorithm that asymptotically dominates all previously known alternatives, including Eppstein's algorithm for sum-of-weights path enumeration. We empirically demonstrate the findings of our theoretical analysis in an experimental study that highlights the superiority of our approach over the join-then-rank approach that existing database systems follow. 我们研究联合查询 (CQ) 的排名枚举，其中答案按给定的排名函数（例如 SQL 中的 ORDER BY 子句）排序。我们开发了“any-k”算法，该算法在不知道所需答案的数量 k 的情况下，通过仔细排序中间元组的计算并避免在需要时具体化连接答案，将排名推向连接。为了实现这一点，排名函数需要遵守特定类型的单调性。支持的排名函数包括常见的权重总和，其中答案通过输入元组权重的总和进行比较，以及任何可交换的选择性二元函数。我们的结果扩展了众所周知的未排序枚举二分法，即只有自由连接的 CQ 才是可处理的（在某些硬度假设下并且对于没有自连接的 CQ）。对于此类查询，n 表示输入的大小，我们的排名枚举方法在获得第 k 个 CQ 答案时的数据复杂度为 O(n+klogk)，这仅比 O(n+k) 非排名枚举保证慢一个对数因子。我们工作的核心见解是 CQ 的排名枚举与动态规划和加权 DAG 中路径枚举的基本任务密切相关。我们发现了一个以前未知的权衡：当返回的答案数量较少时，一种 any-k 算法的复杂度较低，而当返回答案的数量较多时，另一种算法的复杂度较低。这种权衡在更严格的单调性属性下被消除，我们定义并利用了一种新颖的算法，该算法渐近地主导了所有先前已知的替代方案，包括 Eppstein 的权重和路径枚举算法。我们在实验研究中凭经验证明了我们的理论分析结果，强调了我们的方法相对于现有数据库系统遵循的连接然后排名方法的优越性。 本文研究了如何通过开发'any-k'算法，对连贯查询（CQ）的答案进行排序枚举，无需预先知道所需答案数量k，通过将排序函数嵌入连接操作中实现高效枚举。 Nikolaos Tziavelis,Wolfgang Gatterbauer,Mirek Riedewald cs.DB,cs.DS,cs.LO

authors_text: Xia Zeng,Arkaitz Zubiaga
title: Aggregating Pairwise Semantic Differences for Few-Shot Claim Veracity Classification
title_zh: 聚合成对语义差异以进行少样本声明准确性分类
abstract: As part of an automated fact-checking pipeline, the claim veracity classification task consists in determining if a claim is supported by an associated piece of evidence. The complexity of gathering labelled claim-evidence pairs leads to a scarcity of datasets, particularly when dealing with new domains. In this paper, we introduce SEED, a novel vector-based method to few-shot claim veracity classification that aggregates pairwise semantic differences for claim-evidence pairs. We build on the hypothesis that we can simulate class representative vectors that capture average semantic differences for claim-evidence pairs in a class, which can then be used for classification of new instances. We compare the performance of our method with competitive baselines including fine-tuned BERT/RoBERTa models, as well as the state-of-the-art few-shot veracity classification method that leverages language model perplexity. Experiments conducted on the FEVER and SCIFACT datasets show consistent improvements over competitive baselines in few-shot settings. Our code is available.
summary: As part of an automated fact-checking pipeline, the claim veracity classification task consists in determining if a claim is supported by an associated piece of evidence. The complexity of gathering labelled claim-evidence pairs leads to a scarcity of datasets, particularly when dealing with new domains. In this paper, we introduce SEED, a novel vector-based method to few-shot claim veracity classification that aggregates pairwise semantic differences for claim-evidence pairs. We build on the hypothesis that we can simulate class representative vectors that capture average semantic differences for claim-evidence pairs in a class, which can then be used for classification of new instances. We compare the performance of our method with competitive baselines including fine-tuned BERT/RoBERTa models, as well as the state-of-the-art few-shot veracity classification method that leverages language model perplexity. Experiments conducted on the FEVER and SCIFACT datasets show consistent improvements over competitive baselines in few-shot settings. Our code is available.
abstract_zh: 作为自动事实检查流程的一部分，声明准确性分类任务包括确定某个声明是否得到相关证据的支持。收集带标签的主张-证据对的复杂性导致数据集的稀缺，特别是在处理新领域时。在本文中，我们介绍了 SEED，这是一种基于向量的新型方法，用于进行少样本索赔准确性分类，该方法聚合索赔证据对的成对语义差异。我们假设我们可以模拟类代表向量，这些向量捕获类中声明-证据对的平均语义差异，然后可以将其用于新实例的分类。我们将我们的方法的性能与竞争基线进行比较，包括微调的 BERT/RoBERTa 模型，以及利用语言模型困惑度的最先进的少样本准确性分类方法。在 FEVER 和 SCIFACT 数据集上进行的实验表明，在少数样本设置中，与竞争基线相比，取得了一致的改进。我们的代码可用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于向量的少样本声明真实性分类方法SEED，通过聚合声明-证据对的语义差异进行分类。
AI.motivation: 现有事实核查数据集稀缺且难以扩展，传统方法在新领域表现不佳，需开发适用于少样本场景的新型分类方法。
AI.method: 构建SEED方法，通过计算声明-证据对的语义差异向量并聚合生成类代表性向量，利用向量相似度进行分类。
AI.result: 在FEVER和SCIFACT数据集上，SEED在少样本设置下显著优于微调BERT/RoBERTa及基于语言模型困惑度的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: SEED方法有效解决了少样本声明真实性分类问题，代码开源可扩展至其他领域事实核查任务。

authors_text: Raffaele Giancarlo,Giovanni Manzini,Antonio Restivo,Giovanna Rosone,Marinella Sciortino
title: A New Class of String Transformations for Compressed Text Indexing
title_zh: 用于压缩文本索引的一类新字符串转换
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1902.01280
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1902.01280
abstract: Introduced about thirty years ago in the field of Data Compression, the Burrows-Wheeler Transform (BWT) is a string transformation that, besides being a booster of the performance of memoryless compressors, plays a fundamental role in the design of efficient self-indexing compressed data structures. Finding other string transformations with the same remarkable properties of BWT has been a challenge for many researchers for a long time. Among the known BWT variants, the only one that has been recently shown to be a valid alternative to BWT is the Alternating BWT (ABWT), another invertible string transformation introduced about ten years ago in connection with a generalization of Lyndon words. In this paper, we introduce a whole class of new string transformations, called local orderings-based transformations, which have all the myriad virtues of BWT. We show that this new family is a special case of a much larger class of transformations, based on context adaptive alphabet orderings, that includes BWT and ABWT. Although all transformations support pattern search, we show that, in the general case, the transformations within our larger class may take quadratic time for inversion and pattern search. As a further result, we show that the local orderings-based transformations can be used for the construction of the recently introduced r-index, which makes them suitable also for highly repetitive collections. In this context, we consider the problem of finding, for a given string, the BWT variant that minimizes the number of runs in the transformed string, and we provide an algorithm solving this problem in linear time.
summary: Introduced about thirty years ago in the field of Data Compression, the Burrows-Wheeler Transform (BWT) is a string transformation that, besides being a booster of the performance of memoryless compressors, plays a fundamental role in the design of efficient self-indexing compressed data structures. Finding other string transformations with the same remarkable properties of BWT has been a challenge for many researchers for a long time. Among the known BWT variants, the only one that has been recently shown to be a valid alternative to BWT is the Alternating BWT (ABWT), another invertible string transformation introduced about ten years ago in connection with a generalization of Lyndon words. In this paper, we introduce a whole class of new string transformations, called local orderings-based transformations, which have all the myriad virtues of BWT. We show that this new family is a special case of a much larger class of transformations, based on context adaptive alphabet orderings, that includes BWT and ABWT. Although all transformations support pattern search, we show that, in the general case, the transformations within our larger class may take quadratic time for inversion and pattern search. As a further result, we show that the local orderings-based transformations can be used for the construction of the recently introduced r-index, which makes them suitable also for highly repetitive collections. In this context, we consider the problem of finding, for a given string, the BWT variant that minimizes the number of runs in the transformed string, and we provide an algorithm solving this problem in linear time.
abstract_zh: Burrows-Wheeler 变换 (BWT) 是大约三十年前在数据压缩领域引入的一种字符串变换，它除了可以提高无记忆压缩器的性能之外，还在高效自索引压缩数据结构的设计中发挥着基础作用。长期以来，寻找与 BWT 具有相同显着特性的其他字符串转换一直是许多研究人员面临的挑战。在已知的 BWT 变体中，最近被证明可以有效替代 BWT 的唯一一个是交替 BWT (ABWT)，这是大约十年前与 Lyndon 词的泛化相关的另一种可逆字符串转换。在本文中，我们介绍了一整类新的字符串转换，称为基于局部排序的转换，它具有 BWT 的所有优点。我们表明，这个新家族是基于上下文自适应字母排序（包括 BWT 和 ABWT）的更大类别转换的特例。尽管所有转换都支持模式搜索，但我们表明，在一般情况下，我们更大的类中的转换可能需要二次时间来进行反演和模式搜索。作为进一步的结果，我们表明基于局部排序的转换可用于构建最近引入的 r 索引，这使得它们也适用于高度重复的集合。在这种情况下，我们考虑寻找给定字符串的 BWT 变体的问题，该变体可以最小化转换字符串中的运行次数，并且我们提供了一种在线性时间内解决此问题的算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于局部排序的新字符串变换类，用于压缩文本索引，并展示了其在高度重复集合中的应用。
AI.motivation: BWT变换在压缩和索引中具有重要地位，但寻找其有效替代方案长期是挑战。现有变体如ABWT存在局限性，需探索更优的变换方法。
AI.method: 引入基于局部排序的变换类，证明其是更广泛的自适应上下文排序变换的特例，并设计线性时间算法优化变换后的运行长度。
AI.result: 新变换支持模式搜索，适用于构建r-index；提出算法可在线性时间内找到使变换后字符串运行数最少的BWT变体。
AI.conclusion: 局部排序变换类继承了BWT的优势，为压缩索引提供了新工具，尤其适合处理高度重复的数据集合。

search_text: A New Class of String Transformations for Compressed Text Indexing 用于压缩文本索引的一类新字符串转换 Introduced about thirty years ago in the field of Data Compression, the Burrows-Wheeler Transform (BWT) is a string transformation that, besides being a booster of the performance of memoryless compressors, plays a fundamental role in the design of efficient self-indexing compressed data structures. Finding other string transformations with the same remarkable properties of BWT has been a challenge for many researchers for a long time. Among the known BWT variants, the only one that has been recently shown to be a valid alternative to BWT is the Alternating BWT (ABWT), another invertible string transformation introduced about ten years ago in connection with a generalization of Lyndon words. In this paper, we introduce a whole class of new string transformations, called local orderings-based transformations, which have all the myriad virtues of BWT. We show that this new family is a special case of a much larger class of transformations, based on context adaptive alphabet orderings, that includes BWT and ABWT. Although all transformations support pattern search, we show that, in the general case, the transformations within our larger class may take quadratic time for inversion and pattern search. As a further result, we show that the local orderings-based transformations can be used for the construction of the recently introduced r-index, which makes them suitable also for highly repetitive collections. In this context, we consider the problem of finding, for a given string, the BWT variant that minimizes the number of runs in the transformed string, and we provide an algorithm solving this problem in linear time. Burrows-Wheeler 变换 (BWT) 是大约三十年前在数据压缩领域引入的一种字符串变换，它除了可以提高无记忆压缩器的性能之外，还在高效自索引压缩数据结构的设计中发挥着基础作用。长期以来，寻找与 BWT 具有相同显着特性的其他字符串转换一直是许多研究人员面临的挑战。在已知的 BWT 变体中，最近被证明可以有效替代 BWT 的唯一一个是交替 BWT (ABWT)，这是大约十年前与 Lyndon 词的泛化相关的另一种可逆字符串转换。在本文中，我们介绍了一整类新的字符串转换，称为基于局部排序的转换，它具有 BWT 的所有优点。我们表明，这个新家族是基于上下文自适应字母排序（包括 BWT 和 ABWT）的更大类别转换的特例。尽管所有转换都支持模式搜索，但我们表明，在一般情况下，我们更大的类中的转换可能需要二次时间来进行反演和模式搜索。作为进一步的结果，我们表明基于局部排序的转换可用于构建最近引入的 r 索引，这使得它们也适用于高度重复的集合。在这种情况下，我们考虑寻找给定字符串的 BWT 变体的问题，该变体可以最小化转换字符串中的运行次数，并且我们提供了一种在线性时间内解决此问题的算法。 本文提出了一种基于局部排序的新字符串变换类，用于压缩文本索引，并展示了其在高度重复集合中的应用。 Raffaele Giancarlo,Giovanni Manzini,Antonio Restivo,Giovanna Rosone,Marinella Sciortino cs.DS

authors_text: Haokun Liu,Derek Tam,Mohammed Muqeeth,Jay Mohta,Tenghao Huang,Mohit Bansal,Colin Raffel
title: Few-Shot Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning is Better and Cheaper than In-Context Learning
title_zh: 少样本参数高效微调比上下文学习更好、更便宜
abstract: Few-shot in-context learning (ICL) enables pre-trained language models to perform a previously-unseen task without any gradient-based training by feeding a small number of training examples as part of the input. ICL incurs substantial computational, memory, and storage costs because it involves processing all of the training examples every time a prediction is made. Parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) (e.g. adapter modules, prompt tuning, sparse update methods, etc.) offers an alternative paradigm where a small set of parameters are trained to enable a model to perform the new task. In this paper, we rigorously compare few-shot ICL and PEFT and demonstrate that the latter offers better accuracy as well as dramatically lower computational costs. Along the way, we introduce a new PEFT method called (IA)$^3$ that scales activations by learned vectors, attaining stronger performance while only introducing a relatively tiny amount of new parameters. We also propose a simple recipe based on the T0 model called T-Few that can be applied to new tasks without task-specific tuning or modifications. We validate the effectiveness of T-Few on completely unseen tasks by applying it to the RAFT benchmark, attaining super-human performance for the first time and outperforming the state-of-the-art by 6% absolute. All of the code used in our experiments is publicly available.
summary: Few-shot in-context learning (ICL) enables pre-trained language models to perform a previously-unseen task without any gradient-based training by feeding a small number of training examples as part of the input. ICL incurs substantial computational, memory, and storage costs because it involves processing all of the training examples every time a prediction is made. Parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) (e.g. adapter modules, prompt tuning, sparse update methods, etc.) offers an alternative paradigm where a small set of parameters are trained to enable a model to perform the new task. In this paper, we rigorously compare few-shot ICL and PEFT and demonstrate that the latter offers better accuracy as well as dramatically lower computational costs. Along the way, we introduce a new PEFT method called (IA)$^3$ that scales activations by learned vectors, attaining stronger performance while only introducing a relatively tiny amount of new parameters. We also propose a simple recipe based on the T0 model called T-Few that can be applied to new tasks without task-specific tuning or modifications. We validate the effectiveness of T-Few on completely unseen tasks by applying it to the RAFT benchmark, attaining super-human performance for the first time and outperforming the state-of-the-art by 6% absolute. All of the code used in our experiments is publicly available.
abstract_zh: 少镜头上下文学习 (ICL) 通过提供少量训练示例作为输入的一部分，使预先训练的语言模型能够执行以前未见过的任务，而无需任何基于梯度的训练。 ICL 会产生大量的计算、内存和存储成本，因为它涉及每次进行预测时处理所有训练示例。参数高效微调（PEFT）（例如适配器模块、提示调整、稀疏更新方法等）提供了一种替代范例，其中训练一小组参数以使模型能够执行新任务。在本文中，我们严格比较了少样本 ICL 和 PEFT，并证明后者提供了更好的精度以及显着降低的计算成本。在此过程中，我们引入了一种名为 (IA)$^3$ 的新 PEFT 方法，该方法通过学习向量来缩放激活，在仅引入相对少量的新参数的同时获得更强的性能。我们还提出了一个基于 T0 模型的简单方案，称为 T-Few，它可以应用于新任务，而无需针对特定任务进行调整或修改。我们通过将 T-Few 应用到 RAFT 基准测试中，验证了 T-Few 在完全未见过的任务上的有效性，首次获得了超人类的性能，并且绝对优于最先进的 6%。我们实验中使用的所有代码都是公开的。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了少样本上下文学习（ICL）与参数高效微调（PEFT）方法，证明PEFT在准确性和计算成本上更具优势，并提出了新的PEFT方法(IA)$^3$和T-Few框架。
AI.motivation: ICL需每次推理时处理全部训练样本，导致高昂的计算存储成本；PEFT通过微调少量参数实现任务适配，但其效果和效率尚未充分验证。
AI.method: 提出(IA)$^3$方法通过可学习向量缩放激活值实现参数高效微调；设计无需任务特定调整的T-Few框架，并在RAFT基准测试中验证其有效性。
AI.result: PEFT在准确率和计算成本上优于ICL，(IA)$^3$参数量仅为基模型的0.1%，T-Few在RAFT基准上首次实现超人类表现，较SOTA提升6%绝对值。
AI.conclusion: 参数高效微调在少样本场景下优于上下文学习，新提出的方法在保持高效性的同时显著提升模型性能，为实际应用提供更优解决方案。

authors_text: Patrizio Angelini,Steven Chaplick,Sabine Cornelsen,Giordano Da Lozzo
title: On Upward-Planar L-Drawings of Graphs
title_zh: 关于图的向上平面 L 图
comment: Extended abstract appeared at MFCS 2022
comments: Extended abstract appeared at MFCS 2022
abstract: In an upward-planar L-drawing of a directed acyclic graph (DAG) each edge $e$ is represented as a polyline composed of a vertical segment with its lowest endpoint at the tail of $e$ and of a horizontal segment ending at the head of $e$. Distinct edges may overlap, but not cross. Recently, upward-planar L-drawings have been studied for $st$-graphs, i.e., planar DAGs with a single source $s$ and a single sink $t$ containing an edge directed from $s$ to $t$. It is known that a plane $st$-graph, i.e., an embedded $st$-graph in which the edge $(s,t)$ is incident to the outer face, admits an upward-planar L-drawing if and only if it admits a bitonic $st$-ordering, which can be tested in linear time. We study upward-planar L-drawings of DAGs that are not necessarily $st$-graphs. On the combinatorial side, we show that a plane DAG admits an upward-planar L-drawing if and only if it is a subgraph of a plane $st$-graph admitting a bitonic $st$-ordering. This allows us to show that not every tree with a fixed bimodal embedding admits an upward-planar L-drawing. Moreover, we prove that any acyclic cactus with a single source (or a single sink) admits an upward-planar L-drawing, which respects a given outerplanar embedding if there are no transitive edges. On the algorithmic side, we consider DAGs with a single source (or a single sink). We give linear-time testing algorithms for these DAGs in two cases: (i) when the drawing must respect a prescribed embedding and (ii) when no restriction is given on the embedding, but it is biconnected and series-parallel.

On the algorithmic side, we consider DAGs with a single source (or a single sink). We give linear-time testing algorithms for these DAGs in two cases: (i) when the drawing must respect a prescribed embedding and (ii) when no restriction is given on the embedding, but it is biconnected and series-parallel.
abstract_zh: 在有向无环图 (DAG) 的向上平面 L 图中，每条边 $e$ 表示为由一条最低端点位于 $e$ 尾部的垂直线段和一条终止于 $e$ 头部的水平线段组成的折线。不同的边缘可以重叠，但不能交叉。最近，已经研究了 $st$ 图的向上平面 L 图，即具有单个源 $s$ 和单个接收器 $t$ 的平面 DAG，其中包含从 $s$ 指向 $t$ 的边。众所周知，平面 $st$ 图，即边 $(s,t)$ 与外面相交的嵌入式 $st$ 图，当且仅当它承认双音 $st$ 排序时，才承认向上平面 L 绘图，这可以在线性时间中进行测试。我们研究 DAG 的向上平面 L 图，这些图不一定是 $st$ 图。在组合方面，我们证明平面 DAG 承认向上平面 L 绘图当且仅当它是承认双调 $st$ 排序的平面 $st$ 图的子图。这使我们能够证明，并非每棵具有固定双峰嵌入的树都允许向上平面的 L 形图。此外，我们证明任何具有单个源（或单个汇）的无环仙人掌都允许向上平面的 L 形图，如果没有传递边，则该图尊重给定的外平面嵌入。在算法方面，我们考虑具有单个源（或单个接收器）的 DAG。我们在两种情况下为这些 DAG 提供线性时间测试算法：(i) 当绘图必须遵守规定的嵌入时；(ii) 当嵌入没有给出限制，但它是双连接和串并联时。

AI.tldr: 本文研究有向无环图（DAG）的向上平面L-绘制问题，特别是非st-图的情况，探讨其组合特性与算法实现。
AI.motivation: 尽管st-图的向上平面L-绘制已有研究，但针对更一般的DAG的条件和算法尚未明确，需扩展理论并解决实际绘制需求。
AI.method: 通过组合分析确定平面DAG的必要条件，结合算法设计实现线性时间测试，分两种嵌入约束情况处理。
AI.result: 证明平面DAG可绘制当且仅当其为特定st-图的子图；部分树结构无法满足条件；单源/汇的无环仙人掌图可绘制；提出两种线性时间算法。
AI.conclusion: 本文为非st-图的向上平面L-绘制提供了理论表征与算法框架，揭示了问题复杂性，并为实际应用奠定基础。

search_text: On Upward-Planar L-Drawings of Graphs 关于图的向上平面 L 图 In an upward-planar L-drawing of a directed acyclic graph (DAG) each edge $e$ is represented as a polyline composed of a vertical segment with its lowest endpoint at the tail of $e$ and of a horizontal segment ending at the head of $e$. Distinct edges may overlap, but not cross. Recently, upward-planar L-drawings have been studied for $st$-graphs, i.e., planar DAGs with a single source $s$ and a single sink $t$ containing an edge directed from $s$ to $t$. It is known that a plane $st$-graph, i.e., an embedded $st$-graph in which the edge $(s,t)$ is incident to the outer face, admits an upward-planar L-drawing if and only if it admits a bitonic $st$-ordering, which can be tested in linear time. We study upward-planar L-drawings of DAGs that are not necessarily $st$-graphs. On the combinatorial side, we show that a plane DAG admits an upward-planar L-drawing if and only if it is a subgraph of a plane $st$-graph admitting a bitonic $st$-ordering. This allows us to show that not every tree with a fixed bimodal embedding admits an upward-planar L-drawing. Moreover, we prove that any acyclic cactus with a single source (or a single sink) admits an upward-planar L-drawing, which respects a given outerplanar embedding if there are no transitive edges. On the algorithmic side, we consider DAGs with a single source (or a single sink). We give linear-time testing algorithms for these DAGs in two cases: (i) when the drawing must respect a prescribed embedding and (ii) when no restriction is given on the embedding, but it is biconnected and series-parallel. 在有向无环图 (DAG) 的向上平面 L 图中，每条边 $e$ 表示为由一条最低端点位于 $e$ 尾部的垂直线段和一条终止于 $e$ 头部的水平线段组成的折线。不同的边缘可以重叠，但不能交叉。最近，已经研究了 $st$ 图的向上平面 L 图，即具有单个源 $s$ 和单个接收器 $t$ 的平面 DAG，其中包含从 $s$ 指向 $t$ 的边。众所周知，平面 $st$ 图，即边 $(s,t)$ 与外面相交的嵌入式 $st$ 图，当且仅当它承认双音 $st$ 排序时，才承认向上平面 L 绘图，这可以在线性时间中进行测试。我们研究 DAG 的向上平面 L 图，这些图不一定是 $st$ 图。在组合方面，我们证明平面 DAG 承认向上平面 L 绘图当且仅当它是承认双调 $st$ 排序的平面 $st$ 图的子图。这使我们能够证明，并非每棵具有固定双峰嵌入的树都允许向上平面的 L 形图。此外，我们证明任何具有单个源（或单个汇）的无环仙人掌都允许向上平面的 L 形图，如果没有传递边，则该图尊重给定的外平面嵌入。在算法方面，我们考虑具有单个源（或单个接收器）的 DAG。我们在两种情况下为这些 DAG 提供线性时间测试算法：(i) 当绘图必须遵守规定的嵌入时；(ii) 当嵌入没有给出限制，但它是双连接和串并联时。 本文研究有向无环图（DAG）的向上平面L-绘制问题，特别是非st-图的情况，探讨其组合特性与算法实现。 Patrizio Angelini,Steven Chaplick,Sabine Cornelsen,Giordano Da Lozzo cs.DS

authors_text: Guangxi Li,Xuanqiang Zhao,Xin Wang
title: Quantum Self-Attention Neural Networks for Text Classification
title_zh: 用于文本分类的量子自注意力神经网络
comment: v2 is close to the published version
comments: v2 is close to the published version
abstract: An emerging direction of quantum computing is to establish meaningful quantum applications in various fields of artificial intelligence, including natural language processing (NLP). Although some efforts based on syntactic analysis have opened the door to research in Quantum NLP (QNLP), limitations such as heavy syntactic preprocessing and syntax-dependent network architecture make them impracticable on larger and real-world data sets. In this paper, we propose a new simple network architecture, called the quantum self-attention neural network (QSANN), which can compensate for these limitations. Specifically, we introduce the self-attention mechanism into quantum neural networks and then utilize a Gaussian projected quantum self-attention serving as a sensible quantum version of self-attention. As a result, QSANN is effective and scalable on larger data sets and has the desirable property of being implementable on near-term quantum devices. In particular, our QSANN outperforms the best existing QNLP model based on syntactic analysis as well as a simple classical self-attention neural network in numerical experiments of text classification tasks on public data sets. We further show that our method exhibits robustness to low-level quantum noises and showcases resilience to quantum neural network architectures.
summary: An emerging direction of quantum computing is to establish meaningful quantum applications in various fields of artificial intelligence, including natural language processing (NLP). Although some efforts based on syntactic analysis have opened the door to research in Quantum NLP (QNLP), limitations such as heavy syntactic preprocessing and syntax-dependent network architecture make them impracticable on larger and real-world data sets. In this paper, we propose a new simple network architecture, called the quantum self-attention neural network (QSANN), which can compensate for these limitations. Specifically, we introduce the self-attention mechanism into quantum neural networks and then utilize a Gaussian projected quantum self-attention serving as a sensible quantum version of self-attention. As a result, QSANN is effective and scalable on larger data sets and has the desirable property of being implementable on near-term quantum devices. In particular, our QSANN outperforms the best existing QNLP model based on syntactic analysis as well as a simple classical self-attention neural network in numerical experiments of text classification tasks on public data sets. We further show that our method exhibits robustness to low-level quantum noises and showcases resilience to quantum neural network architectures.
abstract_zh: 量子计算的一个新兴方向是在人工智能的各个领域建立有意义的量子应用，包括自然语言处理（NLP）。尽管一些基于句法分析的努力为量子自然语言处理（QNLP）的研究打开了大门，但繁重的句法预处理和句法依赖的网络架构等限制使得它们在更大的现实世界数据集上不切实际。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的简单网络架构，称为量子自注意力神经网络（QSANN），它可以弥补这些限制。具体来说，我们将自注意力机制引入量子神经网络，然后利用高斯投影量子自注意力作为自注意力的合理量子版本。因此，QSANN 在更大的数据集上是有效且可扩展的，并且具有可在近期量子设备上实现的理想特性。特别是，我们的 QSANN 在公共数据集上的文本分类任务的数值实验中优于基于句法分析的现有最好的 QNLP 模型以及简单的经典自注意力神经网络。我们进一步表明，我们的方法对低水平量子噪声表现出鲁棒性，并表现出对量子神经网络架构的弹性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种量子自注意力神经网络（QSANN），用于文本分类任务。
AI.motivation: 现有的量子自然语言处理（QNLP）方法依赖于语法分析，存在预处理复杂和架构依赖性强的局限性，难以应用于大规模和真实世界的数据集。
AI.method: 本文将自注意力机制引入量子神经网络，并采用高斯投影量子自注意力机制，构建了一种适用于近期量子设备的QSANN模型。
AI.result: QSANN在多个公开数据集上的文本分类任务中表现优于基于语法分析的QNLP模型和简单的经典自注意力神经网络，并且对低级量子噪声具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: QSANN提供了一种有效且可扩展的量子NLP方法，适用于大规模数据集，并在实际量子设备上具有可行性。

authors_text: Simon Jenni,Markus Woodson,Fabian Caba Heilbron
title: Video-ReTime: Learning Temporally Varying Speediness for Time Remapping
title_zh: Video-ReTime：学习时间重新映射的时间变化速度
comment: Accepted at the AI for Content Creation (AICC) workshop at CVPR 2022
comments: Accepted at the AI for Content Creation (AICC) workshop at CVPR 2022
abstract: We propose a method for generating a temporally remapped video that matches the desired target duration while maximally preserving natural video dynamics. Our approach trains a neural network through self-supervision to recognize and accurately localize temporally varying changes in the video playback speed. To re-time videos, we 1. use the model to infer the slowness of individual video frames, and 2. optimize the temporal frame sub-sampling to be consistent with the model's slowness predictions. We demonstrate that this model can detect playback speed variations more accurately while also being orders of magnitude more efficient than prior approaches. Furthermore, we propose an optimization for video re-timing that enables precise control over the target duration and performs more robustly on longer videos than prior methods. We evaluate the model quantitatively on artificially speed-up videos, through transfer to action recognition, and qualitatively through user studies.
summary: We propose a method for generating a temporally remapped video that matches the desired target duration while maximally preserving natural video dynamics. Our approach trains a neural network through self-supervision to recognize and accurately localize temporally varying changes in the video playback speed. To re-time videos, we 1. use the model to infer the slowness of individual video frames, and 2. optimize the temporal frame sub-sampling to be consistent with the model's slowness predictions. We demonstrate that this model can detect playback speed variations more accurately while also being orders of magnitude more efficient than prior approaches. Furthermore, we propose an optimization for video re-timing that enables precise control over the target duration and performs more robustly on longer videos than prior methods. We evaluate the model quantitatively on artificially speed-up videos, through transfer to action recognition, and qualitatively through user studies.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种生成时间重新映射视频的方法，该视频与所需的目标持续时间相匹配，同时最大限度地保留自然视频动态。我们的方法通过自我监督训练神经网络，以识别并准确定位视频播放速度随时间变化的变化。为了重新调整视频时间，我们 1. 使用模型来推断各个视频帧的慢度，2. 优化时间帧子采样以与模型的慢度预测保持一致。我们证明该模型可以更准确地检测播放速度变化，同时比以前的方法效率更高几个数量级。此外，我们提出了一种视频重新定时的优化，可以精确控制目标持续时间，并且比以前的方法在更长的视频上表现更稳健。我们通过转移到动作识别，在人为加速的视频上定量评估模型，并通过用户研究定性评估。

AI.tldr: 提出一种生成符合目标时长且保持自然动态的视频时间重映射方法
AI.motivation: 解决现有视频变速方法在速度变化检测精度与计算效率之间的矛盾，提升长视频处理的鲁棒性
AI.method: 通过自监督学习训练神经网络识别帧级速度变化，结合模型预测结果优化时间子采样策略
AI.result: 相较传统方法精度提升数量级，长视频处理稳定性显著增强，通过定量评估与用户研究验证有效性
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持视频动态特性的同时实现了高效精准的时间重映射，为视频编辑提供新解决方案

search_text: Video-ReTime: Learning Temporally Varying Speediness for Time Remapping Video-ReTime：学习时间重新映射的时间变化速度 We propose a method for generating a temporally remapped video that matches the desired target duration while maximally preserving natural video dynamics. Our approach trains a neural network through self-supervision to recognize and accurately localize temporally varying changes in the video playback speed. To re-time videos, we 1. use the model to infer the slowness of individual video frames, and 2. optimize the temporal frame sub-sampling to be consistent with the model's slowness predictions. We demonstrate that this model can detect playback speed variations more accurately while also being orders of magnitude more efficient than prior approaches. Furthermore, we propose an optimization for video re-timing that enables precise control over the target duration and performs more robustly on longer videos than prior methods. We evaluate the model quantitatively on artificially speed-up videos, through transfer to action recognition, and qualitatively through user studies. 我们提出了一种生成时间重新映射视频的方法，该视频与所需的目标持续时间相匹配，同时最大限度地保留自然视频动态。我们的方法通过自我监督训练神经网络，以识别并准确定位视频播放速度随时间变化的变化。为了重新调整视频时间，我们 1. 使用模型来推断各个视频帧的慢度，2. 优化时间帧子采样以与模型的慢度预测保持一致。我们证明该模型可以更准确地检测播放速度变化，同时比以前的方法效率更高几个数量级。此外，我们提出了一种视频重新定时的优化，可以精确控制目标持续时间，并且比以前的方法在更长的视频上表现更稳健。我们通过转移到动作识别，在人为加速的视频上定量评估模型，并通过用户研究定性评估。 提出一种生成符合目标时长且保持自然动态的视频时间重映射方法 Simon Jenni,Markus Woodson,Fabian Caba Heilbron cs.CV

authors_text: Kai Wei,Dillon Knox,Martin Radfar,Thanh Tran,Markus Muller,Grant P. Strimel,Nathan Susanj,Athanasios Mouchtaris,Maurizio Omologo
title: A neural prosody encoder for end-ro-end dialogue act classification
title_zh: 用于端到端对话行为分类的神经韵律编码器
abstract: Dialogue act classification (DAC) is a critical task for spoken language understanding in dialogue systems. Prosodic features such as energy and pitch have been shown to be useful for DAC. Despite their importance, little research has explored neural approaches to integrate prosodic features into end-to-end (E2E) DAC models which infer dialogue acts directly from audio signals. In this work, we propose an E2E neural architecture that takes into account the need for characterizing prosodic phenomena co-occurring at different levels inside an utterance. A novel part of this architecture is a learnable gating mechanism that assesses the importance of prosodic features and selectively retains core information necessary for E2E DAC. Our proposed model improves DAC accuracy by 1.07% absolute across three publicly available benchmark datasets.
summary: Dialogue act classification (DAC) is a critical task for spoken language understanding in dialogue systems. Prosodic features such as energy and pitch have been shown to be useful for DAC. Despite their importance, little research has explored neural approaches to integrate prosodic features into end-to-end (E2E) DAC models which infer dialogue acts directly from audio signals. In this work, we propose an E2E neural architecture that takes into account the need for characterizing prosodic phenomena co-occurring at different levels inside an utterance. A novel part of this architecture is a learnable gating mechanism that assesses the importance of prosodic features and selectively retains core information necessary for E2E DAC. Our proposed model improves DAC accuracy by 1.07% absolute across three publicly available benchmark datasets.
abstract_zh: 对话行为分类（DAC）是对话系统中口语理解的一项关键任务。能量和音调等韵律特征已被证明对 DAC 非常有用。尽管韵律特征很重要，但很少有研究探索将韵律特征集成到端到端 (E2E) DAC 模型中的神经方法，该模型直接从音频信号推断对话行为。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种端到端神经架构，该架构考虑到表征话语内不同级别同时发生的韵律现象的需要。该架构的一个新颖部分是可学习的门控机制，它评估韵律特征的重要性并选择性地保留 E2E DAC 所需的核心信息。我们提出的模型将三个公开可用的基准数据集的 DAC 准确度绝对提高了 1.07%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种端到端神经韵律编码器，用于提升对话行为分类的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究较少探索将韵律特征有效整合到端到端对话行为分类模型中，而韵律特征对分类任务至关重要。
AI.method: 设计包含可学习门控机制的神经网络架构，动态评估韵律特征重要性并选择性保留关键信息。
AI.result: 在三个公开数据集上实现1.07%的绝对准确率提升。
AI.conclusion: 该模型通过有效建模多层级韵律特征，验证了神经韵律编码器在端到端对话行为分类中的有效性。

authors_text: Zhiyuan Zhou,Cameron Allen,Kavosh Asadi,George Konidaris
title: Characterizing the Action-Generalization Gap in Deep Q-Learning
title_zh: 表征深度 Q 学习中的动作泛化差距
comment: To appear at the 5th Multidisciplinary Conference on Reinforcement Learning and Decision Making (RLDM2022)
comments: To appear at the 5th Multidisciplinary Conference on Reinforcement Learning and Decision Making (RLDM2022)
abstract: We study the action generalization ability of deep Q-learning in discrete action spaces. Generalization is crucial for efficient reinforcement learning (RL) because it allows agents to use knowledge learned from past experiences on new tasks. But while function approximation provides deep RL agents with a natural way to generalize over state inputs, the same generalization mechanism does not apply to discrete action outputs. And yet, surprisingly, our experiments indicate that Deep Q-Networks (DQN), which use exactly this type of function approximator, are still able to achieve modest action generalization. Our main contribution is twofold: first, we propose a method of evaluating action generalization using expert knowledge of action similarity, and empirically confirm that action generalization leads to faster learning; second, we characterize the action-generalization gap (the difference in learning performance between DQN and the expert) in different domains. We find that DQN can indeed generalize over actions in several simple domains, but that its ability to do so decreases as the action space grows larger.
summary: We study the action generalization ability of deep Q-learning in discrete action spaces. Generalization is crucial for efficient reinforcement learning (RL) because it allows agents to use knowledge learned from past experiences on new tasks. But while function approximation provides deep RL agents with a natural way to generalize over state inputs, the same generalization mechanism does not apply to discrete action outputs. And yet, surprisingly, our experiments indicate that Deep Q-Networks (DQN), which use exactly this type of function approximator, are still able to achieve modest action generalization. Our main contribution is twofold: first, we propose a method of evaluating action generalization using expert knowledge of action similarity, and empirically confirm that action generalization leads to faster learning; second, we characterize the action-generalization gap (the difference in learning performance between DQN and the expert) in different domains. We find that DQN can indeed generalize over actions in several simple domains, but that its ability to do so decreases as the action space grows larger.
abstract_zh: 我们研究离散动作空间中深度 Q 学习的动作泛化能力。泛化对于高效的强化学习（RL）至关重要，因为它允许代理在新任务中使用从过去经验中学到的知识。但是，虽然函数逼近为深度 RL 代理提供了一种自然的方式来泛化状态输入，但相同的泛化机制并不适用于离散动作输出。然而，令人惊讶的是，我们的实验表明，正是使用这种类型的函数逼近器的深度 Q 网络（DQN）仍然能够实现适度的动作泛化。我们的主要贡献有两个：首先，我们提出了一种使用动作相似性的专家知识来评估动作泛化的方法，并凭经验证实动作泛化可以带来更快的学习；其次，我们描述了不同领域的动作泛化差距（DQN 和专家之间学习性能的差异）。我们发现 DQN 确实可以泛化几个简单域中的动作，但随着动作空间变大，它的能力会下降。

AI.tldr: 研究深度Q学习在离散动作空间中的动作泛化能力，并分析其与专家之间的泛化差距。
AI.motivation: 泛化对强化学习效率至关重要，但现有方法在动作输出泛化上存在不足，需评估DQN的泛化能力及差距。
AI.method: 提出基于专家动作相似性知识的评估方法，通过实验验证动作泛化对学习速度的影响，并在不同领域对比DQN与专家的性能差距。
AI.result: 实验显示DQN在简单领域具有动作泛化能力，但随着动作空间扩大，其泛化能力显著下降。
AI.conclusion: DQN存在动作泛化差距，且该差距随动作空间复杂度增加而扩大，需进一步研究提升动作泛化能力的方法。

authors_text: Sean C. Epstein,Timothy J. P. Bray,Margaret Hall-Craggs,Hui Zhang
title: Choice of training label matters: how to best use deep learning for quantitative MRI parameter estimation
title_zh: 训练标签的选择很重要：如何最好地利用深度学习进行定量 MRI 参数估计
comment: Accepted for publication at the Journal of Machine Learning for Biomedical Imaging (MELBA) https://melba-journal.org/2024:002
comments: Accepted for publication at the Journal of Machine Learning for Biomedical Imaging (MELBA) https://melba-journal.org/2024:002
abstract: Deep learning (DL) is gaining popularity as a parameter estimation method for quantitative MRI. A range of competing implementations have been proposed, relying on either supervised or self-supervised learning. Self-supervised approaches, sometimes referred to as unsupervised, have been loosely based on auto-encoders, whereas supervised methods have, to date, been trained on groundtruth labels. These two learning paradigms have been shown to have distinct strengths. Notably, self-supervised approaches have offered lower-bias parameter estimates than their supervised alternatives. This result is counterintuitive - incorporating prior knowledge with supervised labels should, in theory, lead to improved accuracy. In this work, we show that this apparent limitation of supervised approaches stems from the naive choice of groundtruth training labels. By training on labels which are deliberately not groundtruth, we show that the low-bias parameter estimation previously associated with self-supervised methods can be replicated - and improved on - within a supervised learning framework. This approach sets the stage for a single, unifying, deep learning parameter estimation framework, based on supervised learning, where trade-offs between bias and variance are made by careful adjustment of training label.
summary: Deep learning (DL) is gaining popularity as a parameter estimation method for quantitative MRI. A range of competing implementations have been proposed, relying on either supervised or self-supervised learning. Self-supervised approaches, sometimes referred to as unsupervised, have been loosely based on auto-encoders, whereas supervised methods have, to date, been trained on groundtruth labels. These two learning paradigms have been shown to have distinct strengths. Notably, self-supervised approaches have offered lower-bias parameter estimates than their supervised alternatives. This result is counterintuitive - incorporating prior knowledge with supervised labels should, in theory, lead to improved accuracy. In this work, we show that this apparent limitation of supervised approaches stems from the naive choice of groundtruth training labels. By training on labels which are deliberately not groundtruth, we show that the low-bias parameter estimation previously associated with self-supervised methods can be replicated - and improved on - within a supervised learning framework. This approach sets the stage for a single, unifying, deep learning parameter estimation framework, based on supervised learning, where trade-offs between bias and variance are made by careful adjustment of training label.
abstract_zh: 深度学习 (DL) 作为定量 MRI 的参数估计方法越来越受欢迎。人们已经提出了一系列相互竞争的实施方案，这些实施方案依赖于监督学习或自监督学习。自监督方法（有时称为无监督方法）松散地基于自动编码器，而迄今为止，监督方法是在真实标签上进行训练的。这两种学习范式已被证明具有独特的优势。值得注意的是，自监督方法提供的参数估计偏差低于监督方法。这个结果是违反直觉的——理论上，将先验知识与监督标签相结合应该会提高准确性。在这项工作中，我们表明监督方法的这种明显局限性源于对真实训练标签的天真选择。通过对故意非事实的标签进行训练，我们表明，先前与自监督方法相关的低偏差参数估计可以在监督学习框架内复制并改进。这种方法为基于监督学习的单一、统一的深度学习参数估计框架奠定了基础，其中通过仔细调整训练标签来在偏差和方差之间进行权衡。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在定量MRI参数估计中，使用深度学习方法时训练标签选择的重要性，并提出了一种改进的监督学习框架。
AI.motivation: 尽管自监督方法在参数估计中表现出较低的偏差，但监督方法因使用真实标签而被认为具有更高的准确性。然而，监督方法的性能受限于训练标签的选择，这促使作者研究如何通过改进标签选择来提升监督方法的效果。
AI.method: 作者通过使用非真实标签进行训练，展示了监督学习框架可以复制甚至超越自监督方法的低偏差估计，并提出了一个统一的监督学习框架，通过调整训练标签来平衡偏差和方差。
AI.result: 实验表明，通过选择非真实标签进行训练，监督方法可以实现与自监督方法相当甚至更优的低偏差估计，从而证明了监督方法在标签选择优化后具有更大的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 本文表明，监督学习方法在参数估计中的性能可以通过优化训练标签选择得到显著提升，从而为统一的深度学习参数估计框架奠定了基础。
