search_text: Choice of training label matters: how to best use deep learning for quantitative MRI parameter estimation 训练标签的选择很重要：如何最好地利用深度学习进行定量 MRI 参数估计 Deep learning (DL) is gaining popularity as a parameter estimation method for quantitative MRI. A range of competing implementations have been proposed, relying on either supervised or self-supervised learning. Self-supervised approaches, sometimes referred to as unsupervised, have been loosely based on auto-encoders, whereas supervised methods have, to date, been trained on groundtruth labels. These two learning paradigms have been shown to have distinct strengths. Notably, self-supervised approaches have offered lower-bias parameter estimates than their supervised alternatives. This result is counterintuitive - incorporating prior knowledge with supervised labels should, in theory, lead to improved accuracy. In this work, we show that this apparent limitation of supervised approaches stems from the naive choice of groundtruth training labels. By training on labels which are deliberately not groundtruth, we show that the low-bias parameter estimation previously associated with self-supervised methods can be replicated - and improved on - within a supervised learning framework. This approach sets the stage for a single, unifying, deep learning parameter estimation framework, based on supervised learning, where trade-offs between bias and variance are made by careful adjustment of training label. 深度学习 (DL) 作为定量 MRI 的参数估计方法越来越受欢迎。人们已经提出了一系列相互竞争的实施方案，这些实施方案依赖于监督学习或自监督学习。自监督方法（有时称为无监督方法）松散地基于自动编码器，而迄今为止，监督方法是在真实标签上进行训练的。这两种学习范式已被证明具有独特的优势。值得注意的是，自监督方法提供的参数估计偏差低于监督方法。这个结果是违反直觉的——理论上，将先验知识与监督标签相结合应该会提高准确性。在这项工作中，我们表明监督方法的这种明显局限性源于对真实训练标签的天真选择。通过对故意非事实的标签进行训练，我们表明，先前与自监督方法相关的低偏差参数估计可以在监督学习框架内复制并改进。这种方法为基于监督学习的单一、统一的深度学习参数估计框架奠定了基础，其中通过仔细调整训练标签来在偏差和方差之间进行权衡。 本文探讨了在定量MRI参数估计中，使用深度学习方法时训练标签选择的重要性，并提出了一种改进的监督学习框架。 Sean C. Epstein,Timothy J. P. Bray,Margaret Hall-Craggs,Hui Zhang physics.med-ph,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Otavio Braga,Takaki Makino,Olivier Siohan,Hank Liao
title: End-to-End Multi-Person Audio/Visual Automatic Speech Recognition
title_zh: 端到端多人音频/视觉自动语音识别
abstract: Traditionally, audio-visual automatic speech recognition has been studied under the assumption that the speaking face on the visual signal is the face matching the audio. However, in a more realistic setting, when multiple faces are potentially on screen one needs to decide which face to feed to the A/V ASR system. The present work takes the recent progress of A/V ASR one step further and considers the scenario where multiple people are simultaneously on screen (multi-person A/V ASR). We propose a fully differentiable A/V ASR model that is able to handle multiple face tracks in a video. Instead of relying on two separate models for speaker face selection and audio-visual ASR on a single face track, we introduce an attention layer to the ASR encoder that is able to soft-select the appropriate face video track. Experiments carried out on an A/V system trained on over 30k hours of YouTube videos illustrate that the proposed approach can automatically select the proper face tracks with minor WER degradation compared to an oracle selection of the speaking face while still showing benefits of employing the visual signal instead of the audio alone.
summary: Traditionally, audio-visual automatic speech recognition has been studied under the assumption that the speaking face on the visual signal is the face matching the audio. However, in a more realistic setting, when multiple faces are potentially on screen one needs to decide which face to feed to the A/V ASR system. The present work takes the recent progress of A/V ASR one step further and considers the scenario where multiple people are simultaneously on screen (multi-person A/V ASR). We propose a fully differentiable A/V ASR model that is able to handle multiple face tracks in a video. Instead of relying on two separate models for speaker face selection and audio-visual ASR on a single face track, we introduce an attention layer to the ASR encoder that is able to soft-select the appropriate face video track. Experiments carried out on an A/V system trained on over 30k hours of YouTube videos illustrate that the proposed approach can automatically select the proper face tracks with minor WER degradation compared to an oracle selection of the speaking face while still showing benefits of employing the visual signal instead of the audio alone.
abstract_zh: 传统上，视听自动语音识别是在视觉信号上说话的脸部是与音频匹配的脸部的假设下进行研究的。然而，在更现实的环境中，当屏幕上可能出现多个面孔时，需要决定将哪一张面孔输入到 A/V ASR 系统。目前的工作使 A/V ASR 的最新进展更进一步，并考虑了多人同时出现在屏幕上的场景（多人 A/V ASR）。我们提出了一种完全可微的 A/V ASR 模型，能够处理视频中的多个面部轨迹。我们不再依赖两个单独的模型来在单个面部轨道上进行说话者面部选择和视听 ASR，而是向 ASR 编码器引入一个注意力层，能够软选择适当的面部视频轨道。在经过超过 30k 小时的 YouTube 视频训练的 A/V 系统上进行的实验表明，所提出的方法可以自动选择正确的面部轨迹，与说话面部的预言机选择相比，WER 降级较小，同时仍然显示出使用视觉信号而不是单独使用音频的好处。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种端到端的多人物视听自动语音识别模型，解决多人同时出现在视频中时如何自动选择合适人脸进行语音识别的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统视听语音识别假设视频中人脸与音频匹配，但现实场景中常有多人同时出现，需自动选择正确人脸以提高识别准确性。
AI.method: 设计一个全可微分的ASR模型，在编码器中引入注意力机制，通过软选择策略自动匹配视频中多个人脸轨迹与音频信号。
AI.result: 在3万小时YouTube视频训练的系统中，该方法能自动选择正确人脸，词错误率仅轻微下降，且优于单纯使用音频的识别效果。
AI.conclusion: 提出的端到端模型有效解决了多人物场景下的视听对齐问题，验证了结合视觉信息与注意力机制的优越性。

authors_text: Shuzhi Yu,Guanhang Wu,Chunhui Gu,Mohammed E. Fathy
title: TDT: Teaching Detectors to Track without Fully Annotated Videos
title_zh: TDT：教探测器在没有完全注释的视频的情况下进行跟踪
comment: Workshop on Learning with Limited Labelled Data for Image and Video Understanding (L3D-IVU), CVPR2022 Workshop
comments: Workshop on Learning with Limited Labelled Data for Image and Video Understanding (L3D-IVU), CVPR2022 Workshop
abstract: Recently, one-stage trackers that use a joint model to predict both detections and appearance embeddings in one forward pass received much attention and achieved state-of-the-art results on the Multi-Object Tracking (MOT) benchmarks. However, their success depends on the availability of videos that are fully annotated with tracking data, which is expensive and hard to obtain. This can limit the model generalization. In comparison, the two-stage approach, which performs detection and embedding separately, is slower but easier to train as their data are easier to annotate. We propose to combine the best of the two worlds through a data distillation approach. Specifically, we use a teacher embedder, trained on Re-ID datasets, to generate pseudo appearance embedding labels for the detection datasets. Then, we use the augmented dataset to train a detector that is also capable of regressing these pseudo-embeddings in a fully-convolutional fashion. Our proposed one-stage solution matches the two-stage counterpart in quality but is 3 times faster. Even though the teacher embedder has not seen any tracking data during training, our proposed tracker achieves competitive performance with some popular trackers (e.g. JDE) trained with fully labeled tracking data.
summary: Recently, one-stage trackers that use a joint model to predict both detections and appearance embeddings in one forward pass received much attention and achieved state-of-the-art results on the Multi-Object Tracking (MOT) benchmarks. However, their success depends on the availability of videos that are fully annotated with tracking data, which is expensive and hard to obtain. This can limit the model generalization. In comparison, the two-stage approach, which performs detection and embedding separately, is slower but easier to train as their data are easier to annotate. We propose to combine the best of the two worlds through a data distillation approach. Specifically, we use a teacher embedder, trained on Re-ID datasets, to generate pseudo appearance embedding labels for the detection datasets. Then, we use the augmented dataset to train a detector that is also capable of regressing these pseudo-embeddings in a fully-convolutional fashion. Our proposed one-stage solution matches the two-stage counterpart in quality but is 3 times faster. Even though the teacher embedder has not seen any tracking data during training, our proposed tracker achieves competitive performance with some popular trackers (e.g. JDE) trained with fully labeled tracking data.
abstract_zh: 最近，使用联合模型在一次前向传递中预测检测和外观嵌入的单级跟踪器受到了广泛关注，并在多对象跟踪（MOT）基准上取得了最先进的结果。然而，他们的成功取决于是否有带有跟踪数据的完整注释的视频，而这是昂贵且难以获得的。这会限制模型的泛化。相比之下，分别执行检测和嵌入的两阶段方法速度较慢，但​​更容易训练，因为它们的数据更容易注释。我们建议通过数据蒸馏方法将两个世界的优点结合起来。具体来说，我们使用在 Re-ID 数据集上训练的教师嵌入器来为检测数据集生成伪外观嵌入标签。然后，我们使用增强数据集来训练检测器，该检测器也能够以全卷积方式回归这些伪嵌入。我们提出的一级解决方案在质量上与两级解决方案相当，但速度快了 3 倍。尽管教师嵌入器在训练期间没有看到任何跟踪数据，但我们提出的跟踪器与使用完全标记的跟踪数据训练的一些流行跟踪器（例如 JDE）相比，实现了具有竞争力的性能。

AI.tldr: 提出一种无需完全标注视频数据的一阶段跟踪方法，通过数据蒸馏结合检测和嵌入学习。
AI.motivation: 当前一阶段跟踪器依赖昂贵的全标注视频数据，而两阶段方法虽易训练但速度慢，需平衡效率与标注成本。
AI.method: 利用Re-ID数据集预训练的教师模型生成伪嵌入标签，结合检测数据集训练一阶段模型，实现检测与嵌入回归的联合优化。
AI.result: 方法在质量上与两阶段模型相当但快3倍，且在无跟踪数据训练下性能接近JDE等全标注模型。
AI.conclusion: 通过数据蒸馏可有效减少对全标注视频的依赖，在保持性能的同时显著提升跟踪速度。

search_text: TDT: Teaching Detectors to Track without Fully Annotated Videos TDT：教探测器在没有完全注释的视频的情况下进行跟踪 Recently, one-stage trackers that use a joint model to predict both detections and appearance embeddings in one forward pass received much attention and achieved state-of-the-art results on the Multi-Object Tracking (MOT) benchmarks. However, their success depends on the availability of videos that are fully annotated with tracking data, which is expensive and hard to obtain. This can limit the model generalization. In comparison, the two-stage approach, which performs detection and embedding separately, is slower but easier to train as their data are easier to annotate. We propose to combine the best of the two worlds through a data distillation approach. Specifically, we use a teacher embedder, trained on Re-ID datasets, to generate pseudo appearance embedding labels for the detection datasets. Then, we use the augmented dataset to train a detector that is also capable of regressing these pseudo-embeddings in a fully-convolutional fashion. Our proposed one-stage solution matches the two-stage counterpart in quality but is 3 times faster. Even though the teacher embedder has not seen any tracking data during training, our proposed tracker achieves competitive performance with some popular trackers (e.g. JDE) trained with fully labeled tracking data. 最近，使用联合模型在一次前向传递中预测检测和外观嵌入的单级跟踪器受到了广泛关注，并在多对象跟踪（MOT）基准上取得了最先进的结果。然而，他们的成功取决于是否有带有跟踪数据的完整注释的视频，而这是昂贵且难以获得的。这会限制模型的泛化。相比之下，分别执行检测和嵌入的两阶段方法速度较慢，但​​更容易训练，因为它们的数据更容易注释。我们建议通过数据蒸馏方法将两个世界的优点结合起来。具体来说，我们使用在 Re-ID 数据集上训练的教师嵌入器来为检测数据集生成伪外观嵌入标签。然后，我们使用增强数据集来训练检测器，该检测器也能够以全卷积方式回归这些伪嵌入。我们提出的一级解决方案在质量上与两级解决方案相当，但速度快了 3 倍。尽管教师嵌入器在训练期间没有看到任何跟踪数据，但我们提出的跟踪器与使用完全标记的跟踪数据训练的一些流行跟踪器（例如 JDE）相比，实现了具有竞争力的性能。 提出一种无需完全标注视频数据的一阶段跟踪方法，通过数据蒸馏结合检测和嵌入学习。 Shuzhi Yu,Guanhang Wu,Chunhui Gu,Mohammed E. authors_text: Yang Xiang,Jesper Lisby Højvang,Morten Højfeldt Rasmussen,Mads Græsbøll Christensen
title: A deep representation learning speech enhancement method using $β$-VAE
title_zh: 使用$β$-VAE的深度表示学习语音增强方法
comment: Submitted to Eurosipco
comments: Submitted to Eurosipco
abstract: In previous work, we proposed a variational autoencoder-based (VAE) Bayesian permutation training speech enhancement (SE) method (PVAE) which indicated that the SE performance of the traditional deep neural network-based (DNN) method could be improved by deep representation learning (DRL). Based on our previous work, we in this paper propose to use $β$-VAE to further improve PVAE's ability of representation learning. More specifically, our $β$-VAE can improve PVAE's capacity of disentangling different latent variables from the observed signal without the trade-off problem between disentanglement and signal reconstruction. This trade-off problem widely exists in previous $β$-VAE algorithms. Unlike the previous $β$-VAE algorithms, the proposed $β$-VAE strategy can also be used to optimize the DNN's structure. This means that the proposed method can not only improve PVAE's SE performance but also reduce the number of PVAE training parameters. The experimental results show that the proposed method can acquire better speech and noise latent representation than PVAE. Meanwhile, it also obtains a higher scale-invariant signal-to-distortion ratio, speech quality, and speech intelligibility.
summary: In previous work, we proposed a variational autoencoder-based (VAE) Bayesian permutation training speech enhancement (SE) method (PVAE) which indicated that the SE performance of the traditional deep neural network-based (DNN) method could be improved by deep representation learning (DRL). Based on our previous work, we in this paper propose to use $β$-VAE to further improve PVAE's ability of representation learning. More specifically, our $β$-VAE can improve PVAE's capacity of disentangling different latent variables from the observed signal without the trade-off problem between disentanglement and signal reconstruction. This trade-off problem widely exists in previous $β$-VAE algorithms. Unlike the previous $β$-VAE algorithms, the proposed $β$-VAE strategy can also be used to optimize the DNN's structure. This means that the proposed method can not only improve PVAE's SE performance but also reduce the number of PVAE training parameters. The experimental results show that the proposed method can acquire better speech and noise latent representation than PVAE. Meanwhile, it also obtains a higher scale-invariant signal-to-distortion ratio, speech quality, and speech intelligibility.
abstract_zh: 在之前的工作中，我们提出了一种基于变分自动编码器（VAE）的贝叶斯排列训练语音增强（SE）方法（PVAE），这表明传统的基于深度神经网络（DNN）方法的SE性能可以通过深度表示学习（DRL）来提高。基于我们之前的工作，我们在本文中提出使用$β$-VAE来进一步提高PVAE的表示学习能力。更具体地说，我们的 $β$-VAE 可以提高 PVAE 从观察到的信号中解开不同潜在变量的能力，而不存在解开和信号重建之间的权衡问题。这种权衡问题在之前的$β$-VAE算法中广泛存在。与之前的$β$-VAE算法不同，所提出的$β$-VAE策略也可用于优化DNN的结构。这意味着所提出的方法不仅可以提高PVAE的SE性能，而且可以减少PVAE训练参数的数量。实验结果表明，该方法比PVAE能够获得更好的语音和噪声潜在表示。同时，还获得了较高的尺度不变信号失真比、语音质量和语音清晰度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于β-VAE的深度表示学习语音增强方法，旨在解决传统方法在解耦潜在变量与信号重建之间的权衡问题。
AI.motivation: 传统PVAE方法在解耦潜在变量与信号重建之间存在权衡问题，且无法优化DNN结构，限制了语音增强性能的进一步提升。
AI.method: 通过改进β-VAE策略，增强PVAE的表示学习能力，实现潜在变量的解耦而不牺牲重建质量，并优化DNN结构以减少训练参数。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在语音和噪声潜在表示、尺度不变信噪比（SI-SDR）、语音质量和可懂度方面均优于PVAE。
AI.conclusion: β-VAE策略有效提升了语音增强性能与效率，为深度表示学习在语音处理中的应用提供了新方向。

authors_text: Vedant Kalbag,Alexander Lerch
title: Scream Detection in Heavy Metal Music
title_zh: 重金属音乐中的尖叫检测
abstract: Harsh vocal effects such as screams or growls are far more common in heavy metal vocals than the traditionally sung vocal. This paper explores the problem of detection and classification of extreme vocal techniques in heavy metal music, specifically the identification of different scream techniques. We investigate the suitability of various feature representations, including cepstral, spectral, and temporal features as input representations for classification. The main contributions of this work are (i) a manually annotated dataset comprised of over 280 minutes of heavy metal songs of various genres with a statistical analysis of occurrences of different extreme vocal techniques in heavy metal music, and (ii) a systematic study of different input feature representations for the classification of heavy metal vocals
summary: Harsh vocal effects such as screams or growls are far more common in heavy metal vocals than the traditionally sung vocal. This paper explores the problem of detection and classification of extreme vocal techniques in heavy metal music, specifically the identification of different scream techniques. We investigate the suitability of various feature representations, including cepstral, spectral, and temporal features as input representations for classification. The main contributions of this work are (i) a manually annotated dataset comprised of over 280 minutes of heavy metal songs of various genres with a statistical analysis of occurrences of different extreme vocal techniques in heavy metal music, and (ii) a systematic study of different input feature representations for the classification of heavy metal vocals
abstract_zh: 尖叫或咆哮等刺耳的声音效果在重金属声音中比传统演唱的声音更为常见。本文探讨了重金属音乐中极端发声技术的检测和分类问题，特别是不同尖叫技术的识别。我们研究了各种特征表示的适用性，包括倒谱、光谱和时间特征作为分类的输入表示。这项工作的主要贡献是（i）由超过 280 分钟的各种流派重金属歌曲组成的手动注释数据集，并对重金属音乐中不同极端声乐技术的出现进行统计分析，以及（ii）对重金属声乐分类的不同输入特征表示进行系统研究

AI.tldr: 本文主要研究重金属音乐中极端声乐技巧（尤其是尖叫技术）的检测与分类方法。
AI.motivation: 传统演唱在重金属音乐中较少见，而极端声乐技巧（如尖叫、咆哮）更普遍，但现有研究缺乏对这些技巧的系统分析和有效分类方法，因此需要构建数据集并探索特征表示方法。
AI.method: 采用倒谱、频谱及时域特征作为输入表示，进行分类模型的训练与比较。
AI.result: 构建了包含280分钟重金属歌曲的手动标注数据集，并分析了不同声乐技巧的出现统计；系统评估了多种特征表示方法在分类任务中的效果。
AI.conclusion: 本研究通过构建数据集和特征分析，为重金属音乐中极端声乐技巧的检测与分类提供了基础，有助于推动相关领域的研究与应用。

motivation: 传统演唱在重金属音乐中较少见，而极端声乐技巧（如尖叫、咆哮）更普遍，但现有研究缺乏对这些技巧的系统分析和有效分类方法，因此需要构建数据集并探索特征表示方法。
method: 采用倒谱、频谱及时域特征作为输入表示，进行分类模型的训练与比较。
result: 构建了包含280分钟重金属歌曲的手动标注数据集，并分析了不同声乐技巧的出现统计；系统评估了多种特征表示方法在分类任务中的效果。
conclusion: 本研究通过构建数据集和特征分析，为重金属音乐中极端声乐技巧的检测与分类提供了基础，有助于推动相关领域的研究与应用。
search_text: Scream Detection in Heavy Metal Music 重金属音乐中的尖叫检测 Harsh vocal effects such as screams or growls are far more common in heavy metal vocals than the traditionally sung vocal. This paper explores the problem of detection and classification of extreme vocal techniques in heavy metal music, specifically the identification of different scream techniques. We investigate the suitability of various feature representations, including cepstral, spectral, and temporal features as input representations for classification. The main contributions of this work are (i) a manually annotated dataset comprised of over 280 minutes of heavy metal songs of various genres with a statistical analysis of occurrences of different extreme vocal techniques in heavy metal music, and (ii) a systematic study of different input feature representations for the classification of heavy metal vocals 尖叫或咆哮等刺耳的声音效果在重金属声音中比传统演唱的声音更为常见。本文探讨了重金属音乐中极端发声技术的检测和分类问题，特别是不同尖叫技术的识别。我们研究了各种特征表示的适用性，包括倒谱、光谱和时间特征作为分类的输入表示。这项工作的主要贡献是（i）由超过 280 分钟的各种流派重金属歌曲组成的手动注释数据集，并对重金属音乐中不同极端声乐技术的出现进行统计分析，以及（ii）对重金属声乐分类的不同输入特征表示进行系统研究 本文主要研究重金属音乐中极端声乐技巧（尤其是尖叫技术）的检测与分类方法。 Vedant Kalbag,Alexander Lerch cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Erik Wallin,Lennart Svensson,Fredrik Kahl,Lars Hammarstrand
title: DoubleMatch: Improving Semi-Supervised Learning with Self-Supervision
title_zh: DoubleMatch：通过自我监督改进半监督学习
comment: ICPR2022
comments: ICPR2022
abstract: Following the success of supervised learning, semi-supervised learning (SSL) is now becoming increasingly popular. SSL is a family of methods, which in addition to a labeled training set, also use a sizable collection of unlabeled data for fitting a model. Most of the recent successful SSL methods are based on pseudo-labeling approaches: letting confident model predictions act as training labels. While these methods have shown impressive results on many benchmark datasets, a drawback of this approach is that not all unlabeled data are used during training. We propose a new SSL algorithm, DoubleMatch, which combines the pseudo-labeling technique with a self-supervised loss, enabling the model to utilize all unlabeled data in the training process. We show that this method achieves state-of-the-art accuracies on multiple benchmark datasets while also reducing training times compared to existing SSL methods. Code is available at https://github.com/walline/doublematch.
summary: Following the success of supervised learning, semi-supervised learning (SSL) is now becoming increasingly popular. SSL is a family of methods, which in addition to a labeled training set, also use a sizable collection of unlabeled data for fitting a model. Most of the recent successful SSL methods are based on pseudo-labeling approaches: letting confident model predictions act as training labels. While these methods have shown impressive results on many benchmark datasets, a drawback of this approach is that not all unlabeled data are used during training. We propose a new SSL algorithm, DoubleMatch, which combines the pseudo-labeling technique with a self-supervised loss, enabling the model to utilize all unlabeled data in the training process. We show that this method achieves state-of-the-art accuracies on multiple benchmark datasets while also reducing training times compared to existing SSL methods. Code is available at https://github.com/walline/doublematch.
abstract_zh: 随着监督学习的成功，半监督学习（SSL）现在变得越来越流行。 SSL 是一系列方法，除了标记的训练集之外，还使用大量未标记的数据来拟合模型。最近大多数成功的 SSL 方法都基于伪标签方法：让置信模型预测充当训练标签。虽然这些方法在许多基准数据集上显示出令人印象深刻的结果，但这种方法的缺点是训练期间并非使用所有未标记的数据。我们提出了一种新的 SSL 算法 DoubleMatch，它将伪标记技术与自监督损失相结合，使模型能够在训练过程中利用所有未标记的数据。我们证明，与现有的 SSL 方法相比，该方法在多个基准数据集上实现了最先进的精度，同时还减少了训练时间。代码可在 https://github.com/walline/doublematch 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DoubleMatch算法，通过结合伪标签与自监督学习提升半监督学习效果。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督学习方法未能充分利用未标记数据，导致模型性能受限。
AI.method: DoubleMatch将伪标签技术与自监督损失结合，使模型在训练中全面利用未标记数据。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上达到最先进准确率，并缩短了训练时间。
AI.conclusion: DoubleMatch通过整合两种学习方式有效提升了半监督学习的性能与效率。

authors_text: Kostiantyn Khabarlak
title: Face Detection on Mobile: Five Implementations and Analysis
title_zh: 移动端人脸检测：五种实现与分析
abstract: In many practical cases face detection on smartphones or other highly portable devices is a necessity. Applications include mobile face access control systems, driver status tracking, emotion recognition, etc. Mobile devices have limited processing power and should have long-enough battery life even with face detection application running. Thus, striking the right balance between algorithm quality and complexity is crucial. In this work we adapt 5 algorithms to mobile. These algorithms are based on handcrafted or neural-network-based features and include: Viola-Jones (Haar cascade), LBP, HOG, MTCNN, BlazeFace. We analyze inference time of these algorithms on different devices with different input image resolutions. We provide guidance, which algorithms are the best fit for mobile face access control systems and potentially other mobile applications. Interestingly, we note that cascaded algorithms perform faster on scenes without faces, while BlazeFace is slower on empty scenes. Exploiting this behavior might be useful in practice.
summary: In many practical cases face detection on smartphones or other highly portable devices is a necessity. Applications include mobile face access control systems, driver status tracking, emotion recognition, etc. Mobile devices have limited processing power and should have long-enough battery life even with face detection application running. Thus, striking the right balance between algorithm quality and complexity is crucial. In this work we adapt 5 algorithms to mobile. These algorithms are based on handcrafted or neural-network-based features and include: Viola-Jones (Haar cascade), LBP, HOG, MTCNN, BlazeFace. We analyze inference time of these algorithms on different devices with different input image resolutions. We provide guidance, which algorithms are the best fit for mobile face access control systems and potentially other mobile applications. Interestingly, we note that cascaded algorithms perform faster on scenes without faces, while BlazeFace is slower on empty scenes. Exploiting this behavior might be useful in practice.
abstract_zh: 在许多实际情况下，智能手机或其他高度便携的设备上的人脸检测是必要的。应用包括移动人脸访问控制系统、驾驶员状态跟踪、情绪识别等。移动设备的处理能力有限，即使运行人脸检测应用程序，也应该具有足够长的电池寿命。因此，在算法质量和复杂性之间取得适当的平衡至关重要。在这项工作中，我们将 5 种算法应用于移动设备。这些算法基于手工或基于神经网络的特征，包括：Viola-Jones（Haar 级联）、LBP、HOG、MTCNN、BlazeFace。我们分析了这些算法在具有不同输入图像分辨率的不同设备上的推理时间。我们提供指导，说明哪些算法最适合移动面部访问控制系统和其他潜在的移动应用程序。有趣的是，我们注意到级联算法在没有人脸的场景上执行速度更快，而 BlazeFace 在空场景上执行速度较慢。利用这种行为在实践中可能很有用。

AI.tldr: 本文在移动设备上实现并分析了五种人脸检测算法（Viola-Jones、LBP、HOG、MTCNN、BlazeFace），评估其在不同场景下的性能表现。
AI.motivation: 移动设备计算资源有限且需兼顾续航，需在算法精度与复杂度间取得平衡，因此需明确不同算法在移动端的实际适用性。
AI.method: 将基于手工特征（Haar、LBP、HOG）和神经网络（MTCNN、BlazeFace）的五种算法适配至移动设备，测试不同分辨率及设备下的推理时间并对比分析。
AI.result: 级联算法（如Viola-Jones）在无脸场景下推理更快，而BlazeFace在空场景下表现较差，不同算法在特定场景下存在性能差异。
AI.conclusion: 移动端人脸检测应根据实际需求选择算法：无脸场景优先级联算法，需高精度场景可选用神经网络模型，需权衡功耗与检测效率。

authors_text: Shaohua Gao,Kailun Yang,Hao Shi,Kaiwei Wang,Jian Bai
title: Review on Panoramic Imaging and Its Applications in Scene Understanding
title_zh: 全景成像及其在场景理解中的应用综述
comment: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Instrumentation and Measurement. 34 pages, 15 figures, 420 references
comments: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Instrumentation and Measurement. 34 pages, 15 figures, 420 references
abstract: With the rapid development of high-speed communication and artificial intelligence technologies, human perception of real-world scenes is no longer limited to the use of small Field of View (FoV) and low-dimensional scene detection devices. Panoramic imaging emerges as the next generation of innovative intelligent instruments for environmental perception and measurement. However, while satisfying the need for large-FoV photographic imaging, panoramic imaging instruments are expected to have high resolution, no blind area, miniaturization, and multidimensional intelligent perception, and can be combined with artificial intelligence methods towards the next generation of intelligent instruments, enabling deeper understanding and more holistic perception of 360-degree real-world surrounding environments. Fortunately, recent advances in freeform surfaces, thin-plate optics, and metasurfaces provide innovative approaches to address human perception of the environment, offering promising ideas beyond conventional optical imaging. In this review, we begin with introducing the basic principles of panoramic imaging systems, and then describe the architectures, features, and functions of various panoramic imaging systems. Afterwards, we discuss in detail the broad application prospects and great design potential of freeform surfaces, thin-plate optics, and metasurfaces in panoramic imaging. We then provide a detailed analysis on how these techniques can help enhance the performance of panoramic imaging systems. We further offer a detailed analysis of applications of panoramic imaging in scene understanding for autonomous driving and robotics, spanning panoramic semantic image segmentation, panoramic depth estimation, panoramic visual localization, and so on. Finally, we cast a perspective on future potential and research directions for panoramic imaging instruments.

We further offer a detailed analysis of applications of panoramic imaging in scene understanding for autonomous driving and robotics, spanning panoramic semantic image segmentation, panoramic depth estimation, panoramic visual localization, and so on. Finally, we cast a perspective on future potential and research directions for panoramic imaging instruments.
abstract_zh: 随着高速通信和人工智能技术的快速发展，人类对现实世界场景的感知不再局限于使用小视场（FoV）和低维场景检测设备。全景成像作为下一代环境感知和测量的创新智能仪器而出现。然而，全景成像仪器在满足大视场摄影成像需求的同时，有望实现高分辨率、无盲区、小型化、多维智能感知，并能与人工智能方法相结合，走向下一代智能仪器，实现对360度真实周围环境的更深入的理解和更全面的感知。幸运的是，自由曲面、薄板光学和超表面的最新进展提供了解决人类对环境感知的创新方法，提供了超越传统光学成像的有前途的想法。在这篇综述中，我们首先介绍全景成像系统的基本原理，然后描述各种全景成像系统的架构、特性和功能。随后，我们详细讨论了自由曲面、薄板光学和超表面在全景成像中的广阔应用前景和巨大的设计潜力。然后，我们详细分析这些技术如何帮助提高全景成像系统的性能。我们进一步详细分析了全景成像在自动驾驶和机器人场景理解中的应用，涵盖全景语义图像分割、全景深度估计、全景视觉定位等。最后，我们对全景成像仪器的未来潜力和研究方向进行了展望。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了全景成像系统的基本原理、技术架构及在场景理解中的应用，重点探讨了自由曲面、超薄平板光学和超表面等技术对全景成像性能的提升作用。
AI.motivation: 传统小视场成像设备难以满足环境感知需求，需通过全景成像实现大视场、高分辨率、无盲区的环境感知，并结合人工智能深化场景理解。
AI.method: 通过系统梳理全景成像技术的发展脉络，分析自由曲面、超薄平板光学和超表面等创新技术的原理与设计潜力，并结合自动驾驶与机器人领域的具体应用案例展开论证。
AI.result: 明确了新型光学技术对全景成像性能提升的关键作用，揭示了全景图像语义分割、深度估计和视觉定位等场景理解任务的技术实现路径。
AI.conclusion: 未来全景成像仪器需进一步融合人工智能与先进光学技术，突破微型化、多维感知等瓶颈，以推动智能系统对三维环境的全面认知能力提升。

search_text: Review on Panoramic Imaging and Its Applications in Scene Understanding 全景成像及其在场景理解中的应用综述 With the rapid development of high-speed communication and artificial intelligence technologies, human perception of real-world scenes is no longer limited to the use of small Field of View (FoV) and low-dimensional scene detection devices. Panoramic imaging emerges as the next generation of innovative intelligent instruments for environmental perception and measurement. However, while satisfying the need for large-FoV photographic imaging, panoramic imaging instruments are expected to have high resolution, no blind area, miniaturization, and multidimensional intelligent perception, and can be combined with artificial intelligence methods towards the next generation of intelligent instruments, enabling deeper understanding and more holistic perception of 360-degree real-world surrounding environments. Fortunately, recent advances in freeform surfaces, thin-plate optics, and metasurfaces provide innovative approaches to address human perception of the environment, offering promising ideas beyond conventional optical imaging. In this review, we begin with introducing the basic principles of panoramic imaging systems, and then describe the architectures, features, and functions of various panoramic imaging systems. Afterwards, we discuss in detail the broad application prospects and great design potential of freeform surfaces, thin-plate optics, and metasurfaces in panoramic imaging. We then provide a detailed analysis on how these techniques can help enhance the performance of panoramic imaging systems. We further offer a detailed analysis of applications of panoramic imaging in scene understanding for autonomous driving and robotics, spanning panoramic semantic image segmentation, panoramic depth estimation, panoramic visual localization, and so on. Finally, we cast a perspective on future potential and research directions for panoramic imaging instruments. 随着高速通信和人工智能技术的快速发展，人类对现实世界场景的感知不再局限于使用小视场（FoV）和低维场景检测设备。全景成像作为下一代环境感知和测量的创新智能仪器而出现。然而，全景成像仪器在满足大视场摄影成像需求的同时，有望实现高分辨率、无盲区、小型化、多维智能感知，并能与人工智能方法相结合，走向下一代智能仪器，实现对360度真实周围环境的更深入的理解和更全面的感知。幸运的是，自由曲面、薄板光学和超表面的最新进展提供了解决人类对环境感知的创新方法，提供了超越传统光学成像的有前途的想法。在这篇综述中，我们首先介绍全景成像系统的基本原理，然后描述各种全景成像系统的架构、特性和功能。随后，我们详细讨论了自由曲面、薄板光学和超表面在全景成像中的广阔应用前景和巨大的设计潜力。然后，我们详细分析这些技术如何帮助提高全景成像系统的性能。我们进一步详细分析了全景成像在自动驾驶和机器人场景理解中的应用，涵盖全景语义图像分割、全景深度估计、全景视觉定位等。最后，我们对全景成像仪器的未来潜力和研究方向进行了展望。 本文综述了全景成像系统的基本原理、技术架构及在场景理解中的应用，重点探讨了自由曲面、超薄平板光学和超表面等技术对全景成像性能的提升作用。 Shaohua Gao,Kailun Yang,Hao Shi,Kaiwei Wang,Jian Bai cs.CV,cs.RO,eess.IV,physics.optics

authors: Mark J. J. P. van Grinsven
authors_json: Mark J. J. P. van Grinsven
authors_text: Verónica Sánchez-Gutiérrez,Paula Hernández-Martínez,Francisco J. Muñoz-Negrete,Jonne Engelberts,Allison M. Luger,Mark J. J. P. van Grinsven
title: Performance of a deep learning system for detection of referable diabetic retinopathy in real clinical settings
title_zh: 用于在真实临床环境中检测可参考糖尿病视网膜病变的深度学习系统的性能
comment: 15 pages, 3 figures, 2 tables
comments: 15 pages, 3 figures, 2 tables
abstract: Background: To determine the ability of a commercially available deep learning system, RetCAD v.1.3.1 (Thirona, Nijmegen, The Netherlands) for the automatic detection of referable diabetic retinopathy (DR) on a dataset of colour fundus images acquired during routine clinical practice in a tertiary hospital screening program, analyzing the reduction of workload that can be released incorporating this artificial intelligence-based technology. Methods: Evaluation of the software was performed on a dataset of 7195 nonmydriatic fundus images from 6325 eyes of 3189 diabetic patients attending our screening program between February to December of 2019. The software generated a DR severity score for each colour fundus image which was combined into an eye-level score. This score was then compared with a reference standard as set by a human expert using receiver operating characteristic (ROC) curve analysis. Results: The artificial intelligence (AI) software achieved an area under the ROC curve (AUC) value of 0.988 [0.981:0.993] for the detection of referable DR. At the proposed operating point, the sensitivity of the RetCAD software for DR is 90.53% and specificity is 97.13%. A workload reduction of 96% could be achieved at the cost of only 6 false negatives. Conclusions: The AI software correctly identified the vast majority of referable DR cases, with a workload reduction of 96% of the cases that would need to be checked, while missing almost no true cases, so it may therefore be used as an instrument for triage.
summary: Background: To determine the ability of a commercially available deep learning system, RetCAD v.1.3.1 (Thirona, Nijmegen, The Netherlands) for the automatic detection of referable diabetic retinopathy (DR) on a dataset of colour fundus images acquired during routine clinical practice in a tertiary hospital screening program, analyzing the reduction of workload that can be released incorporating this artificial intelligence-based technology. Methods: Evaluation of the software was performed on a dataset of 7195 nonmydriatic fundus images from 6325 eyes of 3189 diabetic patients attending our screening program between February to December of 2019. The software generated a DR severity score for each colour fundus image which was combined into an eye-level score. This score was then compared with a reference standard as set by a human expert using receiver operating characteristic (ROC) curve analysis. Results: The artificial intelligence (AI) software achieved an area under the ROC curve (AUC) value of 0.988 [0.981:0.993] for the detection of referable DR. At the proposed operating point, the sensitivity of the RetCAD software for DR is 90.53% and specificity is 97.13%. A workload reduction of 96% could be achieved at the cost of only 6 false negatives. Conclusions: The AI software correctly identified the vast majority of referable DR cases, with a workload reduction of 96% of the cases that would need to be checked, while missing almost no true cases, so it may therefore be used as an instrument for triage.
abstract_zh: 背景：为了确定商用深度学习系统 RetCAD v.1.3.1（Thirona，奈梅亨，荷兰）在三级医院筛查项目的常规临床实践中获取的彩色眼底图像数据集上自动检测可参考的糖尿病视网膜病变 (DR) 的能力，分析结合这种基于人工智能的技术可以减少的工作量。方法：对 2019 年 2 月至 12 月期间参加我们筛查项目的 3189 名糖尿病患者的 6325 只眼睛的 7195 张免散瞳眼底图像数据集进行软件评估。该软件为每张彩色眼底图像生成 DR 严重程度评分，并将其合并为眼水平评分。然后将该分数与人类专家使用受试者工作特征 (ROC) 曲线分析设定的参考标准进行比较。结果：人工智能(AI)软件检测可参考DR的ROC曲线下面积(AUC)值为0.988[0.981:0.993]。在建议的操作点，RetCAD 软件对 DR 的敏感性为 90.53%，特异性为 97.13%。只需 6 次漏报，即可减少 96% 的工作量。结论：AI软件正确识别了绝大多数可转诊的DR病例，需要检查的病例工作量减少了96%，几乎没有遗漏真实病例，因此可以用作分诊工具。

AI.tldr: 评估深度学习系统RetCAD在真实临床环境中检测可转诊糖尿病视网膜病变（DR）的表现及工作量减少效果。
AI.motivation: 探索人工智能技术在糖尿病视网膜病变筛查中的应用潜力，以减少临床工作量并提高检测效率。
AI.method: 在三级医院筛查项目中，使用7195张非散瞳眼底图像测试RetCAD系统，通过ROC曲线分析其检测结果与专家标准的一致性。
AI.result: 系统AUC达0.988，敏感度90.53%，特异度97.13%，可减少96%的工作量且仅出现6例假阴性。
AI.conclusion: AI系统能高效识别绝大多数可转诊DR病例，显著降低人工审核工作量，适合用于筛查分诊。

authors_text: Unnikrishnan R. Nair,Sarthak Sharma,Midhun S. Menon,Srikanth Vidapanakal
title: NMR: Neural Manifold Representation for Autonomous Driving
title_zh: NMR：自动驾驶的神经流形表示
abstract: Autonomous driving requires efficient reasoning about the Spatio-temporal nature of the semantics of the scene. Recent approaches have successfully amalgamated the traditional modular architecture of an autonomous driving stack comprising perception, prediction, and planning in an end-to-end trainable system. Such a system calls for a shared latent space embedding with interpretable intermediate trainable projected representation. One such successfully deployed representation is the Bird's-Eye View(BEV) representation of the scene in ego-frame. However, a fundamental assumption for an undistorted BEV is the local coplanarity of the world around the ego-vehicle. This assumption is highly restrictive, as roads, in general, do have gradients. The resulting distortions make path planning inefficient and incorrect. To overcome this limitation, we propose Neural Manifold Representation (NMR), a representation for the task of autonomous driving that learns to infer semantics and predict way-points on a manifold over a finite horizon, centered on the ego-vehicle. We do this using an iterative attention mechanism applied on a latent high dimensional embedding of surround monocular images and partial ego-vehicle state. This representation helps generate motion and behavior plans consistent with and cognizant of the surface geometry. We propose a sampling algorithm based on edge-adaptive coverage loss of BEV occupancy grid and associated guidance flow field to generate the surface manifold while incurring minimal computational overhead. We aim to test the efficacy of our approach on CARLA and SYNTHIA-SF.
summary: Autonomous driving requires efficient reasoning about the Spatio-temporal nature of the semantics of the scene. Recent approaches have successfully amalgamated the traditional modular architecture of an autonomous driving stack comprising perception, prediction, and planning in an end-to-end trainable system. Such a system calls for a shared latent space embedding with interpretable intermediate trainable projected representation. One such successfully deployed representation is the Bird's-Eye View(BEV) representation of the scene in ego-frame. However, a fundamental assumption for an undistorted BEV is the local coplanarity of the world around the ego-vehicle. This assumption is highly restrictive, as roads, in general, do have gradients. The resulting distortions make path planning inefficient and incorrect. To overcome this limitation, we propose Neural Manifold Representation (NMR), a representation for the task of autonomous driving that learns to infer semantics and predict way-points on a manifold over a finite horizon, centered on the ego-vehicle. We do this using an iterative attention mechanism applied on a latent high dimensional embedding of surround monocular images and partial ego-vehicle state. This representation helps generate motion and behavior plans consistent with and cognizant of the surface geometry. We propose a sampling algorithm based on edge-adaptive coverage loss of BEV occupancy grid and associated guidance flow field to generate the surface manifold while incurring minimal computational overhead. We aim to test the efficacy of our approach on CARLA and SYNTHIA-SF.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶需要对场景语义的时空性质进行有效推理。最近的方法已经成功地将自动驾驶堆栈的传统模块化架构融合在一起，其中包括端到端可训练系统中的感知、预测和规划。这样的系统需要一个共享的潜在空间，嵌入可解释的中间可训练的投影表示。一种成功部署的表示是自我框架中场景的鸟瞰图（BEV）表示。然而，不失真 BEV 的一个基本假设是自我车辆周围世界的局部共面性。这种假设具有很大的限制性，因为道路通常具有坡度。由此产生的扭曲使路径规划效率低下且不正确。为了克服这一限制，我们提出了神经流形表示（NMR），这是一种自动驾驶任务的表示，它学习推断语义并预测有限范围内流形上的路点，以自我车辆为中心。我们使用迭代注意机制来实现这一点，该机制应用于周围单目图像和部分自我车辆状态的潜在高维嵌入。这种表示有助于生成与表面几何形状一致并认识的运动和行为计划。我们提出了一种基于 BEV 占用网格的边缘自适应覆盖损失和相关引导流场的采样算法，以生成表面流形，同时产生最小的计算开销。我们的目标是测试我们的方法对 CARLA 和 SYNTHIA-SF 的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为NMR的神经流形表示方法，用于自动驾驶任务，旨在克服传统鸟瞰图（BEV）表示的局限性。
AI.motivation: 传统BEV表示假设周围环境局部共面，但实际道路存在坡度，导致路径规划效率低下且不准确，需更符合表面几何的表示方法。
AI.method: 通过迭代注意力机制，结合周围单目图像和部分车辆状态的高维嵌入，学习推断语义并预测路径点，同时提出基于边缘自适应覆盖损失的采样算法生成流形表示。
AI.result: 该方法在CARLA和SYNTHIA-SF数据集上进行了有效性验证，旨在生成符合表面几何的运动和行为规划。
AI.conclusion: NMR通过考虑表面几何特性，解决了传统BEV表示的局限性，为自动驾驶提供了更鲁棒的语义表示和路径规划方案。

search_text: NMR: Neural Manifold Representation for Autonomous Driving NMR：自动驾驶的神经流形表示 Autonomous driving requires efficient reasoning about the Spatio-temporal nature of the semantics of the scene. Recent approaches have successfully amalgamated the traditional modular architecture of an autonomous driving stack comprising perception, prediction, and planning in an end-to-end trainable system. Such a system calls for a shared latent space embedding with interpretable intermediate trainable projected representation. One such successfully deployed representation is the Bird's-Eye View(BEV) representation of the scene in ego-frame. However, a fundamental assumption for an undistorted BEV is the local coplanarity of the world around the ego-vehicle. This assumption is highly restrictive, as roads, in general, do have gradients. The resulting distortions make path planning inefficient and incorrect. To overcome this limitation, we propose Neural Manifold Representation (NMR), a representation for the task of autonomous driving that learns to infer semantics and predict way-points on a manifold over a finite horizon, centered on the ego-vehicle. We do this using an iterative attention mechanism applied on a latent high dimensional embedding of surround monocular images and partial ego-vehicle state. This representation helps generate motion and behavior plans consistent with and cognizant of the surface geometry. We propose a sampling algorithm based on edge-adaptive coverage loss of BEV occupancy grid and associated guidance flow field to generate the surface manifold while incurring minimal computational overhead. authors_text: Nima Hatami,Tae-Hee Cho,Laura Mechtouff,Omer Faruk Eker,David Rousseau,Carole Frindel
title: CNN-LSTM Based Multimodal MRI and Clinical Data Fusion for Predicting Functional Outcome in Stroke Patients
title_zh: 基于 CNN-LSTM 的多模态 MRI 和临床数据融合预测中风患者的功能结果
comment: 44th Annual International Conference of the IEEE Engineering in Medicine and Biology Society (EMBC 2022)
comments: 44th Annual International Conference of the IEEE Engineering in Medicine and Biology Society (EMBC 2022)
abstract: Clinical outcome prediction plays an important role in stroke patient management. From a machine learning point-of-view, one of the main challenges is dealing with heterogeneous data at patient admission, i.e. the image data which are multidimensional and the clinical data which are scalars. In this paper, a multimodal convolutional neural network - long short-term memory (CNN-LSTM) based ensemble model is proposed. For each MR image module, a dedicated network provides preliminary prediction of the clinical outcome using the modified Rankin scale (mRS). The final mRS score is obtained by merging the preliminary probabilities of each module dedicated to a specific type of MR image weighted by the clinical metadata, here age or the National Institutes of Health Stroke Scale (NIHSS). The experimental results demonstrate that the proposed model surpasses the baselines and offers an original way to automatically encode the spatio-temporal context of MR images in a deep learning architecture. The highest AUC (0.77) was achieved for the proposed model with NIHSS.
summary: Clinical outcome prediction plays an important role in stroke patient management. From a machine learning point-of-view, one of the main challenges is dealing with heterogeneous data at patient admission, i.e. the image data which are multidimensional and the clinical data which are scalars. In this paper, a multimodal convolutional neural network - long short-term memory (CNN-LSTM) based ensemble model is proposed. For each MR image module, a dedicated network provides preliminary prediction of the clinical outcome using the modified Rankin scale (mRS). The final mRS score is obtained by merging the preliminary probabilities of each module dedicated to a specific type of MR image weighted by the clinical metadata, here age or the National Institutes of Health Stroke Scale (NIHSS). The experimental results demonstrate that the proposed model surpasses the baselines and offers an original way to automatically encode the spatio-temporal context of MR images in a deep learning architecture. The highest AUC (0.77) was achieved for the proposed model with NIHSS.
abstract_zh: 临床结果预测在中风患者管理中发挥着重要作用。从机器学习的角度来看，主要挑战之一是处理患者入院时的异构数据，即多维图像数据和标量临床数据。本文提出了一种基于多模态卷积神经网络-长短期记忆（CNN-LSTM）的集成模型。对于每个 MR 图像模块，专用网络使用修改后的 Rankin 量表 (mRS) 提供临床结果的初步预测。最终的 mRS 分数是通过合并专用于特定类型 MR 图像的每个模块的初步概率而获得的，该概率由临床元数据（此处为年龄或美国国立卫生研究院卒中量表 (NIHSS)）加权。实验结果表明，所提出的模型超越了基线，并提供了一种在深度学习架构中自动编码 MR 图像时空上下文的原始方法。 NIHSS 提出的模型获得了最高的 AUC (0.77)。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于CNN-LSTM的多模态MRI和临床数据融合方法，用于预测中风患者的预后功能结果。
AI.motivation: 临床结局预测对中风患者管理至关重要，但异构数据（如多维影像数据和标量临床数据）的整合是机器学习中的主要挑战。
AI.method: 设计多模态CNN-LSTM集成模型，通过专用网络对每种MRI模块进行初步预测，结合临床元数据（年龄、NIHSS）加权融合各模块概率。
AI.result: 实验表明该模型优于基线方法，使用NIHSS时达到最高AUC值0.77。
AI.conclusion: 该模型通过深度学习架构有效编码MRI的时空上下文，为多模态数据融合提供了新方法。

authors_text: Gokul Karthik Kumar,Sahal Shaji Mullappilly,Abhishek Singh Gehlot
title: An Empirical Study Of Self-supervised Learning Approaches For Object Detection With Transformers
title_zh: 使用 Transformer 进行目标检测的自监督学习方法的实证研究
comment: Final Project for the course "Visual Object Detection And Recognition" (CV703) at MBZUAI
comments: Final Project for the course "Visual Object Detection And Recognition" (CV703) at MBZUAI
abstract: Self-supervised learning (SSL) methods such as masked language modeling have shown massive performance gains by pretraining transformer models for a variety of natural language processing tasks. The follow-up research adapted similar methods like masked image modeling in vision transformer and demonstrated improvements in the image classification task. Such simple self-supervised methods are not exhaustively studied for object detection transformers (DETR, Deformable DETR) as their transformer encoder modules take input in the convolutional neural network (CNN) extracted feature space rather than the image space as in general vision transformers. However, the CNN feature maps still maintain the spatial relationship and we utilize this property to design self-supervised learning approaches to train the encoder of object detection transformers in pretraining and multi-task learning settings. We explore common self-supervised methods based on image reconstruction, masked image modeling and jigsaw. Preliminary experiments in the iSAID dataset demonstrate faster convergence of DETR in the initial epochs in both pretraining and multi-task learning settings; nonetheless, similar improvement is not observed in the case of multi-task learning with Deformable DETR. The code for our experiments with DETR and Deformable DETR are available at https://github.com/gokulkarthik/detr and https://github.com/gokulkarthik/Deformable-DETR respectively.
summary: Self-supervised learning (SSL) methods such as masked language modeling have shown massive performance gains by pretraining transformer models for a variety of natural language processing tasks. The follow-up research adapted similar methods like masked image modeling in vision transformer and demonstrated improvements in the image classification task. Such simple self-supervised methods are not exhaustively studied for object detection transformers (DETR, Deformable DETR) as their transformer encoder modules take input in the convolutional neural network (CNN) extracted feature space rather than the image space as in general vision transformers. However, the CNN feature maps still maintain the spatial relationship and we utilize this property to design self-supervised learning approaches to train the encoder of object detection transformers in pretraining and multi-task learning settings. We explore common self-supervised methods based on image reconstruction, masked image modeling and jigsaw. Preliminary experiments in the iSAID dataset demonstrate faster convergence of DETR in the initial epochs in both pretraining and multi-task learning settings; nonetheless, similar improvement is not observed in the case of multi-task learning with Deformable DETR. The code for our experiments with DETR and Deformable DETR are available at https://github.com/gokulkarthik/detr and https://github.com/gokulkarthik/Deformable-DETR respectively.
abstract_zh: 掩码语言建模等自监督学习 (SSL) 方法通过针对各种自然语言处理任务预训练 Transformer 模型，显示出巨大的性能提升。后续研究采用了类似的方法，例如视觉转换器中的掩模图像建模，并展示了图像分类任务的改进。这种简单的自监督方法并未针对目标检测变压器（DETR、可变形 DETR）进行详尽的研究，因为它们的变压器编码器模块在卷积神经网络（CNN）提取的特征空间中获取输入，而不是像一般视觉变压器那样在图像空间中获取输入。然而，CNN 特征图仍然保持空间关系，我们利用这一特性来设计自监督学习方法，在预训练和多任务学习设置中训练目标检测变换器的编码器。我们探索基于图像重建、掩模图像建模和拼图的常见自监督方法。 iSAID 数据集中的初步实验表明，在预训练和多任务学习设置中，DETR 在初始时期的收敛速度更快；然而，在使用 Deformable DETR 进行多任务学习的情况下，没有观察到类似的改进。我们使用 DETR 和 Deformable DETR 进行实验的代码分别可以在 https://github.com/gokulkarthik/detr 和 https://github.com/gokulkarthik/Deformable-DETR 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了自监督学习方法在目标检测变压器（如DETR和Deformable DETR）中的应用，探索了基于图像重建、掩码图像建模和拼图的自监督方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管自监督学习在自然语言处理和图像分类中表现出色，但其在目标检测变压器中的应用尚未被充分研究，因为这些模型依赖于CNN提取的特征空间而非图像空间。
AI.method: 利用CNN特征图的空间关系，设计了基于图像重建、掩码图像建模和拼图的自监督学习方法，用于预训练和多任务学习场景下的目标检测变压器编码器训练。
AI.result: 在iSAID数据集上的初步实验表明，DETR在预训练和多任务学习中收敛速度加快，但Deformable DETR未观察到类似改进。
AI.conclusion: 自监督学习可有效提升DETR性能，但对Deformable DETR效果有限，需进一步研究适配不同架构的自监督策略。

search_text: An Empirical Study Of Self-supervised Learning Approaches For Object Detection With Transformers 使用 Transformer 进行目标检测的自监督学习方法的实证研究 Self-supervised learning (SSL) methods such as masked language modeling have shown massive performance gains by pretraining transformer models for a variety of natural language processing tasks. The follow-up research adapted similar methods like masked image modeling in vision transformer and demonstrated improvements in the image classification task. Such simple self-supervised methods are not exhaustively studied for object detection transformers (DETR, Deformable DETR) as their transformer encoder modules take input in the convolutional neural network (CNN) extracted feature space rather than the image space as in general vision transformers. However, the CNN feature maps still maintain the spatial relationship and we utilize this property to design self-supervised learning approaches to train the encoder of object detection transformers in pretraining and multi-task learning settings. We explore common self-supervised methods based on image reconstruction, masked image modeling and jigsaw. Preliminary experiments in the iSAID dataset demonstrate faster convergence of DETR in the initial epochs in both pretraining and multi-task learning settings; nonetheless, similar improvement is not observed in the case of multi-task learning with Deformable DETR. The code for our experiments with DETR and Deformable DETR are available at https://github.com/gokulkarthik/detr and https://github.com/gokulkarthik/Deformable-DETR respectively. 掩码语言建模等自监督学习 (SSL) 方法通过针对各种自然语言处理任务预训练 Transformer 模型，显示出巨大的性能提升。后续研究采用了类似的方法，例如视觉转换器中的掩模图像建模，并展示了图像分类任务的改进。这种简单的自监督方法并未针对目标检测变压器（DETR、可变形 DETR）进行详尽的研究，因为它们的变压器编码器模块在卷积神经网络（CNN）提取的特征空间中获取输入，而不是像一般视觉变压器那样在图像空间中获取输入。然而，CNN 特征图仍然保持空间关系，我们利用这一特性来设计自监督学习方法，在预训练和多任务学习设置中训练目标检测变换器的编码器。我们探索基于图像重建、掩模图像建模和拼图的常见自监督方法。 iSAID 数据集中的初步实验表明，在预训练和多任务学习设置中，DETR 在初始时期的收敛速度更快；然而，在使用 Deformable DETR 进行多任务学习的情况下，没有观察到类似的改进。我们使用 DETR 和 Deformable DETR 进行实验的代码分别可以在 https://github.com/gokulkarthik/detr 和 https://github.com/gokulkarthik/Deformable-DETR 上找到。 本文研究了自监督学习方法在目标检测变压器（如DETR和Deformable DETR）中的应用，探索了基于图像重建、掩码图像建模和拼图的自监督方法。 Gokul Karthik Kumar,Sahal Shaji Mullappilly,Abhishek Singh Gehlot cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Mohammadreza Mousaei,Junyi Geng,Azarakhsh Keipour,Dongwei Bai,Sebastian Scherer
title: Design, Modeling and Control for a Tilt-rotor VTOL UAV in the Presence of Actuator Failure
title_zh: 存在致动器故障的倾转旋翼垂直起降无人机的设计、建模和控制
comment: 8 pages
comments: 8 pages
abstract: Enabling vertical take-off and landing while providing the ability to fly long ranges opens the door to a wide range of new real-world aircraft applications while improving many existing tasks. Tiltrotor vertical take-off and landing (VTOL) unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) are a better choice than fixed-wing and multirotor aircraft for such applications. Prior works on these aircraft have addressed aerodynamic performance, design, modeling, and control. However, a less explored area is the study of their potential fault tolerance due to their inherent redundancy, which allows them to tolerate some degree of actuation failure. This paper introduces tolerance to several types of actuator failures in a tiltrotor VTOL aircraft. We discuss the design and modeling of a custom tiltrotor VTOL UAV, which is a combination of a fixed-wing aircraft and a quadrotor with tilting rotors, where the four propellers can be rotated individually. Then, we analyze the feasible wrench space the vehicle can generate and design the dynamic control allocation so that the system can adapt to actuator failures, benefiting from the configuration redundancy. The proposed approach is lightweight and is implemented as an extension to an already-existing flight control stack. Extensive experiments validate that the system can maintain the controlled flight under different actuator failures. To the best of our knowledge, this work is the first study of the tiltrotor VTOL's fault-tolerance that exploits the configuration redundancy. The source code and simulation can be accessed at https://theairlab.org/vtol.

abstract_zh: 实现垂直起飞和着陆，同时提供长距离飞行能力，为各种新的现实飞机应用打开了大门，同时改进了许多现有任务。对于此类应用，倾转旋翼垂直起降 (VTOL) 无人机 (UAV) 是比固定翼和多旋翼飞机更好的选择。这些飞机的先前工作已经解决了空气动力学性能、设计、建模和控制问题。然而，一个较少探索的领域是对其潜在容错性的研究，因为它们具有固有的冗余性，这使得它们能够容忍一定程度的驱动故障。本文介绍了倾转旋翼垂直起降飞机中几种类型的执行器故障的容限。我们讨论了定制倾转旋翼垂直起降无人机的设计和建模，该无人机是固定翼飞机和带有倾转旋翼的四旋翼飞行器的组合，其中四个螺旋桨可以单独旋转。然后，我们分析车辆可以生成的可行扳手空间并设计动态控制分配，以便系统能够适应执行器故障，并受益于配置冗余。所提出的方法是轻量级的，并且作为现有飞行控制堆栈的扩展来实现。大量实验验证了系统在不同执行器故障下均能保持受控飞行。据我们所知，这项工作是第一个利用配置冗余的倾转旋翼垂直起降容错性研究。源代码和模拟可以在 https://theairlab.org/vtol 访问。

AI.tldr: 本文设计并实现了一种具有故障容忍能力的倾斜旋翼垂直起降无人机（VTOL UAV），通过利用其配置冗余应对执行器故障。
AI.motivation: 倾斜旋翼VTOL无人机结合了固定翼和多旋翼的优点，但其在执行器故障下的容错能力尚未被充分研究。利用其冗余设计提升故障容忍性具有重要应用价值。
AI.method: 设计了一种四旋翼可独立旋转的混合构型VTOL无人机，分析其可行力矩空间并构建动态控制分配算法，通过配置冗余实现故障适应，基于现有飞控系统扩展实现。
AI.result: 实验验证了系统在多种执行器故障下仍能维持可控飞行，首次通过配置冗余实现倾斜旋翼VTOL的容错控制。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法有效利用配置冗余提升倾斜旋翼VTOL无人机的故障容忍能力，为复杂环境下的可靠飞行提供了新思路。

authors_text: Bo Li,Xiaowei Wu,Yutong Wu
title: Prophet Inequality on I.I.D. Distributions: Beating 1-1/e with a Single Query
title_zh: I.I.D 上的先知不平等分布：用单个查询击败 1-1/e
comment: 32 pages, 2 figures
comments: 32 pages, 2 figures
abstract: In this work, we study the single-choice prophet inequality problem, where a gambler faces a sequence of~$n$ online i.i.d. random variables drawn from an unknown distribution. When a variable reveals its value, the gambler needs to decide irrevocably whether or not to accept the value. The goal is to maximize the competitive ratio between the expected gain of the gambler and that of the maximum variable. It is shown by Correa et al. that when the distribution is unknown or only $o(n)$ uniform samples from the distribution are given, the best an algorithm can do is $1/e$-competitive. In contrast, when the distribution is known or $Ω(n)$ uniform samples are given, the optimal competitive ratio of 0.7451 can be achieved. In this paper, we study a new model in which the algorithm has access to an oracle that answers quantile queries about the distribution and investigate to what extent we can use a small number of queries to achieve good competitive ratios. We first use the answers from the queries to implement the threshold-based algorithms and show that with two thresholds our algorithm achieves a competitive ratio of $0.6786$. Motivated by the two-threshold algorithm, we design the observe-and-accept algorithm that requires only a single query. This algorithm sets a threshold in the first phase by making a query and uses the maximum realization from the first phase as the threshold for the second phase. It can be viewed as a natural combination of the single-threshold algorithm and the algorithm for the secretary problem. By properly choosing the quantile to query and the break-point between the two phases, we achieve a competitive ratio of $0.6718$, beating the benchmark of $1-1/e$.
summary: In this work, we study the single-choice prophet inequality problem, where a gambler faces a sequence of~$n$ online i.i.d. random variables drawn from an unknown distribution. When a variable reveals its value, the gambler needs to decide irrevocably whether or not to accept the value. The goal is to maximize the competitive ratio between the expected gain of the gambler and that of the maximum variable. It is shown by Correa et al. that when the distribution is unknown or only $o(n)$ uniform samples from the distribution are given, the best an algorithm can do is $1/e$-competitive. In contrast, when the distribution is known or $Ω(n)$ uniform samples are given, the optimal competitive ratio of 0.7451 can be achieved. In this paper, we study a new model in which the algorithm has access to an oracle that answers quantile queries about the distribution and investigate to what extent we can use a small number of queries to achieve good competitive ratios. We first use the answers from the queries to implement the threshold-based algorithms and show that with two thresholds our algorithm achieves a competitive ratio of $0.6786$. Motivated by the two-threshold algorithm, we design the observe-and-accept algorithm that requires only a single query. This algorithm sets a threshold in the first phase by making a query and uses the maximum realization from the first phase as the threshold for the second phase. It can be viewed as a natural combination of the single-threshold algorithm and the algorithm for the secretary problem. By properly choosing the quantile to query and the break-point between the two phases, we achieve a competitive ratio of $0.6718$, beating the benchmark of $1-1/e$.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们研究了单选先知不等式问题，其中赌徒面临一系列~$n$在线独立同分布。从未知分布中抽取的随机变量。当一个变量显露出它的值时，赌徒需要不可撤销地决定是否接受该值。目标是最大化赌徒的预期收益与最大变量之间的竞争比。 Correa 等人证明了这一点。当分布未知或仅给出分布中的 $o(n)$ 均匀样本时，算法最多可以做到 $1/e$ 竞争。相反，当分布已知或给出 $Ω(n)$ 均匀样本时，可以实现 0.7451 的最佳竞争比。在本文中，我们研究了一种新模型，其中算法可以访问一个预言机，该预言机可以回答有关分布的分位数查询，并研究我们可以在多大程度上使用少量查询来实现良好的竞争比。我们首先使用查询的答案来实现基于阈值的算法，并表明，通过两个阈值，我们的算法实现了 0.6786 美元的竞争比。受两阈值算法的启发，我们设计了仅需要单个查询的观察并接受算法。该算法通过查询在第一阶段设置阈值，并使用第一阶段的最大实现作为第二阶段的阈值。它可以被视为单阈值算法和秘书问题算法的自然结合。通过正确选择要查询的分位数以及两个阶段之间的断点，我们实现了 0.6718 美元的竞争比，超过了 1-1/e 美元的基准。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在独立同分布（i.i.d.）条件下，通过单次查询击败1-1/e竞争比的先知不等式问题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究表明，当分布未知或样本有限时，最优竞争比仅为1/e；而当分布已知时可达到0.7451。本文旨在探索通过少量量化查询能否在未知分布下实现更高竞争比。
AI.method: 设计基于阈值的算法及单次查询的observe-and-accept算法，结合量化查询与分阶段阈值策略，利用先验查询优化决策阈值。
AI.result: 通过单次量化查询实现0.6718竞争比，首次突破1-1/e的基准（约0.632）。
AI.conclusion: 单次量化查询即可显著提升竞争比，证明在有限信息下通过智能查询策略可逼近已知分布的性能上限。

search_text: Prophet Inequality on I.I.D. Distributions: Beating 1-1/e with a Single Query I.I.D 上的先知不平等分布：用单个查询击败 1-1/e In this work, we study the single-choice prophet inequality problem, where a gambler faces a sequence of~$n$ online i.i.d. random variables drawn from an unknown distribution. When a variable reveals its value, the gambler needs to decide irrevocably whether or not to accept the value. The goal is to maximize the competitive ratio between the expected gain of the gambler and that of the maximum variable. It is shown by Correa et al. that when the distribution is unknown or only $o(n)$ uniform samples from the distribution are given, the best an algorithm can do is $1/e$-competitive. In contrast, when the distribution is known or $Ω(n)$ uniform samples are given, the optimal competitive ratio of 0.7451 can be achieved. In this paper, we study a new model in which the algorithm has access to an oracle that answers quantile queries about the distribution and investigate to what extent we can use a small number of queries to achieve good competitive ratios. We first use the answers from the queries to implement the threshold-based algorithms and show that with two thresholds our algorithm achieves a competitive ratio of $0.6786$. Motivated by the two-threshold algorithm, we design the observe-and-accept algorithm that requires only a single query. This algorithm sets a threshold in the first phase by making a query and uses the maximum realization from the first phase as the threshold for the second phase. It can be viewed as a natural combination of the single-threshold algorithm and the algorithm for the secretary problem. By properly choosing the quantile to query and the break-point between the two phases, we achieve a competitive ratio of $0.6718$, beating the benchmark of $1-1/e$. 在这项工作中，我们研究了单选先知不等式问题，其中赌徒面临一系列~$n$在线独立同分布。从未知分布中抽取的随机变量。当一个变量显露出它的值时，赌徒需要不可撤销地决定是否接受该值。目标是最大化赌徒的预期收益与最大变量之间的竞争比。 Correa 等人证明了这一点。当分布未知或仅给出分布中的 $o(n)$ 均匀样本时，算法最多可以做到 $1/e$ 竞争。相反，当分布已知或给出 $Ω(n)$ 均匀样本时，可以实现 0.7451 的最佳竞争比。在本文中，我们研究了一种新模型，其中算法可以访问一个预言机，该预言机可以回答有关分布的分位数查询，并研究我们可以在多大程度上使用少量查询来实现良好的竞争比。我们首先使用查询的答案来实现基于阈值的算法，并表明，通过两个阈值，我们的算法实现了 0.6786 美元的竞争比。受两阈值算法的启发，我们设计了仅需要单个查询的观察并接受算法。该算法通过查询在第一阶段设置阈值，并使用第一阶段的最大实现作为第二阶段的阈值。它可以被视为单阈值算法和秘书问题算法的自然结合。通过正确选择要查询的分位数以及两个阶段之间的断点，我们实现了 0.6718 美元的竞争比，超过了 1-1/e 美元的基准。 本文研究在独立同分布（i.i.d.）条件下，通过单次查询击败1-1/e竞争比的先知不等式问题。 Bo Li,Xiaowei Wu,Yutong Wu cs.DS,cs.GT

authors_text: Ulrike Kuhl,André Artelt,Barbara Hammer
title: Keep Your Friends Close and Your Counterfactuals Closer: Improved Learning From Closest Rather Than Plausible Counterfactual Explanations in an Abstract Setting
title_zh: 与你的朋友保持亲密关系，让你的反事实更接近：在抽象环境中从最近的解释而不是似是而非的反事实解释中改进学习
comment: 17 pages, 4 figures, 1 table; accepted at 2022 ACM Conference on Fairness, Accountability, and Transparency (FAccT '22), June 21-24, 2022, Seoul, Republic of Korea. https://doi.org/10.1145/3531146.3534630
comments: 17 pages, 4 figures, 1 table; accepted at 2022 ACM Conference on Fairness, Accountability, and Transparency (FAccT '22), June 21-24, 2022, Seoul, Republic of Korea. https://doi.org/10.1145/3531146.3534630
abstract: Counterfactual explanations (CFEs) highlight what changes to a model's input would have changed its prediction in a particular way. CFEs have gained considerable traction as a psychologically grounded solution for explainable artificial intelligence (XAI). Recent innovations introduce the notion of computational plausibility for automatically generated CFEs, enhancing their robustness by exclusively creating plausible explanations. However, practical benefits of such a constraint on user experience and behavior is yet unclear. In this study, we evaluate objective and subjective usability of computationally plausible CFEs in an iterative learning design targeting novice users. We rely on a novel, game-like experimental design, revolving around an abstract scenario. Our results show that novice users actually benefit less from receiving computationally plausible rather than closest CFEs that produce minimal changes leading to the desired outcome. Responses in a post-game survey reveal no differences in terms of subjective user experience between both groups. Following the view of psychological plausibility as comparative similarity, this may be explained by the fact that users in the closest condition experience their CFEs as more psychologically plausible than the computationally plausible counterpart. In sum, our work highlights a little-considered divergence of definitions of computational plausibility and psychological plausibility, critically confirming the need to incorporate human behavior, preferences and mental models already at the design stages of XAI approaches. In the interest of reproducible research, all source code, acquired user data, and evaluation scripts of the current study are available: https://github.com/ukuhl/PlausibleAlienZoo

CFEs have gained considerable traction as a psychologically grounded solution for explainable artificial intelligence (XAI). Recent innovations introduce the notion of computational plausibility for automatically generated CFEs, enhancing their robustness by exclusively creating plausible explanations. In the interest of reproducible research, all source code, acquired user data, and evaluation scripts of the current study are available: https://github.com/ukuhl/PlausibleAlienZoo
abstract_zh: 反事实解释 (CFE) 强调模型输入的哪些变化会以特定方式改变其预测。作为可解释人工智能 (XAI) 的基于心理的解决方案，CFE 已经获得了相当大的关注。最近的创新为自动生成的 CFE 引入了计算合理性的概念，通过专门创建合理的解释来增强其稳健性。然而，这种对用户体验和行为的限制的实际好处尚不清楚。在这项研究中，我们评估了针对新手用户的迭代学习设计中计算合理的 CFE 的客观和主观可用性。我们依赖于一种新颖的、类似游戏的实验设计，围绕一个抽象场景。我们的结果表明，新手用户实际上从接收计算上合理的而不是最接近的 CFE 中获益较少，这些 CFE 产生最小的变化，从而达到预期的结果。赛后调查的反应显示两组之间的主观用户体验没有差异。按照将心理合理性视为比较相似性的观点，这可以通过以下事实来解释：在最接近的条件下，用户体验到他们的 CFE 在心理上比在计算上合理的对应物更合理。总之，我们的工作强调了计算合理性和心理合理性定义上很少被考虑的分歧，批判性地确认了在 XAI 方法的设计阶段就需要纳入人类行为、偏好和心理模型的必要性。为了可重复的研究，当前研究的所有源代码、获取的用户数据和评估脚本均可用：https://github.com/ukuhl/PlausibleAlienZoo

AI.tldr: 该论文比较了计算上合理与最接近的反事实解释（CFEs）在帮助新手用户学习中的效果，通过游戏化实验发现最接近的CFEs更有效。
AI.motivation: 尽管计算上合理的CFEs被广泛研究，但其对用户实际学习效果和体验的影响尚不明确，需验证心理合理性与计算合理性的差异。
AI.method: 设计游戏化实验，让新手用户在抽象场景中通过两种CFEs（计算合理/最接近）进行迭代学习，并对比学习效果和主观体验。
AI.result: 新手用户从最接近的CFEs中获益更多，而两组用户的主观体验无显著差异，表明心理合理性可能与计算合理性存在分歧。
AI.conclusion: 需在XAI设计初期融入人类行为与心理模型，而不仅依赖计算合理性，研究代码与数据已开源以供复现。

authors_text: Zhuopeng Li,Lu Li,Zeyu Ma,Ping Zhang,Junbo Chen,Jianke Zhu
title: READ: Large-Scale Neural Scene Rendering for Autonomous Driving
title_zh: 阅读：用于自动驾驶的大规模神经场景渲染
abstract: Synthesizing free-view photo-realistic images is an important task in multimedia. With the development of advanced driver assistance systems~(ADAS) and their applications in autonomous vehicles, experimenting with different scenarios becomes a challenge. Although the photo-realistic street scenes can be synthesized by image-to-image translation methods, which cannot produce coherent scenes due to the lack of 3D information. In this paper, a large-scale neural rendering method is proposed to synthesize the autonomous driving scene~(READ), which makes it possible to synthesize large-scale driving scenarios on a PC through a variety of sampling schemes. In order to represent driving scenarios, we propose an ω rendering network to learn neural descriptors from sparse point clouds. Our model can not only synthesize realistic driving scenes but also stitch and edit driving scenes. Experiments show that our model performs well in large-scale driving scenarios.
summary: Synthesizing free-view photo-realistic images is an important task in multimedia. With the development of advanced driver assistance systems~(ADAS) and their applications in autonomous vehicles, experimenting with different scenarios becomes a challenge. Although the photo-realistic street scenes can be synthesized by image-to-image translation methods, which cannot produce coherent scenes due to the lack of 3D information. In this paper, a large-scale neural rendering method is proposed to synthesize the autonomous driving scene~(READ), which makes it possible to synthesize large-scale driving scenarios on a PC through a variety of sampling schemes. In order to represent driving scenarios, we propose an ω rendering network to learn neural descriptors from sparse point clouds. Our model can not only synthesize realistic driving scenes but also stitch and edit driving scenes. Experiments show that our model performs well in large-scale driving scenarios.
abstract_zh: 合成自由观看的逼真图像是多媒体中的一项重要任务。随着高级驾驶辅助系统（ADAS）的发展及其在自动驾驶汽车中的应用，尝试不同的场景成为一项挑战。尽管可以通过图像到图像转换方法合成逼真的街道场景，但由于缺乏 3D 信息，无法生成连贯的场景。本文提出了一种大规模神经渲染方法来合成自动驾驶场景~(READ)，使得通过多种采样方案在PC上合成大规模驾驶场景成为可能。为了表示驾驶场景，我们提出了一个 ω 渲染网络来从稀疏点云中学习神经描述符。我们的模型不仅可以合成真实的驾驶场景，还可以拼接和编辑驾驶场景。实验表明，我们的模型在大规模驾驶场景中表现良好。

AI.tldr: 提出一种大规模神经渲染方法（READ），用于合成自动驾驶场景，解决现有方法缺乏3D信息导致的场景不连贯问题。
AI.motivation: 现有图像到图像转换方法因缺乏3D信息无法生成连贯场景，而自动驾驶需要大规模场景实验，需解决此问题。
AI.method: 提出ω渲染网络，从稀疏点云学习神经描述符，并通过多种采样方案实现大规模场景合成与编辑。
AI.result: 实验表明模型在大规模驾驶场景合成任务中表现优异，能生成逼真且可编辑的场景。
AI.conclusion: READ方法有效解决了大规模自动驾驶场景合成问题，为自动驾驶研究提供了新工具。

search_text: READ: Large-Scale Neural Scene Rendering for Autonomous Driving 阅读：用于自动驾驶的大规模神经场景渲染 Synthesizing free-view photo-realistic images is an important task in multimedia. With the development of advanced driver assistance systems~(ADAS) and their applications in autonomous vehicles, experimenting with different scenarios becomes a challenge. Although the photo-realistic street scenes can be synthesized by image-to-image translation methods, which cannot produce coherent scenes due to the lack of 3D information. In this paper, a large-scale neural rendering method is proposed to synthesize the autonomous driving scene~(READ), which makes it possible to synthesize large-scale driving scenarios on a PC through a variety of sampling schemes. In order to represent driving scenarios, we propose an ω rendering network to learn neural descriptors from sparse point clouds. Our model can not only synthesize realistic driving scenes but also stitch and edit driving scenes. Experiments show that our model performs well in large-scale driving scenarios. 合成自由观看的逼真图像是多媒体中的一项重要任务。随着高级驾驶辅助系统（ADAS）的发展及其在自动驾驶汽车中的应用，尝试不同的场景成为一项挑战。尽管可以通过图像到图像转换方法合成逼真的街道场景，但由于缺乏 3D 信息，无法生成连贯的场景。本文提出了一种大规模神经渲染方法来合成自动驾驶场景~(READ)，使得通过多种采样方案在PC上合成大规模驾驶场景成为可能。为了表示驾驶场景，我们提出了一个 ω 渲染网络来从稀疏点云中学习神经描述符。我们的模型不仅可以合成真实的驾驶场景，还可以拼接和编辑驾驶场景。实验表明，我们的模型在大规模驾驶场景中表现良好。 提出一种大规模神经渲染方法（READ），用于合成自动驾驶场景，解决现有方法缺乏3D信息导致的场景不连贯问题。 Zhuopeng Li,Lu Li,Zeyu Ma,Ping Zhang,Junbo Chen,Jianke Zhu cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Yanxu Hou,Jun Li
title: Accelerating Grasp Learning via Pretraining with Coarse Affordance Maps of Objects
title_zh: 通过使用对象的粗略可供性图进行预训练来加速掌握学习
comment: 7 pages, 9 figures
comments: 7 pages, 9 figures
abstract: Self-supervised grasp learning, i.e., learning to grasp by trial and error, has made great progress. However, it is still time-consuming to train such a model and also a challenge to apply it in practice. This work presents an accelerating method of robotic grasp learning via pretraining with coarse affordance maps of objects to be grasped based on a quite small dataset. A model generated through pre-training is harnessed as an initialization policy to warmly start grasp learning so as to guide a robot to capture more effective rewards at the beginning of training. An object in its coarse affordance map is annotated with a single key point and thereby, the burden of labeling is greatly alleviated. Extensive experiments in simulation and on a real robot are conducted to evaluate the proposed method. The simulation results show that it can significantly accelerate grasp learning by nearly three times over a vanilla Deep Q-Network -based method. Its test on a real UR3 robot shows that it reaches a grasp success rate of 89.5% via only 500 times of grasp tries within about two hours, which is four times faster than its competitor. In addition, it enjoys an outstanding generalization ability to grasp prior-unseen novel objects. It outperforms some existing methods and has the potential to directly apply to a robot for real-world grasp learning tasks.
summary: Self-supervised grasp learning, i.e., learning to grasp by trial and error, has made great progress. However, it is still time-consuming to train such a model and also a challenge to apply it in practice. This work presents an accelerating method of robotic grasp learning via pretraining with coarse affordance maps of objects to be grasped based on a quite small dataset. A model generated through pre-training is harnessed as an initialization policy to warmly start grasp learning so as to guide a robot to capture more effective rewards at the beginning of training. An object in its coarse affordance map is annotated with a single key point and thereby, the burden of labeling is greatly alleviated. Extensive experiments in simulation and on a real robot are conducted to evaluate the proposed method. The simulation results show that it can significantly accelerate grasp learning by nearly three times over a vanilla Deep Q-Network -based method. Its test on a real UR3 robot shows that it reaches a grasp success rate of 89.5% via only 500 times of grasp tries within about two hours, which is four times faster than its competitor. In addition, it enjoys an outstanding generalization ability to grasp prior-unseen novel objects. It outperforms some existing methods and has the potential to directly apply to a robot for real-world grasp learning tasks.
abstract_zh: 自监督的掌握学习，即通过试错来学习掌握，已经取得了长足的进步。然而，训练这样的模型仍然很耗时，并且在实践中应用也是一个挑战。这项工作提出了一种加速机器人抓取学习的方法，通过基于相当小的数据集对要抓取的对象的粗略可供图进行预训练。利用预训练生成的模型作为初始化策略来热启动抓取学习，从而引导机器人在训练开始时捕获更有效的奖励。粗略可供性图中的对象用单个关键点进行注释，从而大大减轻了标记的负担。在模拟和真实机器人上进行了大量实验来评估所提出的方法。模拟结果表明，与基于普通深度 Q 网络的方法相比，它可以显着地将掌握学习速度提高近三倍。在真实UR3机器人上的测试表明，在大约两个小时内仅尝试500次抓取，抓取成功率就达到了89.5%，比竞争对手快了四倍。此外，它还具有出色的泛化能力，能够抓住先前未见过的新物体。它优于一些现有方法，并且有可能直接应用于机器人执行现实世界的抓取学习任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过预训练粗略可操作性地图加速机器人抓取学习的方法。
AI.motivation: 基于试错的自监督抓取学习虽有进展，但训练耗时且难以实际应用，需更高效的方法。
AI.method: 利用少量数据预训练粗略可操作性地图，标注单关键点以降低标注成本，并用预训练模型初始化策略指导机器人快速学习。
AI.result: 仿真加速3倍，真实UR3机器人500次尝试达89.5%成功率，比竞品快4倍，且对新物体泛化能力强。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在效率和泛化性上优于现有技术，具备实际应用潜力。

authors_text: Valentina Arrigoni,Luisa Repele,Dario Marino Saccavino
title: TextMatcher: Cross-Attentional Neural Network to Compare Image and Text
title_zh: TextMatcher：用于比较图像和文本的交叉注意神经网络
comment: Accepted at the 25th International Conference on Discovery Science 2022, 15 pages
comments: Accepted at the 25th International Conference on Discovery Science 2022, 15 pages
abstract: We study a novel multimodal-learning problem, which we call text matching: given an image containing a single-line text and a candidate text transcription, the goal is to assess whether the text represented in the image corresponds to the candidate text. We devise the first machine-learning model specifically designed for this problem. The proposed model, termed TextMatcher, compares the two inputs by applying a cross-attention mechanism over the embedding representations of image and text, and it is trained in an end-to-end fashion. We extensively evaluate the empirical performance of TextMatcher on the popular IAM dataset. Results attest that, compared to a baseline and existing models designed for related problems, TextMatcher achieves higher performance on a variety of configurations, while at the same time running faster at inference time. We also showcase TextMatcher in a real-world application scenario concerning the automatic processing of bank cheques.
summary: We study a novel multimodal-learning problem, which we call text matching: given an image containing a single-line text and a candidate text transcription, the goal is to assess whether the text represented in the image corresponds to the candidate text. We devise the first machine-learning model specifically designed for this problem. The proposed model, termed TextMatcher, compares the two inputs by applying a cross-attention mechanism over the embedding representations of image and text, and it is trained in an end-to-end fashion. We extensively evaluate the empirical performance of TextMatcher on the popular IAM dataset. Results attest that, compared to a baseline and existing models designed for related problems, TextMatcher achieves higher performance on a variety of configurations, while at the same time running faster at inference time. We also showcase TextMatcher in a real-world application scenario concerning the automatic processing of bank cheques.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了一个新的多模态学习问题，我们将其称为文本匹配：给定包含单行文本和候选文本转录的图像，目标是评估图像中表示的文本是否对应于候选文本。我们设计了第一个专门针对这个问题的机器学习模型。所提出的模型称为 TextMatcher，通过在图像和文本的嵌入表示上应用交叉注意机制来比较两个输入，并以端到端的方式进行训练。我们广泛评估了 TextMatcher 在流行的 IAM 数据集上的实证性能。结果证明，与针对相关问题设计的基线和现有模型相比，TextMatcher 在各种配置上实现了更高的性能，同时在推理时运行得更快。我们还在有关银行支票自动处理的实际应用场景中展示了 TextMatcher。

AI.tldr: 提出一种名为TextMatcher的模型，用于判断图像中的文本是否与候选文本匹配。
AI.motivation: 现有模型在文本匹配任务中存在性能不足或速度慢的问题，需设计专用模型。
AI.method: 采用交叉注意力机制比较图像和文本嵌入，并通过端到端训练模型。
AI.result: 在IAM数据集上表现优于现有模型，且推理速度更快。
AI.conclusion: TextMatcher在文本匹配任务中有效，并成功应用于银行支票处理。

authors_text: Tal Peer,Simon Welker,Timo Gerkmann
title: Beyond Griffin-Lim: Improved Iterative Phase Retrieval for Speech
title_zh: 超越 Griffin-Lim：改进的语音迭代阶段检索
comment: Submitted to IWAENC 2022
comments: Submitted to IWAENC 2022
abstract: Phase retrieval is a problem encountered not only in speech and audio processing, but in many other fields such as optics. Iterative algorithms based on non-convex set projections are effective and frequently used for retrieving the phase when only STFT magnitudes are available. While the basic Griffin-Lim algorithm and its variants have been the prevalent method for decades, more recent advances, e.g. in optics, raise the question: Can we do better than Griffin-Lim for speech signals, using the same principle of iterative projection? In this paper we compare the classical algorithms in the speech domain with two modern methods from optics with respect to reconstruction quality and convergence rate. Based on this study, we propose to combine Griffin-Lim with the Difference Map algorithm in a hybrid approach which shows superior results, in terms of both convergence and quality of the final reconstruction.
summary: Phase retrieval is a problem encountered not only in speech and audio processing, but in many other fields such as optics. Iterative algorithms based on non-convex set projections are effective and frequently used for retrieving the phase when only STFT magnitudes are available. While the basic Griffin-Lim algorithm and its variants have been the prevalent method for decades, more recent advances, e.g. in optics, raise the question: Can we do better than Griffin-Lim for speech signals, using the same principle of iterative projection? In this paper we compare the classical algorithms in the speech domain with two modern methods from optics with respect to reconstruction quality and convergence rate. Based on this study, we propose to combine Griffin-Lim with the Difference Map algorithm in a hybrid approach which shows superior results, in terms of both convergence and quality of the final reconstruction.
abstract_zh: 相位恢复不仅是语音和音频处理中遇到的问题，而且是光学等许多其他领域遇到的问题。当只有 STFT 幅度可用时，基于非凸集投影的迭代算法非常有效并且经常用于检索相位。虽然基本的 Griffin-Lim 算法及其变体几十年来一直是流行的方法，但最近的进展，例如在光学领域，提出一个问题：使用相同的迭代投影原理，我们能否在语音信号方面做得比 Griffin-Lim 更好？在本文中，我们将语音领域的经典算法与光学领域的两种现代方法在重建质量和收敛速度方面进行了比较。基于这项研究，我们建议以混合方法将 Griffin-Lim 与差分图算法相结合，该方法在最终重建的收敛性和质量方面显示出优异的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的迭代相位检索方法，通过结合Griffin-Lim算法与Difference Map算法，提升语音信号的重建质量与收敛速度。
AI.motivation: 传统Griffin-Lim算法在语音相位检索中存在收敛速度慢和重建质量局限的问题，而光学领域的新方法可能提供更优解决方案。
AI.method: 比较经典算法与光学领域两种现代方法，提出混合算法将Griffin-Lim与Difference Map结合，利用迭代投影原理优化相位检索过程。
AI.result: 混合方法在重建质量与收敛速度上均优于传统Griffin-Lim算法及对比的光学方法。
AI.conclusion: 混合算法为语音相位检索提供了更高效、高质量的解决方案，证明了跨领域方法迁移的有效性。
