authors_text: Chenyu Zheng,Junjue Wang,Ailong Ma,Yanfei Zhong
title: AutoLC: Search Lightweight and Top-Performing Architecture for Remote Sensing Image Land-Cover Classification
title_zh: AutoLC：搜索用于遥感图像土地覆盖分类的轻量级和高性能架构
comment: Early accepted by ICPR 2022
comments: Early accepted by ICPR 2022
abstract: Land-cover classification has long been a hot and difficult challenge in remote sensing community. With massive High-resolution Remote Sensing (HRS) images available, manually and automatically designed Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) have already shown their great latent capacity on HRS land-cover classification in recent years. Especially, the former can achieve better performance while the latter is able to generate lightweight architecture. Unfortunately, they both have shortcomings. On the one hand, because manual CNNs are almost proposed for natural image processing, it becomes very redundant and inefficient to process HRS images. On the other hand, nascent Neural Architecture Search (NAS) techniques for dense prediction tasks are mainly based on encoder-decoder architecture, and just focus on the automatic design of the encoder, which makes it still difficult to recover the refined mapping when confronting complicated HRS scenes. To overcome their defects and tackle the HRS land-cover classification problems better, we propose AutoLC which combines the advantages of two methods. First, we devise a hierarchical search space and gain the lightweight encoder underlying gradient-based search strategy. Second, we meticulously design a lightweight but top-performing decoder that is adaptive to the searched encoder of itself. Finally, experimental results on the LoveDA land-cover dataset demonstrate that our AutoLC method outperforms the state-of-art manual and automatic methods with much less computational consumption.
summary: Land-cover classification has long been a hot and difficult challenge in remote sensing community. With massive High-resolution Remote Sensing (HRS) images available, manually and automatically designed Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) have already shown their great latent capacity on HRS land-cover classification in recent years. Especially, the former can achieve better performance while the latter is able to generate lightweight architecture. Unfortunately, they both have shortcomings. On the one hand, because manual CNNs are almost proposed for natural image processing, it becomes very redundant and inefficient to process HRS images. On the other hand, nascent Neural Architecture Search (NAS) techniques for dense prediction tasks are mainly based on encoder-decoder architecture, and just focus on the automatic design of the encoder, which makes it still difficult to recover the refined mapping when confronting complicated HRS scenes. To overcome their defects and tackle the HRS land-cover classification problems better, we propose AutoLC which combines the advantages of two methods. First, we devise a hierarchical search space and gain the lightweight encoder underlying gradient-based search strategy. Second, we meticulously design a lightweight but top-performing decoder that is adaptive to the searched encoder of itself. Finally, experimental results on the LoveDA land-cover dataset demonstrate that our AutoLC method outperforms the state-of-art manual and automatic methods with much less computational consumption.
abstract_zh: 土地覆盖分类长期以来一直是遥感界的热点和难点挑战。随着海量高分辨率遥感（HRS）图像的可用，手动和自动设计的卷积神经网络（CNN）近年来已经在HRS土地覆盖分类方面显示出其巨大的潜力。特别是，前者可以获得更好的性能，而后者能够生成轻量级架构。不幸的是，它们都有缺点。一方面，由于手动 CNN 几乎都是为自然图像处理而提出的，因此处理 HRS 图像变得非常冗余和低效。另一方面，新兴的用于密集预测任务的神经架构搜索（NAS）技术主要基于编码器-解码器架构，并且只关注编码器的自动设计，这使得在面对复杂的HRS场景时仍然难以恢复精细的映射。为了克服它们的缺陷并更好地解决HRS土地覆盖分类问题，我们提出了AutoLC，它结合了两种方法的优点。首先，我们设计一个分层搜索空间并获得基于梯度搜索策略的轻量级编码器。其次，我们精心设计了一个轻量级但性能最佳的解码器，它能够适应搜索到的编码器本身。最后，LoveDA 土地覆盖数据集的实验结果表明，我们的 AutoLC 方法优于最先进的手动和自动方法，且计算消耗少得多。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AutoLC方法，旨在为高分辨率遥感图像土地覆盖分类设计轻量且高性能的神经网络架构。
AI.motivation: 传统手动设计的CNN在处理高分辨率遥感图像时冗余低效，而现有自动架构搜索（NAS）方法在复杂场景下难以恢复精细映射，需结合两者优势。
AI.method: 构建分层搜索空间以通过梯度搜索获得轻量编码器，并设计自适应轻量解码器，实现编码器-解码器协同优化。
AI.result: 在LoveDA数据集上，AutoLC在保持较低计算消耗的同时，优于现有手动和自动方法。
AI.conclusion: AutoLC通过融合手动设计与自动搜索优势，有效解决了高分辨率遥感土地覆盖分类的性能与效率矛盾。

Especially, the former can achieve better performance while the latter is able to generate lightweight architecture. Unfortunately, they both have shortcomings. authors_text: Chang Shu
title: Pre-trained Language Models as Re-Annotators
title_zh: 作为重新注释器的预训练语言模型
comment: Thesis of Master of Science by Research (M.Res) in Linguistics with Distinction; University of Edinburgh, 2022; 107 pages
comments: Thesis of Master of Science by Research (M.Res) in Linguistics with Distinction; University of Edinburgh, 2022; 107 pages
abstract: Annotation noise is widespread in datasets, but manually revising a flawed corpus is time-consuming and error-prone. Hence, given the prior knowledge in Pre-trained Language Models and the expected uniformity across all annotations, we attempt to reduce annotation noise in the corpus through two tasks automatically: (1) Annotation Inconsistency Detection that indicates the credibility of annotations, and (2) Annotation Error Correction that rectifies the abnormal annotations. We investigate how to acquire semantic sensitive annotation representations from Pre-trained Language Models, expecting to embed the examples with identical annotations to the mutually adjacent positions even without fine-tuning. We proposed a novel credibility score to reveal the likelihood of annotation inconsistencies based on the neighbouring consistency. Then, we fine-tune the Pre-trained Language Models based classifier with cross-validation for annotation correction. The annotation corrector is further elaborated with two approaches: (1) soft labelling by Kernel Density Estimation and (2) a novel distant-peer contrastive loss. We study the re-annotation in relation extraction and create a new manually revised dataset, Re-DocRED, for evaluating document-level re-annotation. The proposed credibility scores show promising agreement with human revisions, achieving a Binary F1 of 93.4 and 72.5 in detecting inconsistencies on TACRED and DocRED respectively. Moreover, the neighbour-aware classifiers based on distant-peer contrastive learning and uncertain labels achieve Macro F1 up to 66.2 and 57.8 in correcting annotations on TACRED and DocRED respectively. These improvements are not merely theoretical: Rather, automatically denoised training sets demonstrate up to 3.6% performance improvement for state-of-the-art relation extraction models.
summary: Annotation noise is widespread in datasets, but manually revising a flawed corpus is time-consuming and error-prone. Hence, given the prior knowledge in Pre-trained Language Models and the expected uniformity across all annotations, we attempt to reduce annotation noise in the corpus through two tasks automatically: (1) Annotation Inconsistency Detection that indicates the credibility of annotations, and (2) Annotation Error Correction that rectifies the abnormal annotations. We investigate how to acquire semantic sensitive annotation representations from Pre-trained Language Models, expecting to embed the examples with identical annotations to the mutually adjacent positions even without fine-tuning. We proposed a novel credibility score to reveal the likelihood of annotation inconsistencies based on the neighbouring consistency. Then, we fine-tune the Pre-trained Language Models based classifier with cross-validation for annotation correction. The annotation corrector is further elaborated with two approaches: (1) soft labelling by Kernel Density Estimation and (2) a novel distant-peer contrastive loss. We study the re-annotation in relation extraction and create a new manually revised dataset, Re-DocRED, for evaluating document-level re-annotation. The proposed credibility scores show promising agreement with human revisions, achieving a Binary F1 of 93.4 and 72.5 in detecting inconsistencies on TACRED and DocRED respectively. Moreover, the neighbour-aware classifiers based on distant-peer contrastive learning and uncertain labels achieve Macro F1 up to 66.2 and 57.8 in correcting annotations on TACRED and DocRED respectively. These improvements are not merely theoretical: Rather, automatically denoised training sets demonstrate up to 3.6% performance improvement for state-of-the-art relation extraction models.
abstract_zh: 注释噪声在数据集中普遍存在，但手动修改有缺陷的语料库既耗时又容易出错。因此，考虑到预训练语言模型的先验知识和所有注释的预期一致性，我们尝试通过两个任务自动减少语料库中的注释噪声：（1）注释不一致检测，指示注释的可信度；（2）注释错误纠正，纠正异常注释。我们研究如何从预训练语言模型中获取语义敏感的注释表示，期望即使不进行微调，也可以将具有相同注释的示例嵌入到相互相邻的位置。我们提出了一种新颖的可信度评分，以揭示基于邻近一致性的注释不一致的可能性。然后，我们通过交叉验证对基于预训练语言模型的分类器进行微调以进行注释校正。注释校正器通过两种方法进一步阐述：（1）通过核密度估计进行软标记和（2）一种新颖的远程对等对比损失。我们研究关系提取中的重新注释，并创建一个新的手动修改的数据集 Re-DocRED，用于评估文档级重新注释。拟议的可信度分数显示出与人工修订的良好一致性，在检测 TACRED 和 DocRED 不一致方面分别实现了 93.4 和 72.5 的二进制 F1。此外，基于远程同行对比学习和不确定标签的邻居感知分类器在 TACRED 和 DocRED 上的注释校正方面分别实现了高达 66.2 和 57.8 的 Macro F1。这些改进不仅仅是理论上的：相反，自动去噪训练集展示了最先进的关系提取模型高达 3.6% 的性能改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用预训练语言模型自动检测并修正数据集中的标注噪声，通过标注不一致性检测和错误纠正任务提升关系抽取模型性能。
AI.motivation: 数据集标注噪声普遍存在，而人工修订成本高且易出错，需借助预训练模型的先验知识实现自动化标注优化。
AI.method: 提出标注不一致性检测（基于邻域一致性计算可信度评分）与错误纠正方法（结合软标签与远距离对对比损失），并构建新数据集Re-DocRED进行评估。
AI.result: 在TACRED和DocRED数据集上，不一致性检测二分类F1分别达93.4和72.5，标注修正宏F1分别达66.2和57.8，去噪后模型性能提升最高达3.6%。
AI.conclusion: 预训练模型可有效作为自动标注校正工具，其生成的去噪数据集显著提升关系抽取模型效果，具有实际应用价值。

search_text: Pre-trained Language Models as Re-Annotators 作为重新注释器的预训练语言模型 Annotation noise is widespread in datasets, but manually revising a flawed corpus is time-consuming and error-prone. Hence, given the prior knowledge in Pre-trained Language Models and the expected uniformity across all annotations, we attempt to reduce annotation noise in the corpus through two tasks automatically: (1) Annotation Inconsistency Detection that indicates the credibility of annotations, and (2) Annotation Error Correction that rectifies the abnormal annotations. We investigate how to acquire semantic sensitive annotation representations from Pre-trained Language Models, expecting to embed the examples with identical annotations to the mutually adjacent positions even without fine-tuning. We proposed a novel credibility score to reveal the likelihood of annotation inconsistencies based on the neighbouring consistency. Then, we fine-tune the Pre-trained Language Models based classifier with cross-validation for annotation correction. The annotation corrector is further elaborated with two approaches: (1) soft labelling by Kernel Density Estimation and (2) a novel distant-peer contrastive loss. We study the re-annotation in relation extraction and create a new manually revised dataset, Re-DocRED, for evaluating document-level re-annotation. The proposed credibility scores show promising agreement with human revisions, achieving a Binary F1 of 93.4 and 72.5 in detecting inconsistencies on TACRED and DocRED respectively. Moreover, the neighbour-aware classifiers based on distant-peer contrastive learning and uncertain labels achieve Macro F1 up to 66.2 and 57.8 in correcting annotations on TACRED and DocRED respectively. These improvements are not merely theoretical: Rather, automatically denoised training sets demonstrate up to 3.6% performance improvement for state-of-the-art relation extraction models. 注释噪声在数据集中普遍存在，但手动修改有缺陷的语料库既耗时又容易出错。因此，考虑到预训练语言模型的先验知识和所有注释的预期一致性，我们尝试通过两个任务自动减少语料库中的注释噪声：（1）注释不一致检测，指示注释的可信度；（2）注释错误纠正，纠正异常注释。我们研究如何从预训练语言模型中获取语义敏感的注释表示，期望即使不进行微调，也可以将具有相同注释的示例嵌入到相互相邻的位置。我们提出了一种新颖的可信度评分，以揭示基于邻近一致性的注释不一致的可能性。然后，我们通过交叉验证对基于预训练语言模型的分类器进行微调以进行注释校正。注释校正器通过两种方法进一步阐述：（1）通过核密度估计进行软标记和（2）一种新颖的远程对等对比损失。我们研究关系提取中的重新注释，并创建一个新的手动修改的数据集 Re-DocRED，用于评估文档级重新注释。拟议的可信度分数显示出与人工修订的良好一致性，在检测 TACRED 和 DocRED 不一致方面分别实现了 93.4 和 72.5 的二进制 F1。此外，基于远程同行对比学习和不确定标签的邻居感知分类器在 TACRED 和 DocRED 上的注释校正方面分别实现了高达 66.2 和 57.8 的 Macro F1。这些改进不仅仅是理论上的：相反，自动去噪训练集展示了最先进的关系提取模型高达 3.6% 的性能改进。 本文提出利用预训练语言模型自动检测并修正数据集中的标注噪声，通过标注不一致性检测和错误纠正任务提升关系抽取模型性能。 Chang Shu cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.HC,cs.LG

authors_text: Nicholas Spyrison,Dianne Cook,Przemyslaw Biecek
title: Exploring Local Explanations of Nonlinear Models Using Animated Linear Projections
title_zh: 使用动画线性投影探索非线性模型的局部解释
abstract: The increased predictive power of machine learning models comes at the cost of increased complexity and loss of interpretability, particularly in comparison to parametric statistical models. This trade-off has led to the emergence of eXplainable AI (XAI) which provides methods, such as local explanations (LEs) and local variable attributions (LVAs), to shed light on how a model use predictors to arrive at a prediction. These provide a point estimate of the linear variable importance in the vicinity of a single observation. However, LVAs tend not to effectively handle association between predictors. To understand how the interaction between predictors affects the variable importance estimate, we can convert LVAs into linear projections and use the radial tour. This is also useful for learning how a model has made a mistake, or the effect of outliers, or the clustering of observations. The approach is illustrated with examples from categorical (penguin species, chocolate types) and quantitative (soccer/football salaries, house prices) response models. The methods are implemented in the R package cheem, available on CRAN.
summary: The increased predictive power of machine learning models comes at the cost of increased complexity and loss of interpretability, particularly in comparison to parametric statistical models. This trade-off has led to the emergence of eXplainable AI (XAI) which provides methods, such as local explanations (LEs) and local variable attributions (LVAs), to shed light on how a model use predictors to arrive at a prediction. These provide a point estimate of the linear variable importance in the vicinity of a single observation. However, LVAs tend not to effectively handle association between predictors. To understand how the interaction between predictors affects the variable importance estimate, we can convert LVAs into linear projections and use the radial tour. This is also useful for learning how a model has made a mistake, or the effect of outliers, or the clustering of observations. The approach is illustrated with examples from categorical (penguin species, chocolate types) and quantitative (soccer/football salaries, house prices) response models. The methods are implemented in the R package cheem, available on CRAN.
abstract_zh: 机器学习模型预测能力的增强是以复杂性增加和可解释性丧失为代价的，特别是与参数统计模型相比。这种权衡导致了 eXplainable AI (XAI) 的出现，它提供了局部解释 (LE) 和局部变量归因 (LVA) 等方法，以阐明模型如何使用预测器来达成预测。这些提供了单个观测值附近线性变量重要性的点估计。然而，LVAs 往往无法有效处理预测变量之间的关联。为了了解预测变量之间的相互作用如何影响变量重要性估计，我们可以将 LVA 转换为线性投影并使用径向游览。这对于了解模型如何出错、异常值的影响或观察结果的聚类也很有用。该方法通过分类（企鹅种类、巧克力类型）和定量（足球工资、房价）响应模型的示例进行说明。这些方法在 CRAN 上可用的 R 包 Cheem 中实现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过动态线性投影方法探索非线性模型的局部解释，以解决局部变量归因（LVAs）在处理预测变量关联性方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 机器学习模型的复杂性提升导致可解释性下降，传统LVAs难以有效分析变量间相互作用对预测的影响，需改进方法以增强模型解释性。
AI.method: 将LVAs转化为线性投影并结合径向图（radial tour）技术，可视化变量相互作用对局部解释的影响，通过R包cheem实现该方法。
AI.result: 方法在分类（如企鹅物种分类）和定量（如房价预测）任务中验证有效，可揭示模型预测错误、离群点效应及数据聚类特征。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为理解非线性模型的局部决策机制提供了新工具，有助于提升XAI技术对变量关联性的解释能力。

authors_text: Xuenan Xu,Zeyu Xie,Mengyue Wu,Kai Yu
title: Beyond the Status Quo: A Contemporary Survey of Advances and Challenges in Audio Captioning
title_zh: 超越现状：音频字幕的进步和挑战的当代调查
abstract: Automated audio captioning (AAC), a task that mimics human perception as well as innovatively links audio processing and natural language processing, has overseen much progress over the last few years. AAC requires recognizing contents such as the environment, sound events and the temporal relationships between sound events and describing these elements with a fluent sentence. Currently, an encoder-decoder-based deep learning framework is the standard approach to tackle this problem. Plenty of works have proposed novel network architectures and training schemes, including extra guidance, reinforcement learning, audio-text self-supervised learning and diverse or controllable captioning. Effective data augmentation techniques, especially based on large language models are explored. Benchmark datasets and AAC-oriented evaluation metrics also accelerate the improvement of this field. This paper situates itself as a comprehensive survey covering the comparison between AAC and its related tasks, the existing deep learning techniques, datasets, and the evaluation metrics in AAC, with insights provided to guide potential future research directions.
summary: Automated audio captioning (AAC), a task that mimics human perception as well as innovatively links audio processing and natural language processing, has overseen much progress over the last few years. AAC requires recognizing contents such as the environment, sound events and the temporal relationships between sound events and describing these elements with a fluent sentence. Currently, an encoder-decoder-based deep learning framework is the standard approach to tackle this problem. Plenty of works have proposed novel network architectures and training schemes, including extra guidance, reinforcement learning, audio-text self-supervised learning and diverse or controllable captioning. Effective data augmentation techniques, especially based on large language models are explored. Benchmark datasets and AAC-oriented evaluation metrics also accelerate the improvement of this field. This paper situates itself as a comprehensive survey covering the comparison between AAC and its related tasks, the existing deep learning techniques, datasets, and the evaluation metrics in AAC, with insights provided to guide potential future research directions.
abstract_zh: 自动音频字幕 (AAC) 是一项模仿人类感知并创新地将音频处理和自然语言处理联系起来的任务，在过去几年中取得了很大进展。 AAC要求识别环境、声音事件以及声音事件之间的时间关系等内容，并用流利的句子描述这些元素。目前，基于编码器-解码器的深度学习框架是解决该问题的标准方法。许多工作提出了新颖的网络架构和训练方案，包括额外指导、强化学习、音频文本自监督学习和多样化或可控字幕。探索了有效的数据增强技术，特别是基于大型语言模型的技术。基准数据集和面向AAC的评估指标也加速了该领域的改进。本文将自己定位为一项全面的调查，涵盖了 AAC 及其相关任务、现有深度学习技术、数据集和 AAC 评估指标之间的比较，并提供了指导未来潜在研究方向的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文全面综述了音频字幕生成领域的最新进展与挑战，比较了相关技术、数据集及评估指标，并探讨未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 现有研究分散，缺乏系统性总结，需梳理技术演进、挑战及未来方向以促进领域发展。
AI.method: 通过文献综述与比较分析，总结深度学习技术、数据集、评估指标，并对比AAC与相关任务异同。
AI.result: 系统梳理了AAC技术路线、数据资源及评估体系，指出现有方法的局限性与改进方向。

search_text: Beyond the Status Quo: A Contemporary Survey of Advances and Challenges in Audio Captioning 超越现状：音频字幕的进步和挑战的当代调查 Automated audio captioning (AAC), a task that mimics human perception as well as innovatively links audio processing and natural language processing, has overseen much progress over the last few years. AAC requires recognizing contents such as the environment, sound events and the temporal relationships between sound events and describing these elements with a fluent sentence. Currently, an encoder-decoder-based deep learning framework is the standard approach to tackle this problem. Plenty of works have proposed novel network architectures and training schemes, including extra guidance, reinforcement learning, audio-text self-supervised learning and diverse or controllable captioning. Effective data augmentation techniques, especially based on large language models are explored. Benchmark datasets and AAC-oriented evaluation metrics also accelerate the improvement of this field. This paper situates itself as a comprehensive survey covering the comparison between AAC and its related tasks, the existing deep learning techniques, datasets, and the evaluation metrics in AAC, with insights provided to guide potential future research directions. 自动音频字幕 (AAC) 是一项模仿人类感知并创新地将音频处理和自然语言处理联系起来的任务，在过去几年中取得了很大进展。 AAC要求识别环境、声音事件以及声音事件之间的时间关系等内容，并用流利的句子描述这些元素。目前，基于编码器-解码器的深度学习框架是解决该问题的标准方法。许多工作提出了新颖的网络架构和训练方案，包括额外指导、强化学习、音频文本自监督学习和多样化或可控字幕。探索了有效的数据增强技术，特别是基于大型语言模型的技术。基准数据集和面向AAC的评估指标也加速了该领域的改进。本文将自己定位为一项全面的调查，涵盖了 AAC 及其相关任务、现有深度学习技术、数据集和 AAC 评估指标之间的比较，并提供了指导未来潜在研究方向的见解。 本文全面综述了音频字幕生成领域的最新进展与挑战，比较了相关技术、数据集及评估指标，并探讨未来研究方向。 Xuenan Xu,Zeyu Xie,Mengyue Wu,Kai Yu cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Janghyeon Kim,Dae Han Sim,Ho-Jin Jung,Ji-Hyeon Yoo,Changjae Lee,Han Ul Yoon
title: Human-Robot Interface to Operate Robotic Systems via Muscle Synergy-Based Kinodynamic Information Transfer
title_zh: 通过基于肌肉协同的运动动力学信息传输来操作机器人系统的人机界面
comment: 4 pages, 8 figures, 1 table, in Proceedings of the 19th Conference on Ubiquitous Robots(UR), July 4-6, 2022, Jeju, Korea
comments: 4 pages, 8 figures, 1 table, in Proceedings of the 19th Conference on Ubiquitous Robots(UR), July 4-6, 2022, Jeju, Korea
abstract: When a human performs a given specific task, it has been known that the central nervous system controls modularized muscle group, which is called muscle synergy. For human-robot interface design problem, therefore, the muscle synergy can be utilized to reduce the dimensionality of control signal as well as the complexity of classifying human posture and motion. In this paper, we propose an approach to design a human-robot interface which enables a human operator to transfer a kinodynamic control command to robotic systems. A key feature of the proposed approach is that the muscle synergy and corresponding activation curve are employed to calculate a force generated by a tool at the robot end effector. A test bed for experiments consisted of two armband type surface electromyography sensors, an RGB-d camera, and a Kinova Gen2 robotic manipulator to verify the proposed approach. The result showed that both force and position commands could be successfully transferred to the robotic manipulator via our muscle synergy-based kinodynamic interface.
summary: When a human performs a given specific task, it has been known that the central nervous system controls modularized muscle group, which is called muscle synergy. For human-robot interface design problem, therefore, the muscle synergy can be utilized to reduce the dimensionality of control signal as well as the complexity of classifying human posture and motion. In this paper, we propose an approach to design a human-robot interface which enables a human operator to transfer a kinodynamic control command to robotic systems. A key feature of the proposed approach is that the muscle synergy and corresponding activation curve are employed to calculate a force generated by a tool at the robot end effector. A test bed for experiments consisted of two armband type surface electromyography sensors, an RGB-d camera, and a Kinova Gen2 robotic manipulator to verify the proposed approach. The result showed that both force and position commands could be successfully transferred to the robotic manipulator via our muscle synergy-based kinodynamic interface.
abstract_zh: 当人类执行特定任务时，中枢神经系统控制模块化肌肉群，这称为肌肉协同作用。因此，对于人机界面设计问题，可以利用肌肉协同作用来降低控制信号的维数以及对人体姿势和运动进行分类的复杂性。在本文中，我们提出了一种设计人机界面的方法，该方法使人类操作员能够将运动动力学控制命令传递给机器人系统。该方法的一个关键特征是采用肌肉协同作用和相应的激活曲线来计算机器人末端执行器上的工具产生的力。实验测试台由两个臂带型表面肌电传感器、一个 RGB-d 相机和一个 Kinova Gen2 机器人操纵器组成，以验证所提出的方法。结果表明，力和位置命令都可以通过我们基于肌肉协同的运动动力学接口成功传输到机器人操纵器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于肌肉协同的运动动力学信息传输方法，设计人类与机器人交互接口，实现人类操作者通过肌肉信号控制机械臂的力与位置指令。
AI.motivation: 人类中枢神经系统通过模块化肌肉协同控制运动，利用此特性可降低控制信号维度和姿态分类复杂度，从而优化人机交互接口设计。
AI.method: 通过肌电信号传感器采集肌肉协同模式及激活曲线，结合RGB-d相机和Kinova Gen2机械臂实验平台，计算机械臂末端执行器的受力并实现动力学控制指令传输。
AI.result: 实验验证了基于肌肉协同的接口能够成功将力与位置指令传递至机械臂，证明方法在人机交互中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 肌肉协同模式可作为高效的人机控制信号传输途径，为下一代直观化机器人交互接口设计提供新思路。

authors_text: Ye Tang,Xuesong Yang,Xinrui Liu,Xiwei Zhao,Zhangang Lin,Changping Peng
title: NDGGNET-A Node Independent Gate based Graph Neural Networks
title_zh: NDGGNET-基于节点独立门的图神经网络
abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) is an architecture for structural data, and has been adopted in a mass of tasks and achieved fabulous results, such as link prediction, node classification, graph classification and so on. Generally, for a certain node in a given graph, a traditional GNN layer can be regarded as an aggregation from one-hop neighbors, thus a set of stacked layers are able to fetch and update node status within multi-hops. For nodes with sparse connectivity, it is difficult to obtain enough information through a single GNN layer as not only there are only few nodes directly connected to them but also can not propagate the high-order neighbor information. However, as the number of layer increases, the GNN model is prone to over-smooth for nodes with the dense connectivity, which resulting in the decrease of accuracy. To tackle this issue, in this thesis, we define a novel framework that allows the normal GNN model to accommodate more layers. Specifically, a node-degree based gate is employed to adjust weight of layers dynamically, that try to enhance the information aggregation ability and reduce the probability of over-smoothing. Experimental results show that our proposed model can effectively increase the model depth and perform well on several datasets.
summary: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) is an architecture for structural data, and has been adopted in a mass of tasks and achieved fabulous results, such as link prediction, node classification, graph classification and so on. Generally, for a certain node in a given graph, a traditional GNN layer can be regarded as an aggregation from one-hop neighbors, thus a set of stacked layers are able to fetch and update node status within multi-hops. For nodes with sparse connectivity, it is difficult to obtain enough information through a single GNN layer as not only there are only few nodes directly connected to them but also can not propagate the high-order neighbor information. However, as the number of layer increases, the GNN model is prone to over-smooth for nodes with the dense connectivity, which resulting in the decrease of accuracy. To tackle this issue, in this thesis, we define a novel framework that allows the normal GNN model to accommodate more layers. Specifically, a node-degree based gate is employed to adjust weight of layers dynamically, that try to enhance the information aggregation ability and reduce the probability of over-smoothing. Experimental results show that our proposed model can effectively increase the model depth and perform well on several datasets.
abstract_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）是一种用于结构数据的架构，已在大量任务中得到采用并取得了惊人的结果，例如链路预测、节点分类、图分类等。一般来说，对于给定图中的某个节点，传统的 GNN 层可以被视为来自单跳邻居的聚合，因此一组堆叠层能够在多跳内获取和更新节点状态。对于连接稀疏的节点，很难通过单个 GNN 层获得足够的信息，因为不仅直接连接到它们的节点很少，而且无法传播高阶邻居信息。然而，随着层数的增加，GNN模型对于连接密集的节点很容易出现过度平滑的情况，从而导致精度下降。为了解决这个问题，在本文中，我们定义了一个新颖的框架，允许普通的 GNN 模型容纳更多层。具体来说，采用基于节点度的门来动态调整层的权重，以增强信息聚合能力并降低过度平滑的可能性。实验结果表明，我们提出的模型可以有效增加模型深度，并且在多个数据集上表现良好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于节点独立门控的图神经网络框架NDGGNET，解决传统GNN模型层数受限导致的性能问题。
AI.motivation: 传统GNN在稀疏连接节点信息不足且层数增加时易出现过平滑现象，导致模型准确率下降。
AI.method: 设计节点度数门控机制动态调整各层权重，增强信息聚合能力并抑制过平滑。
AI.result: 实验表明该模型有效提升网络深度，在多个数据集上取得良好性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 提出的门控框架成功平衡了模型深度与过平滑问题，为GNN发展提供新思路。

To tackle this issue, in this thesis, we define a novel framework that allows the normal GNN model to accommodate more layers. Specifically, a node-degree based gate is employed to adjust weight of layers dynamically, that try to enhance the information aggregation ability and reduce the probability of over-smoothing. Experimental results show that our proposed model can effectively increase the model depth and perform well on several datasets. 图神经网络（GNN）是一种用于结构数据的架构，已在大量任务中得到采用并取得了惊人的结果，例如链路预测、节点分类、图分类等。一般来说，对于给定图中的某个节点，传统的 GNN 层可以被视为来自单跳邻居的聚合，因此一组堆叠层能够在多跳内获取和更新节点状态。对于连接稀疏的节点，很难通过单个 GNN 层获得足够的信息，因为不仅直接连接到它们的节点很少，而且无法传播高阶邻居信息。然而，随着层数的增加，GNN模型对于连接密集的节点很容易出现过度平滑的情况，从而导致精度下降。为了解决这个问题，在本文中，我们定义了一个新颖的框架，允许普通的 GNN 模型容纳更多层。具体来说，采用基于节点度的门来动态调整层的权重，以增强信息聚合能力并降低过度平滑的可能性。实验结果表明，我们提出的模型可以有效增加模型深度，并且在多个数据集上表现良好。 本文提出一种基于节点独立门控的图神经网络框架NDGGNET，解决传统GNN模型层数受限导致的性能问题。 Ye Tang,Xuesong Yang,Xinrui Liu,Xiwei Zhao,Zhangang Lin,Changping Peng cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Junjie Hu,Chenyu Bao,Mete Ozay,Chenyou Fan,Qing Gao,Honghai Liu,Tin Lun Lam
title: Deep Depth Completion from Extremely Sparse Data: A Survey
title_zh: 从极其稀疏的数据中进行深度补全：一项调查
abstract: Depth completion aims at predicting dense pixel-wise depth from an extremely sparse map captured from a depth sensor, e.g., LiDARs. It plays an essential role in various applications such as autonomous driving, 3D reconstruction, augmented reality, and robot navigation. Recent successes on the task have been demonstrated and dominated by deep learning based solutions. In this article, for the first time, we provide a comprehensive literature review that helps readers better grasp the research trends and clearly understand the current advances. We investigate the related studies from the design aspects of network architectures, loss functions, benchmark datasets, and learning strategies with a proposal of a novel taxonomy that categorizes existing methods. Besides, we present a quantitative comparison of model performance on three widely used benchmarks, including indoor and outdoor datasets. Finally, we discuss the challenges of prior works and provide readers with some insights for future research directions.
summary: Depth completion aims at predicting dense pixel-wise depth from an extremely sparse map captured from a depth sensor, e.g., LiDARs. It plays an essential role in various applications such as autonomous driving, 3D reconstruction, augmented reality, and robot navigation. Recent successes on the task have been demonstrated and dominated by deep learning based solutions. In this article, for the first time, we provide a comprehensive literature review that helps readers better grasp the research trends and clearly understand the current advances. We investigate the related studies from the design aspects of network architectures, loss functions, benchmark datasets, and learning strategies with a proposal of a novel taxonomy that categorizes existing methods. Besides, we present a quantitative comparison of model performance on three widely used benchmarks, including indoor and outdoor datasets. Finally, we discuss the challenges of prior works and provide readers with some insights for future research directions.
abstract_zh: 深度补全旨在从深度传感器（例如激光雷达）捕获的极其稀疏的地图中预测密集的像素级深度。它在自动驾驶、3D重建、增强现实、机器人导航等各种应用中发挥着重要作用。最近该任务的成功已被基于深度学习的解决方案所证明和主导。在本文中，我们首次提供全面的文献综述，帮助读者更好地把握研究趋势并清楚地了解当前的进展。我们从网络架构、损失函数、基准数据集和学习策略的设计方面研究了相关研究，并提出了一种对现有方法进行分类的新分类法。此外，我们还对三个广泛使用的基准（包括室内和室外数据集）上的模型性能进行了定量比较。最后，我们讨论了先前工作的挑战，并为读者提供了对未来研究方向的一些见解。

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了基于深度学习的稀疏深度图补全方法，提出新型分类体系并比较主流模型性能。
AI.motivation: 深度补全技术对自动驾驶等应用至关重要，但现有研究缺乏系统性梳理与方法论分类，亟需总结技术演进与未来方向。
AI.method: 从网络架构设计、损失函数优化、基准数据集和学习策略四个维度构建分类体系，基于KITTI、NYUDv2等三个数据集进行定量实验对比。
AI.result: 归纳出12类主流方法，揭示深度学习范式下特征融合、多尺度处理等关键技术趋势，发现现有方法在动态场景和极端光照下的性能瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: 当前研究需突破稀疏点云建模局限，加强跨模态感知与物理约束建模，未来应关注实时性优化与小样本学习等方向。

authors_text: Enrico Zardini,Enrico Blanzieri,Davide Pastorello
title: Implementation and Empirical Evaluation of a Quantum Machine Learning Pipeline for Local Classification
title_zh: 用于局部分类的量子机器学习管道的实现和实证评估
comment: 33 pages, 8 figures, 9 tables
comments: 33 pages, 8 figures, 9 tables
abstract: In the current era, quantum resources are extremely limited, and this makes difficult the usage of quantum machine learning (QML) models. Concerning the supervised tasks, a viable approach is the introduction of a quantum locality technique, which allows the models to focus only on the neighborhood of the considered element. A well-known locality technique is the k-nearest neighbors (k-NN) algorithm, of which several quantum variants have been proposed. Nevertheless, they have not been employed yet as a preliminary step of other QML models, whereas the classical counterpart has already proven successful. In this paper, we present (i) an implementation in Python of a QML pipeline for local classification, and (ii) its extensive empirical evaluation. Specifically, the quantum pipeline, developed using Qiskit, consists of a quantum k-NN and a quantum binary classifier. The results have shown the quantum pipeline's equivalence (in terms of accuracy) to its classical counterpart in the ideal case, the validity of locality's application to the QML realm, but also the strong sensitivity of the chosen quantum k-NN to probability fluctuations and the better performance of classical baseline methods like the random forest.
summary: In the current era, quantum resources are extremely limited, and this makes difficult the usage of quantum machine learning (QML) models. Concerning the supervised tasks, a viable approach is the introduction of a quantum locality technique, which allows the models to focus only on the neighborhood of the considered element. A well-known locality technique is the k-nearest neighbors (k-NN) algorithm, of which several quantum variants have been proposed. Nevertheless, they have not been employed yet as a preliminary step of other QML models, whereas the classical counterpart has already proven successful. In this paper, we present (i) an implementation in Python of a QML pipeline for local classification, and (ii) its extensive empirical evaluation. Specifically, the quantum pipeline, developed using Qiskit, consists of a quantum k-NN and a quantum binary classifier. The results have shown the quantum pipeline's equivalence (in terms of accuracy) to its classical counterpart in the ideal case, the validity of locality's application to the QML realm, but also the strong sensitivity of the chosen quantum k-NN to probability fluctuations and the better performance of classical baseline methods like the random forest.
abstract_zh: 在当今时代，量子资源极其有限，这使得量子机器学习（QML）模型的使用变得困难。关于监督任务，一种可行的方法是引入量子局域性技术，该技术允许模型仅关注所考虑元素的邻域。一种著名的局部性技术是 k 最近邻 (k-NN) 算法，已经提出了该算法的几种量子变体。然而，它们还没有被用作其他 QML 模型的初步步骤，而经典的对应模型已经被证明是成功的。在本文中，我们提出了 (i) 用于局部分类的 QML 管道的 Python 实现，以及 (ii) 其广泛的实证评估。具体来说，使用 Qiskit 开发的量子管道由量子 k-NN 和量子二元分类器组成。结果表明，量子管道在理想情况下与其经典对应物等效（在准确度方面）、局域性在 QML 领域应用的有效性、所选量子 k-NN 对概率波动的强敏感性以及随机森林等经典基线方法的更好性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出并评估了一个基于量子k近邻和量子二分类器的量子机器学习管道，用于局部分类任务。
AI.motivation: 量子资源有限导致量子机器学习模型应用困难，而经典局部方法（如k-NN）已被证明有效，因此探索量子局部技术的可行性具有重要意义。
AI.method: 使用Python和Qiskit框架实现量子k-NN与量子二分类器组成的管道，并在多个数据集上进行实验对比。
AI.result: 量子管道在理想情况下与经典方法准确率相当，但对概率波动敏感，经典基线方法（如随机森林）表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 量子局部分类方法在理论上可行，但需解决稳定性问题，目前经典方法仍具优势。

authors_text: Mathieu Fontaine,Kouhei Sekiguchi,Aditya Nugraha,Yoshiaki Bando,Kazuyoshi Yoshii
title: Generalized Fast Multichannel Nonnegative Matrix Factorization Based on Gaussian Scale Mixtures for Blind Source Separation
title_zh: 基于高斯尺度混合的广义快速多通道非负矩阵分解盲源分离
comment: ef:IEEE/ACM Transactions on Audio, Speech and Language Processing, Institute of Electrical and Electronics Engineers, 2022, pp.1-1
comments: ef:IEEE/ACM Transactions on Audio, Speech and Language Processing, Institute of Electrical and Electronics Engineers, 2022, pp.1-1
abstract: This paper describes heavy-tailed extensions of a state-of-the-art versatile blind source separation method called fast multichannel nonnegative matrix factorization (FastMNMF) from a unified point of view. The common way of deriving such an extension is to replace the multivariate complex Gaussian distribution in the likelihood function with its heavy-tailed generalization, e.g., the multivariate complex Student's t and leptokurtic generalized Gaussian distributions, and tailor-make the corresponding parameter optimization algorithm. Using a wider class of heavy-tailed distributions called a Gaussian scale mixture (GSM), i.e., a mixture of Gaussian distributions whose variances are perturbed by positive random scalars called impulse variables, we propose GSM-FastMNMF and develop an expectationmaximization algorithm that works even when the probability density function of the impulse variables have no analytical expressions. We show that existing heavy-tailed FastMNMF extensions are instances of GSM-FastMNMF and derive a new instance based on the generalized hyperbolic distribution that include the normal-inverse Gaussian, Student's t, and Gaussian distributions as the special cases. Our experiments show that the normalinverse Gaussian FastMNMF outperforms the state-of-the-art FastMNMF extensions and ILRMA model in speech enhancement and separation in terms of the signal-to-distortion ratio.
summary: This paper describes heavy-tailed extensions of a state-of-the-art versatile blind source separation method called fast multichannel nonnegative matrix factorization (FastMNMF) from a unified point of view. The common way of deriving such an extension is to replace the multivariate complex Gaussian distribution in the likelihood function with its heavy-tailed generalization, e.g., the multivariate complex Student's t and leptokurtic generalized Gaussian distributions, and tailor-make the corresponding parameter optimization algorithm. Using a wider class of heavy-tailed distributions called a Gaussian scale mixture (GSM), i.e., a mixture of Gaussian distributions whose variances are perturbed by positive random scalars called impulse variables, we propose GSM-FastMNMF and develop an expectationmaximization algorithm that works even when the probability density function of the impulse variables have no analytical expressions. We show that existing heavy-tailed FastMNMF extensions are instances of GSM-FastMNMF and derive a new instance based on the generalized hyperbolic distribution that include the normal-inverse Gaussian, Student's t, and Gaussian distributions as the special cases. Our experiments show that the normalinverse Gaussian FastMNMF outperforms the state-of-the-art FastMNMF extensions and ILRMA model in speech enhancement and separation in terms of the signal-to-distortion ratio.
abstract_zh: 本文从统一的角度描述了一种最先进的多功能盲源分离方法的重尾扩展，称为快速多通道非负矩阵分解（FastMNMF）。推导这种扩展的常用方法是用其重尾泛化（例如多元复数Student's t和尖峰广义高斯分布）替代似然函数中的多元复高斯分布，并定制相应的参数优化算法。使用更广泛的重尾分布，称为高斯尺度混合（GSM），即其方差受到称为脉冲变量的正随机标量扰动的高斯分布的混合，我们提出了 GSM-FastMNMF 并开发了一种期望最大化算法，即使在脉冲变量的概率密度函数没有解析表达式时也能工作。我们证明现有的重尾 FastMNMF 扩展是 GSM-FastMNMF 的实例，并基于广义双曲分布派生一个新实例，其中包括正态逆高斯分布、学生 t 分布和高斯分布作为特殊情况。我们的实验表明，就信噪比而言，正态逆高斯 FastMNMF 在语音增强和分离方面优于最先进的 FastMNMF 扩展和 ILRMA 模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于高斯尺度混合模型的广义快速多通道非负矩阵分解方法（GSM-FastMNMF），用于盲源分离任务。
AI.motivation: 现有FastMNMF方法在处理重尾噪声时表现不足，需更灵活的分布假设以提升分离效果。
AI.method: 通过引入高斯尺度混合（GSM）分布框架，结合期望最大化算法，统一处理多种重尾分布，并提出基于广义超几何分布的新实例。
AI.result: 实验表明，基于正态反高斯分布的GSM-FastMNMF在语音增强和分离任务中，信噪比优于现有FastMNMF扩展方法和ILRMA模型。
AI.conclusion: GSM-FastMNMF通过统一框架提升了盲源分离的鲁棒性，为处理复杂噪声场景提供了更灵活的解决方案。

search_text: Generalized Fast Multichannel Nonnegative Matrix Factorization Based on Gaussian Scale Mixtures for Blind Source Separation 基于高斯尺度混合的广义快速多通道非负矩阵分解盲源分离 This paper describes heavy-tailed extensions of a state-of-the-art versatile blind source separation method called fast multichannel nonnegative matrix factorization (FastMNMF) from a unified point of view. The common way of deriving such an extension is to replace the multivariate complex Gaussian distribution in the likelihood function with its heavy-tailed generalization, e.g., the multivariate complex Student's t and leptokurtic generalized Gaussian distributions, and tailor-make the corresponding parameter optimization algorithm. Using a wider class of heavy-tailed distributions called a Gaussian scale mixture (GSM), i.e., a mixture of Gaussian distributions whose variances are perturbed by positive random scalars called impulse variables, we propose GSM-FastMNMF and develop an expectationmaximization algorithm that works even when the probability density function of the impulse variables have no analytical expressions. We show that existing heavy-tailed FastMNMF extensions are instances of GSM-FastMNMF and derive a new instance based on the generalized hyperbolic distribution that include the normal-inverse Gaussian, Student's t, and Gaussian distributions as the special cases. Our experiments show that the normalinverse Gaussian FastMNMF outperforms the state-of-the-art FastMNMF extensions and ILRMA model in speech enhancement and separation in terms of the signal-to-distortion ratio. 本文从统一的角度描述了一种最先进的多功能盲源分离方法的重尾扩展，称为快速多通道非负矩阵分解（FastMNMF）。推导这种扩展的常用方法是用其重尾泛化（例如多元复数Student's t和尖峰广义高斯分布）替代似然函数中的多元复高斯分布，并定制相应的参数优化算法。使用更广泛的重尾分布，称为高斯尺度混合（GSM），即其方差受到称为脉冲变量的正随机标量扰动的高斯分布的混合，我们提出了 GSM-FastMNMF 并开发了一种期望最大化算法，即使在脉冲变量的概率密度函数没有解析表达式时也能工作。我们证明现有的重尾 FastMNMF 扩展是 GSM-FastMNMF 的实例，并基于广义双曲分布派生一个新实例，其中包括正态逆高斯分布、学生 t 分布和高斯分布作为特殊情况。我们的实验表明，就信噪比而言，正态逆高斯 FastMNMF 在语音增强和分离方面优于最先进的 FastMNMF 扩展和 ILRMA 模型。 本文提出基于高斯尺度混合模型的广义快速多通道非负矩阵分解方法（GSM-FastMNMF），用于盲源分离任务。 Mathieu Fontaine,Kouhei Sekiguchi,Aditya Nugraha,Yoshiaki Bando,Kazuyoshi Yoshii cs.SD,eess.AS,eess.SP,stat.ML

authors_text: Shi-Xue Zhang,Chun Yang,Xiaobin Zhu,Xu-Cheng Yin
title: Arbitrary Shape Text Detection via Boundary Transformer
title_zh: 通过边界变换器进行任意形状文本检测
comment: It is an extend version (TextBPN++) to our preliminary conference version TextBPN(ICCV 2021) [arXiv:2107.12664], which has been accepted by IEEE Transactions on Multimedia (T-MM 2023)
comments: It is an extend version (TextBPN++) to our preliminary conference version TextBPN(ICCV 2021) [arXiv:2107.12664], which has been accepted by IEEE Transactions on Multimedia (T-MM 2023)
abstract: In arbitrary shape text detection, locating accurate text boundaries is challenging and non-trivial. Existing methods often suffer from indirect text boundary modeling or complex post-processing. In this paper, we systematically present a unified coarse-to-fine framework via boundary learning for arbitrary shape text detection, which can accurately and efficiently locate text boundaries without post-processing. In our method, we explicitly model the text boundary via an innovative iterative boundary transformer in a coarse-to-fine manner. In this way, our method can directly gain accurate text boundaries and abandon complex post-processing to improve efficiency. Specifically, our method mainly consists of a feature extraction backbone, a boundary proposal module, and an iteratively optimized boundary transformer module. The boundary proposal module consisting of multi-layer dilated convolutions will compute important prior information (including classification map, distance field, and direction field) for generating coarse boundary proposals while guiding the boundary transformer's optimization. The boundary transformer module adopts an encoder-decoder structure, in which the encoder is constructed by multi-layer transformer blocks with residual connection while the decoder is a simple multi-layer perceptron network (MLP). Under the guidance of prior information, the boundary transformer module will gradually refine the coarse boundary proposals via iterative boundary deformation. Furthermore, we propose a novel boundary energy loss (BEL) which introduces an energy minimization constraint and an energy monotonically decreasing constraint to further optimize and stabilize the learning of boundary refinement. Extensive experiments on publicly available and challenging datasets demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance and promising efficiency of our method.
summary: In arbitrary shape text detection, locating accurate text boundaries is challenging and non-trivial. Existing methods often suffer from indirect text boundary modeling or complex post-processing. In this paper, we systematically present a unified coarse-to-fine framework via boundary learning for arbitrary shape text detection, which can accurately and efficiently locate text boundaries without post-processing. In our method, we explicitly model the text boundary via an innovative iterative boundary transformer in a coarse-to-fine manner. In this way, our method can directly gain accurate text boundaries and abandon complex post-processing to improve efficiency. Specifically, our method mainly consists of a feature extraction backbone, a boundary proposal module, and an iteratively optimized boundary transformer module. The boundary proposal module consisting of multi-layer dilated convolutions will compute important prior information (including classification map, distance field, and direction field) for generating coarse boundary proposals while guiding the boundary transformer's optimization. The boundary transformer module adopts an encoder-decoder structure, in which the encoder is constructed by multi-layer transformer blocks with residual connection while the decoder is a simple multi-layer perceptron network (MLP). Under the guidance of prior information, the boundary transformer module will gradually refine the coarse boundary proposals via iterative boundary deformation. Furthermore, we propose a novel boundary energy loss (BEL) which introduces an energy minimization constraint and an energy monotonically decreasing constraint to further optimize and stabilize the learning of boundary refinement. Extensive experiments on publicly available and challenging datasets demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance and promising efficiency of our method.
abstract_zh: 在任意形状的文本检测中，定位准确的文本边界具有挑战性且并非易事。现有方法经常受到间接文本边界建模或复杂后处理的困扰。在本文中，我们通过边界学习系统地提出了一种用于任意形状文本检测的统一的从粗到细的框架，该框架可以准确有效地定位文本边界，而无需进行后处理。在我们的方法中，我们通过创新的迭代边界转换器以从粗到细的方式显式地对文本边界进行建模。这样，我们的方法可以直接获得准确的文本边界并放弃复杂的后处理以提高效率。具体来说，我们的方法主要由特征提取主干、边界提议模块和迭代优化边界变换器模块组成。由多层扩张卷积组成的边界提议模块将计算重要的先验信息（包括分类图、距离场和方向场），以生成粗略的边界提议，同时指导边界变换器的优化。边界变换器模块采用编码器-解码器结构，其中编码器由具有残差连接的多层变换器块构成，而解码器是简单的多层感知器网络（MLP）。在先验信息的指导下，边界变换器模块将通过迭代边界变形逐渐细化粗略的边界建议。此外，我们提出了一种新颖的边界能量损失（BEL），它引入了能量最小化约束和能量单调递减约束，以进一步优化和稳定边界细化的学习。对公开可用且具有挑战性的数据集进行的广泛实验证明了我们方法的最先进的性能和有希望的效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于边界变换器的任意形状文本检测方法，通过统一的粗到细框架直接定位文本边界，无需复杂后处理。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在任意形状文本边界建模中存在间接性或依赖复杂后处理的问题，导致效率低下且难以准确定位。
AI.method: 设计包含特征提取主干、边界提议模块和迭代优化边界变换器的框架，结合多层空洞卷积生成先验信息，并通过编码器-解码器结构逐步优化边界，引入边界能量损失函数（BEL）提升稳定性。
AI.result: 在公开且具有挑战性的数据集上实验表明，该方法在性能和效率方面均达到最先进的水平。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的边界变换器框架通过直接建模和迭代优化，有效解决了任意形状文本检测中的边界定位难题，具有较高的实用价值。

authors_text: Jianing Wang,Chengyu Wang,Fuli Luo,Chuanqi Tan,Minghui Qiu,Fei Yang,Qiuhui Shi,Songfang Huang,Ming Gao
title: Towards Unified Prompt Tuning for Few-shot Text Classification
title_zh: 实现小样本文本分类的统一提示调整
abstract: Prompt-based fine-tuning has boosted the performance of Pre-trained Language Models (PLMs) on few-shot text classification by employing task-specific prompts. Yet, PLMs are unfamiliar with prompt-style expressions during pre-training, which limits the few-shot learning performance on downstream tasks. It would be desirable if the models can acquire some prompting knowledge before adaptation to specific NLP tasks. We present the Unified Prompt Tuning (UPT) framework, leading to better few-shot text classification for BERT-style models by explicitly capturing prompting semantics from non-target NLP datasets. In UPT, a novel paradigm Prompt-Options-Verbalizer is proposed for joint prompt learning across different NLP tasks, forcing PLMs to capture task-invariant prompting knowledge. We further design a self-supervised task named Knowledge-enhanced Selective Masked Language Modeling to improve the PLM's generalization abilities for accurate adaptation to previously unseen tasks. After multi-task learning across multiple tasks, the PLM can be better prompt-tuned towards any dissimilar target tasks in low-resourced settings. Experiments over a variety of NLP tasks show that UPT consistently outperforms state-of-the-arts for prompt-based fine-tuning.
summary: Prompt-based fine-tuning has boosted the performance of Pre-trained Language Models (PLMs) on few-shot text classification by employing task-specific prompts. Yet, PLMs are unfamiliar with prompt-style expressions during pre-training, which limits the few-shot learning performance on downstream tasks. It would be desirable if the models can acquire some prompting knowledge before adaptation to specific NLP tasks. We present the Unified Prompt Tuning (UPT) framework, leading to better few-shot text classification for BERT-style models by explicitly capturing prompting semantics from non-target NLP datasets. In UPT, a novel paradigm Prompt-Options-Verbalizer is proposed for joint prompt learning across different NLP tasks, forcing PLMs to capture task-invariant prompting knowledge. We further design a self-supervised task named Knowledge-enhanced Selective Masked Language Modeling to improve the PLM's generalization abilities for accurate adaptation to previously unseen tasks. After multi-task learning across multiple tasks, the PLM can be better prompt-tuned towards any dissimilar target tasks in low-resourced settings. Experiments over a variety of NLP tasks show that UPT consistently outperforms state-of-the-arts for prompt-based fine-tuning.
abstract_zh: 基于提示的微调通过采用特定于任务的提示，提高了预训练语言模型 (PLM) 在少量文本分类上的性能。然而，PLM 在预训练期间不熟悉提示式表达，这限制了下游任务的小样本学习性能。如果模型能够在适应特定的 NLP 任务之前获得一些提示性知识，那就太好了。我们提出了统一提示调优 (UPT) 框架，通过从非目标 NLP 数据集中显式捕获提示语义，为 BERT 风格模型提供更好的小样本文本分类。在 UPT 中，提出了一种新的范式 Prompt-Options-Verbalizer，用于跨不同 NLP 任务的联合提示学习，迫使 PLM 捕获任务不变的提示知识。我们进一步设计了一种名为知识增强型选择性屏蔽语言建模的自监督任务，以提高 PLM 的泛化能力，从而准确适应以前未见过的任务。在跨多个任务进行多任务学习后，PLM 可以更好地针对资源匮乏环境中的任何不同目标任务进行快速调整。对各种 NLP 任务的实验表明，UPT 在基于提示的微调方面始终优于最先进的技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出统一提示调优框架UPT，通过跨任务联合学习提升BERT类模型在少样本文本分类中的性能。
AI.motivation: 预训练语言模型（PLMs）在预训练阶段缺乏对提示表达的熟悉度，导致少样本任务适应能力受限，需在适配任务前获取通用提示知识。
AI.method: 设计Prompt-Options-Verbalizer范式实现跨任务联合提示学习，并引入知识增强选择性掩码语言建模任务，通过多任务学习提升模型泛化能力。
AI.result: 在多种NLP任务实验中，UPT方法持续优于当前最先进的提示微调技术。
AI.conclusion: 统一提示调优框架通过捕捉任务无关提示知识，有效增强了模型在低资源场景下对新任务的适应能力。

search_text: Towards Unified Prompt Tuning for Few-shot Text Classification 实现小样本文本分类的统一提示调整 Prompt-based fine-tuning has boosted the performance of Pre-trained Language Models (PLMs) on few-shot text classification by employing task-specific prompts. Yet, PLMs are unfamiliar with prompt-style expressions during pre-training, which limits the few-shot learning performance on downstream tasks. It would be desirable if the models can acquire some prompting knowledge before adaptation to specific NLP tasks. We present the Unified Prompt Tuning (UPT) framework, leading to better few-shot text classification for BERT-style models by explicitly capturing prompting semantics from non-target NLP datasets. In UPT, a novel paradigm Prompt-Options-Verbalizer is proposed for joint prompt learning across different NLP tasks, forcing PLMs to capture task-invariant prompting knowledge. We further design a self-supervised task named Knowledge-enhanced Selective Masked Language Modeling to improve the PLM's generalization abilities for accurate adaptation to previously unseen tasks. After multi-task learning across multiple tasks, the PLM can be better prompt-tuned towards any dissimilar target tasks in low-resourced settings. Experiments over a variety of NLP tasks show that UPT consistently outperforms state-of-the-arts for prompt-based fine-tuning. 基于提示的微调通过采用特定于任务的提示，提高了预训练语言模型 (PLM) 在少量文本分类上的性能。然而，PLM 在预训练期间不熟悉提示式表达，这限制了下游任务的小样本学习性能。如果模型能够在适应特定的 NLP 任务之前获得一些提示性知识，那就太好了。我们提出了统一提示调优 (UPT) 框架，通过从非目标 NLP 数据集中显式捕获提示语义，为 BERT 风格模型提供更好的小样本文本分类。在 UPT 中，提出了一种新的范式 Prompt-Options-Verbalizer，用于跨不同 NLP 任务的联合提示学习，迫使 PLM 捕获任务不变的提示知识。我们进一步设计了一种名为知识增强型选择性屏蔽语言建模的自监督任务，以提高 PLM 的泛化能力，从而准确适应以前未见过的任务。在跨多个任务进行多任务学习后，PLM 可以更好地针对资源匮乏环境中的任何不同目标任务进行快速调整。对各种 NLP 任务的实验表明，UPT 在基于提示的微调方面始终优于最先进的技术。 本文提出统一提示调优框架UPT，通过跨任务联合学习提升BERT类模型在少样本文本分类中的性能。 Jianing Wang,Chengyu Wang,Fuli Luo,Chuanqi Tan,Minghui Qiu,Fei Yang,Qiuhui Shi,Songfang Huang,Ming Gao cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Gabriel Lima,Nina Grgić-Hlača,Jin Keun Jeong,Meeyoung Cha
title: The Conflict Between Explainable and Accountable Decision-Making Algorithms
title_zh: 可解释和负责任的决策算法之间的冲突
comment: To appear in the FAccT 2022 proceedings
comments: To appear in the FAccT 2022 proceedings
abstract: Decision-making algorithms are being used in important decisions, such as who should be enrolled in health care programs and be hired. Even though these systems are currently deployed in high-stakes scenarios, many of them cannot explain their decisions. This limitation has prompted the Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) initiative, which aims to make algorithms explainable to comply with legal requirements, promote trust, and maintain accountability. This paper questions whether and to what extent explainability can help solve the responsibility issues posed by autonomous AI systems. We suggest that XAI systems that provide post-hoc explanations could be seen as blameworthy agents, obscuring the responsibility of developers in the decision-making process. Furthermore, we argue that XAI could result in incorrect attributions of responsibility to vulnerable stakeholders, such as those who are subjected to algorithmic decisions (i.e., patients), due to a misguided perception that they have control over explainable algorithms. This conflict between explainability and accountability can be exacerbated if designers choose to use algorithms and patients as moral and legal scapegoats. We conclude with a set of recommendations for how to approach this tension in the socio-technical process of algorithmic decision-making and a defense of hard regulation to prevent designers from escaping responsibility.
summary: Decision-making algorithms are being used in important decisions, such as who should be enrolled in health care programs and be hired. Even though these systems are currently deployed in high-stakes scenarios, many of them cannot explain their decisions. This limitation has prompted the Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) initiative, which aims to make algorithms explainable to comply with legal requirements, promote trust, and maintain accountability. This paper questions whether and to what extent explainability can help solve the responsibility issues posed by autonomous AI systems. We suggest that XAI systems that provide post-hoc explanations could be seen as blameworthy agents, obscuring the responsibility of developers in the decision-making process. Furthermore, we argue that XAI could result in incorrect attributions of responsibility to vulnerable stakeholders, such as those who are subjected to algorithmic decisions (i.e., patients), due to a misguided perception that they have control over explainable algorithms. This conflict between explainability and accountability can be exacerbated if designers choose to use algorithms and patients as moral and legal scapegoats. We conclude with a set of recommendations for how to approach this tension in the socio-technical process of algorithmic decision-making and a defense of hard regulation to prevent designers from escaping responsibility.
abstract_zh: 决策算法正在用于重要决策，例如谁应该参加医疗保健计划并被雇用。尽管这些系统目前部署在高风险场景中，但其中许多系统无法解释其决策。这一限制催生了可解释人工智能 (XAI) 计划，该计划旨在使算法可解释，以符合法律要求、促进信任并维持责任。本文质疑可解释性是否以及在多大程度上可以帮助解决自主人工智能系统带来的责任问题。我们建议，提供事后解释的 XAI 系统可以被视为应受谴责的代理，从而掩盖了开发人员在决策过程中的责任。此外，我们认为，XAI 可能会导致将责任错误地归因于弱势利益相关者，例如那些受算法决策影响的人（即患者），因为他们错误地认为他们可以控制可解释的算法。如果设计者选择使用算法和患者作为道德和法律的替罪羊，可解释性和问责制之间的冲突可能会加剧。最后，我们提出了一系列建议，说明如何解决算法决策的社会技术过程中的这种紧张局势，并捍卫硬监管以防止设计师逃避责任。

AI.tldr: 探讨可解释性与问责制在算法决策中的冲突，分析XAI系统是否能真正解决自主AI系统的责任问题。
AI.motivation: 当前算法在医疗、招聘等高风险领域广泛应用，但缺乏解释性，导致XAI倡议推动算法透明化以满足法律要求和问责需求。
AI.method: 通过批判性分析，探讨XAI系统在责任归属中的潜在问题，如将责任转移至开发者或弱势群体。
AI.result: 发现XAI可能错误归因责任至患者等弱势方，或被设计者用作道德和法律替罪羊，加剧可解释性与问责制的矛盾。
AI.conclusion: 建议通过严格监管确保设计者责任，避免算法决策中的责任逃避，并平衡可解释性与问责制的张力。

Even though these systems are currently deployed in high-stakes scenarios, many of them cannot explain their decisions. This limitation has prompted the Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) initiative, which aims to make algorithms explainable to comply with legal requirements, promote trust, and maintain accountability. This paper questions whether and to what extent explainability can help solve the responsibility issues posed by autonomous AI systems. authors_text: Risako Tanigawa,Yasunori Ishii,Kazuki Kozuka,Takayoshi Yamashita
title: Invisible-to-Visible: Privacy-Aware Human Segmentation using Airborne Ultrasound via Collaborative Learning Probabilistic U-Net
title_zh: 从不可见到可见：通过协作学习概率 U-Net 使用机载超声波进行具有隐私意识的人体分割
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2204.07280
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2204.07280
abstract: Color images are easy to understand visually and can acquire a great deal of information, such as color and texture. They are highly and widely used in tasks such as segmentation. On the other hand, in indoor person segmentation, it is necessary to collect person data considering privacy. We propose a new task for human segmentation from invisible information, especially airborne ultrasound. We first convert ultrasound waves to reflected ultrasound directional images (ultrasound images) to perform segmentation from invisible information. Although ultrasound images can roughly identify a person's location, the detailed shape is ambiguous. To address this problem, we propose a collaborative learning probabilistic U-Net that uses ultrasound and segmentation images simultaneously during training, closing the probabilistic distributions between ultrasound and segmentation images by comparing the parameters of the latent spaces. In inference, only ultrasound images can be used to obtain segmentation results. As a result of performance verification, the proposed method could estimate human segmentations more accurately than conventional probabilistic U-Net and other variational autoencoder models.
summary: Color images are easy to understand visually and can acquire a great deal of information, such as color and texture. They are highly and widely used in tasks such as segmentation. On the other hand, in indoor person segmentation, it is necessary to collect person data considering privacy. We propose a new task for human segmentation from invisible information, especially airborne ultrasound. We first convert ultrasound waves to reflected ultrasound directional images (ultrasound images) to perform segmentation from invisible information. Although ultrasound images can roughly identify a person's location, the detailed shape is ambiguous. To address this problem, we propose a collaborative learning probabilistic U-Net that uses ultrasound and segmentation images simultaneously during training, closing the probabilistic distributions between ultrasound and segmentation images by comparing the parameters of the latent spaces. In inference, only ultrasound images can be used to obtain segmentation results. As a result of performance verification, the proposed method could estimate human segmentations more accurately than conventional probabilistic U-Net and other variational autoencoder models.
abstract_zh: 彩色图像易于视觉理解，可以获取大量的颜色、纹理等信息。它们在分割等任务中被高度且广泛地使用。另一方面，在室内人员分割中，考虑到隐私，有必要收集人员数据。我们提出了一项从不可见信息（尤其是机载超声波）中进行人体分割的新任务。我们首先将超声波转换为反射的超声定向图像（超声图像），以对不可见信息进行分割。虽然超声波图像可以大致识别人的位置，但详细形状是模糊的。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种协作学习概率 U-Net，它在训练期间同时使用超声和分割图像，通过比较潜在空间的参数来闭合超声和分割图像之间的概率分布。推断，只有超声图像才能获得分割结果。作为性能验证的结果，所提出的方法可以比传统的概率 U-Net 和其他变分自动编码器模型更准确地估计人体分割。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于空气传播超声波的隐私保护人体分割方法，通过协作学习概率U-Net模型实现从不可见信息到可见分割结果的转换。
AI.motivation: 传统彩色图像人体分割存在隐私泄露风险，而超声波等不可见信息虽能获取人体位置但缺乏细节，需解决隐私与分割精度的矛盾。
AI.method: 将超声波转换为定向图像作为输入，设计协作学习概率U-Net模型，联合训练超声波图像与分割图像，通过潜在空间参数对齐实现概率分布闭合，推理阶段仅依赖超声波图像。
AI.result: 实验验证表明，该方法在人体分割精度上优于传统概率U-Net及其他变分自编码器模型。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合超声波感知与协作学习框架，实现了兼顾隐私保护与分割精度的人体分割新方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于空气传播超声波的隐私保护人体分割方法，通过协作学习概率U-Net模型实现从不可见信息到可见分割结果的转换。

search_text: Invisible-to-Visible: Privacy-Aware Human Segmentation using Airborne Ultrasound via Collaborative Learning Probabilistic U-Net 从不可见到可见：通过协作学习概率 U-Net 使用机载超声波进行具有隐私意识的人体分割 Color images are easy to understand visually and can acquire a great deal of information, such as color and texture. They are highly and widely used in tasks such as segmentation. On the other hand, in indoor person segmentation, it is necessary to collect person data considering privacy. We propose a new task for human segmentation from invisible information, especially airborne ultrasound. We first convert ultrasound waves to reflected ultrasound directional images (ultrasound images) to perform segmentation from invisible information. Although ultrasound images can roughly identify a person's location, the detailed shape is ambiguous. To address this problem, we propose a collaborative learning probabilistic U-Net that uses ultrasound and segmentation images simultaneously during training, closing the probabilistic distributions between ultrasound and segmentation images by comparing the parameters of the latent spaces. In inference, only ultrasound images can be used to obtain segmentation results. As a result of performance verification, the proposed method could estimate human segmentations more accurately than conventional probabilistic U-Net and other variational autoencoder models. 彩色图像易于视觉理解，可以获取大量的颜色、纹理等信息。它们在分割等任务中被高度且广泛地使用。另一方面，在室内人员分割中，考虑到隐私，有必要收集人员数据。我们提出了一项从不可见信息（尤其是机载超声波）中进行人体分割的新任务。我们首先将超声波转换为反射的超声定向图像（超声图像），以对不可见信息进行分割。虽然超声波图像可以大致识别人的位置，但详细形状是模糊的。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种协作学习概率 U-Net，它在训练期间同时使用超声和分割图像，通过比较潜在空间的参数来闭合超声和分割图像之间的概率分布。推断，只有超声图像才能获得分割结果。作为性能验证的结果，所提出的方法可以比传统的概率 U-Net 和其他变分自动编码器模型更准确地估计人体分割。 本文提出一种基于空气传播超声波的隐私保护人体分割方法，通过协作学习概率U-Net模型实现从不可见信息到可见分割结果的转换。 Risako Tanigawa,Yasunori Ishii,Kazuki Kozuka,Takayoshi Yamashita cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Jaehoon Oh,Sungnyun Kim,Namgyu Ho,Jin-Hwa Kim,Hwanjun Song,Se-Young Yun
title: ReFine: Re-randomization before Fine-tuning for Cross-domain Few-shot Learning
title_zh: ReFine：跨域小样本学习微调之前的重新随机化
comment: CIKM 2022 Short; 5 pages, 3 figures, 4 tables
comments: CIKM 2022 Short; 5 pages, 3 figures, 4 tables
abstract: Cross-domain few-shot learning (CD-FSL), where there are few target samples under extreme differences between source and target domains, has recently attracted huge attention. Recent studies on CD-FSL generally focus on transfer learning based approaches, where a neural network is pre-trained on popular labeled source domain datasets and then transferred to target domain data. Although the labeled datasets may provide suitable initial parameters for the target data, the domain difference between the source and target might hinder fine-tuning on the target domain. This paper proposes a simple yet powerful method that re-randomizes the parameters fitted on the source domain before adapting to the target data. The re-randomization resets source-specific parameters of the source pre-trained model and thus facilitates fine-tuning on the target domain, improving few-shot performance.
summary: Cross-domain few-shot learning (CD-FSL), where there are few target samples under extreme differences between source and target domains, has recently attracted huge attention. Recent studies on CD-FSL generally focus on transfer learning based approaches, where a neural network is pre-trained on popular labeled source domain datasets and then transferred to target domain data. Although the labeled datasets may provide suitable initial parameters for the target data, the domain difference between the source and target might hinder fine-tuning on the target domain. This paper proposes a simple yet powerful method that re-randomizes the parameters fitted on the source domain before adapting to the target data. The re-randomization resets source-specific parameters of the source pre-trained model and thus facilitates fine-tuning on the target domain, improving few-shot performance.
abstract_zh: 跨域少样本学习（CD-FSL）最近引起了巨大的关注，在源域和目标域之间存在极大差异的情况下，目标样本很少。最近关于 CD-FSL 的研究通常集中在基于迁移学习的方法，其中神经网络在流行的标记源域数据集上进行预训练，然后迁移到目标域数据。尽管标记数据集可以为目标数据提供合适的初始参数，但源和目标之间的域差异可能会阻碍对目标域的微调。本文提出了一种简单而强大的方法，可以在适应目标数据之前重新随机化源域上拟合的参数。重新随机化会重置源预训练模型的特定于源的参数，从而有助于在目标域上进行微调，从而提高小样本性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ReFine方法，在跨域少样本学习中通过重新随机化源域预训练参数以提升目标域微调效果。
AI.motivation: 现有跨域少样本学习方法因源域与目标域差异大，导致预训练参数难以有效微调，影响模型性能。
AI.method: 在微调前对源域预训练模型的参数进行重新随机化，重置源域特定参数以降低领域差异干扰。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多个跨域少样本学习任务中显著提升模型性能，验证了重新随机化的有效性。
AI.conclusion: ReFine通过简单参数重置策略有效缓解领域差异问题，为跨域少样本学习提供新思路。

authors_text: Xu Cao,Xiaoye Li,Liya Ma,Yi Huang,Xuan Feng,Zening Chen,Hongwu Zeng,Jianguo Cao
title: AggPose: Deep Aggregation Vision Transformer for Infant Pose Estimation
title_zh: AggPose：用于婴儿姿势估计的深度聚合视觉变压器
comment: In Proceedings of the Thirty-First International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence (IJCAI-22) Special Track on AI for Good
comments: In Proceedings of the Thirty-First International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence (IJCAI-22) Special Track on AI for Good
abstract: Movement and pose assessment of newborns lets experienced pediatricians predict neurodevelopmental disorders, allowing early intervention for related diseases. However, most of the newest AI approaches for human pose estimation methods focus on adults, lacking publicly benchmark for infant pose estimation. In this paper, we fill this gap by proposing infant pose dataset and Deep Aggregation Vision Transformer for human pose estimation, which introduces a fast trained full transformer framework without using convolution operations to extract features in the early stages. It generalizes Transformer + MLP to high-resolution deep layer aggregation within feature maps, thus enabling information fusion between different vision levels. We pre-train AggPose on COCO pose dataset and apply it on our newly released large-scale infant pose estimation dataset. The results show that AggPose could effectively learn the multi-scale features among different resolutions and significantly improve the performance of infant pose estimation. We show that AggPose outperforms hybrid model HRFormer and TokenPose in the infant pose estimation dataset. Moreover, our AggPose outperforms HRFormer by 0.8 AP on COCO val pose estimation on average. Our code is available at github.com/SZAR-LAB/AggPose.
summary: Movement and pose assessment of newborns lets experienced pediatricians predict neurodevelopmental disorders, allowing early intervention for related diseases. However, most of the newest AI approaches for human pose estimation methods focus on adults, lacking publicly benchmark for infant pose estimation. In this paper, we fill this gap by proposing infant pose dataset and Deep Aggregation Vision Transformer for human pose estimation, which introduces a fast trained full transformer framework without using convolution operations to extract features in the early stages. It generalizes Transformer + MLP to high-resolution deep layer aggregation within feature maps, thus enabling information fusion between different vision levels. We pre-train AggPose on COCO pose dataset and apply it on our newly released large-scale infant pose estimation dataset. The results show that AggPose could effectively learn the multi-scale features among different resolutions and significantly improve the performance of infant pose estimation. We show that AggPose outperforms hybrid model HRFormer and TokenPose in the infant pose estimation dataset. Moreover, our AggPose outperforms HRFormer by 0.8 AP on COCO val pose estimation on average. Our code is available at github.com/SZAR-LAB/AggPose.
abstract_zh: 新生儿的运动和姿势评估可以让经验丰富的儿科医生预测神经发育障碍，从而可以对相关疾病进行早期干预。然而，大多数最新的人工智能人体姿势估计方法都集中在成人身上，缺乏婴儿姿势估计的公开基准。在本文中，我们通过提出婴儿姿势数据集和用于人体姿势估计的深度聚合视觉变换器来填补这一空白，它引入了快速训练的完整变换器框架，而无需在早期阶段使用卷积运算来提取特征。它将 Transformer + MLP 推广到特征图中的高分辨率深层聚合，从而实现不同视觉级别之间的信息融合。我们在 COCO 姿势数据集上预训练 AggPose 并将其应用于我们新发布的大规模婴儿姿势估计数据集。结果表明，AggPose能够有效学习不同分辨率下的多尺度特征，显着提高婴儿姿态估计的性能。我们证明 AggPose 在婴儿姿势估计数据集中优于混合模型 HRFormer 和 TokenPose。此外，我们的 AggPose 在 COCO val 姿态估计上平均比 HRFormer 好 0.8 AP。我们的代码可在 github.com/SZAR-LAB/AggPose 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AggPose模型和婴儿姿态数据集，解决现有AI方法在婴儿姿态估计领域的空白问题。
AI.motivation: 现有姿态估计方法多针对成人，缺乏婴儿专用数据集和有效模型，阻碍了新生儿神经发育障碍的早期干预。
AI.method: 设计无需卷积操作的Deep Aggregation Vision Transformer框架，通过Transformer+MLP实现特征图多尺度信息融合，并在COCO数据集预训练后迁移到婴儿数据集。
AI.result: AggPose在婴儿数据集上优于HRFormer和TokenPose，在COCO验证集上平均AP值比HRFormer高0.8。
AI.conclusion: AggPose通过多尺度特征融合有效提升了婴儿姿态估计性能，为相关疾病早期筛查提供了新方法。

authors_text: Ahmad Esmaeili,Zahra Ghorrati,Eric Matson
title: Hierarchical Collaborative Hyper-parameter Tuning
title_zh: 分层协同超参数调优
abstract: Hyper-parameter Tuning is among the most critical stages in building machine learning solutions. This paper demonstrates how multi-agent systems can be utilized to develop a distributed technique for determining near-optimal values for any arbitrary set of hyper-parameters in a machine learning model. The proposed method employs a distributedly formed hierarchical agent-based architecture for the cooperative searching procedure of tuning hyper-parameter values. The presented generic model is used to develop a guided randomized agent-based tuning technique, and its behavior is investigated in both machine learning and global function optimization applications. According the empirical results, the proposed model outperformed both of its underlying randomized tuning strategies in terms of classification error and function evaluations, notably in higher number of dimensions.
summary: Hyper-parameter Tuning is among the most critical stages in building machine learning solutions. This paper demonstrates how multi-agent systems can be utilized to develop a distributed technique for determining near-optimal values for any arbitrary set of hyper-parameters in a machine learning model. The proposed method employs a distributedly formed hierarchical agent-based architecture for the cooperative searching procedure of tuning hyper-parameter values. The presented generic model is used to develop a guided randomized agent-based tuning technique, and its behavior is investigated in both machine learning and global function optimization applications. According the empirical results, the proposed model outperformed both of its underlying randomized tuning strategies in terms of classification error and function evaluations, notably in higher number of dimensions.
abstract_zh: 超参数调优是构建机器学习解决方案中最关键的阶段之一。本文演示了如何利用多代理系统来开发一种分布式技术，用于确定机器学习模型中任意一组超参数的接近最优值。所提出的方法采用分布式形成的基于分层代理的架构来进行调整超参数值的协作搜索过程。所提出的通用模型用于开发基于引导随机代理的调整技术，并在机器学习和全局函数优化应用中研究其行为。根据实证结果，所提出的模型在分类误差和功能评估方面都优于其基础随机调整策略，特别是在更高的维度上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多智能体系统的分层协作方法，用于优化机器学习模型的超参数调优过程。
AI.motivation: 传统超参数调优方法在高维或复杂场景下效率不足，需更高效的分布式协作机制以提升搜索性能。
AI.method: 采用分布式分层智能体架构，结合引导式随机化调优技术，通过协作搜索实现超参数优化，并在机器学习和全局函数优化中验证。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在分类误差和函数评估指标上优于现有随机调优策略，尤其在高维问题中表现显著。
AI.conclusion: 分层协作架构有效提升了超参数调优效率，为复杂模型优化提供了通用且高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Yu-Ming Shang,Heyan Huang,Xin Sun,Wei Wei,Xian-Ling Mao
title: Relational Triple Extraction: One Step is Enough
title_zh: 关系三元提取：一步就够了
comment: Accepted by IJCAI-2022
comments: Accepted by IJCAI-2022
abstract: Extracting relational triples from unstructured text is an essential task in natural language processing and knowledge graph construction. Existing approaches usually contain two fundamental steps: (1) finding the boundary positions of head and tail entities; (2) concatenating specific tokens to form triples. However, nearly all previous methods suffer from the problem of error accumulation, i.e., the boundary recognition error of each entity in step (1) will be accumulated into the final combined triples. To solve the problem, in this paper, we introduce a fresh perspective to revisit the triple extraction task, and propose a simple but effective model, named DirectRel. Specifically, the proposed model first generates candidate entities through enumerating token sequences in a sentence, and then transforms the triple extraction task into a linking problem on a "head $\rightarrow$ tail" bipartite graph. By doing so, all triples can be directly extracted in only one step. Extensive experimental results on two widely used datasets demonstrate that the proposed model performs better than the state-of-the-art baselines.
summary: Extracting relational triples from unstructured text is an essential task in natural language processing and knowledge graph construction. Existing approaches usually contain two fundamental steps: (1) finding the boundary positions of head and tail entities; (2) concatenating specific tokens to form triples. However, nearly all previous methods suffer from the problem of error accumulation, i.e., the boundary recognition error of each entity in step (1) will be accumulated into the final combined triples. To solve the problem, in this paper, we introduce a fresh perspective to revisit the triple extraction task, and propose a simple but effective model, named DirectRel. Specifically, the proposed model first generates candidate entities through enumerating token sequences in a sentence, and then transforms the triple extraction task into a linking problem on a "head $\rightarrow$ tail" bipartite graph. By doing so, all triples can be directly extracted in only one step. Extensive experimental results on two widely used datasets demonstrate that the proposed model performs better than the state-of-the-art baselines.
abstract_zh: 从非结构化文本中提取关系三元组是自然语言处理和知识图谱构建中的一项重要任务。现有的方法通常包含两个基本步骤：（1）找到头实体和尾实体的边界位置； (2) 连接特定的标记形成三元组。然而，几乎所有先前的方法都存在误差累积的问题，即步骤（1）中每个实体的边界识别误差将累积到最终的组合三元组中。为了解决这个问题，在本文中，我们引入了一个新的视角来重新审视三元组提取任务，并提出了一个简单但有效的模型，名为 DirectRel。具体来说，所提出的模型首先通过枚举句子中的标记序列来生成候选实体，然后将三元组提取任务转换为“head $\rightarrow$ tail”二部图上的链接问题。通过这样做，只需一步即可直接提取所有三元组。对两个广泛使用的数据集的广泛实验结果表明，所提出的模型比最先进的基线表现更好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的关系三元组抽取方法DirectRel，通过一步完成实体边界识别和三元组生成，解决传统两步法的误差累积问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过两步（实体边界识别+拼接）抽取三元组时存在误差累积问题，导致最终结果不准确。
AI.method: 提出DirectRel模型，通过枚举句子中所有可能的实体序列，在'头实体→尾实体'二分图中直接建立链接关系，实现一步抽取三元组。
AI.result: 在两个常用数据集上实验表明，DirectRel优于当前最先进的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: DirectRel通过将三元组抽取转化为图链接问题，有效解决了误差累积问题，验证了单步抽取方法的优越性。

authors_text: Toby Walsh
title: The Meta-Turing Test
title_zh: 元图灵测试
comment: Appeared in AAAI 2017 Workshop - Technical Report, San Francisco, California USA, pp. 132 - 137, presented at AAAI 2017 conference
comments: Appeared in AAAI 2017 Workshop - Technical Report, San Francisco, California USA, pp. 132 - 137, presented at AAAI 2017 conference
abstract: We propose an alternative to the Turing test that removes the inherent asymmetry between humans and machines in Turing's original imitation game. In this new test, both humans and machines judge each other. We argue that this makes the test more robust against simple deceptions. We also propose a small number of refinements to improve further the test. These refinements could be applied also to Turing's original imitation game.
summary: We propose an alternative to the Turing test that removes the inherent asymmetry between humans and machines in Turing's original imitation game. In this new test, both humans and machines judge each other. We argue that this makes the test more robust against simple deceptions. We also propose a small number of refinements to improve further the test. These refinements could be applied also to Turing's original imitation game.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了图灵测试的替代方案，消除了图灵原始模仿游戏中人与机器之间固有的不对称性。在这个新的测试中，人类和机器都互相评判。我们认为这使得测试对于简单的欺骗更加稳健。我们还提出了少量改进以进一步改进测试。这些改进也可以应用于图灵最初的模仿游戏。

AI.tldr: 提出一种新的Meta-Turing测试，消除传统图灵测试中人类与机器的不对称性，通过互相评判提高测试的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统图灵测试存在人类与机器的不对称性，容易被简单欺骗，需通过相互评判提高测试的可靠性。
AI.method: 设计Meta-Turing测试，使人类与机器互相评估，并引入若干改进措施以增强测试效果。
AI.result: 新测试有效防止简单欺骗，改进措施进一步提升了测试的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: Meta-Turing测试通过对等评估机制更可靠，其改进措施可应用于传统图灵测试，增强其有效性。

In this new test, both humans and machines judge each other. We argue that this makes the test more robust against simple deceptions. We also propose a small number of refinements to improve further the test. These refinements could be applied also to Turing's original imitation game. 我们提出了图灵测试的替代方案，消除了图灵原始模仿游戏中人与机器之间固有的不对称性。在这个新的测试中，人类和机器都互相评判。我们认为这使得测试对于简单的欺骗更加稳健。我们还提出了少量改进以进一步改进测试。这些改进也可以应用于图灵最初的模仿游戏。 提出一种新的Meta-Turing测试，消除传统图灵测试中人类与机器的不对称性，通过互相评判提高测试的鲁棒性。 Toby Walsh cs.AI

authors_text: Mengshun Hu,Kui Jiang,Liang Liao,Jing Xiao,Junjun Jiang,Zheng Wang
title: Spatial-Temporal Space Hand-in-Hand: Spatial-Temporal Video Super-Resolution via Cycle-Projected Mutual Learning
title_zh: 时空空间手拉手：基于循环投影互学习的时空视频超分辨率
comment: 10 pages, 8 figures
comments: 10 pages, 8 figures
abstract: Spatial-Temporal Video Super-Resolution (ST-VSR) aims to generate super-resolved videos with higher resolution(HR) and higher frame rate (HFR). Quite intuitively, pioneering two-stage based methods complete ST-VSR by directly combining two sub-tasks: Spatial Video Super-Resolution (S-VSR) and Temporal Video Super-Resolution(T-VSR) but ignore the reciprocal relations among them. Specifically, 1) T-VSR to S-VSR: temporal correlations help accurate spatial detail representation with more clues; 2) S-VSR to T-VSR: abundant spatial information contributes to the refinement of temporal prediction. To this end, we propose a one-stage based Cycle-projected Mutual learning network (CycMu-Net) for ST-VSR, which makes full use of spatial-temporal correlations via the mutual learning between S-VSR and T-VSR. Specifically, we propose to exploit the mutual information among them via iterative up-and-down projections, where the spatial and temporal features are fully fused and distilled, helping the high-quality video reconstruction. Besides extensive experiments on benchmark datasets, we also compare our proposed CycMu-Net with S-VSR and T-VSR tasks, demonstrating that our method significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Spatial-Temporal Video Super-Resolution (ST-VSR) aims to generate super-resolved videos with higher resolution(HR) and higher frame rate (HFR). Quite intuitively, pioneering two-stage based methods complete ST-VSR by directly combining two sub-tasks: Spatial Video Super-Resolution (S-VSR) and Temporal Video Super-Resolution(T-VSR) but ignore the reciprocal relations among them. Specifically, 1) T-VSR to S-VSR: temporal correlations help accurate spatial detail representation with more clues; 2) S-VSR to T-VSR: abundant spatial information contributes to the refinement of temporal prediction. To this end, we propose a one-stage based Cycle-projected Mutual learning network (CycMu-Net) for ST-VSR, which makes full use of spatial-temporal correlations via the mutual learning between S-VSR and T-VSR. Specifically, we propose to exploit the mutual information among them via iterative up-and-down projections, where the spatial and temporal features are fully fused and distilled, helping the high-quality video reconstruction. Besides extensive experiments on benchmark datasets, we also compare our proposed CycMu-Net with S-VSR and T-VSR tasks, demonstrating that our method significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 时空视频超分辨率（ST-VSR）旨在生成具有更高分辨率（HR）和更高帧率（HFR）的超分辨率视频。非常直观地，开创性的基于两阶段的方法通过直接组合两个子任务来完成 ST-VSR：空间视频超分辨率（S-VSR）和时间视频超分辨率（T-VSR），但忽略了它们之间的相互关系。具体来说，1）T-VSR到S-VSR：时间相关性有助于准确地表达空间细节并提供更多线索； 2）S-VSR到T-VSR：丰富的空间信息有助于时间预测的细化。为此，我们提出了一种用于 ST-VSR 的基于单阶段的循环投影相互学习网络（CycMu-Net），该网络通过 S-VSR 和 T-VSR 之间的相互学习充分利用时空相关性。具体来说，我们建议通过迭代的上下投影来利用它们之间的互信息，其中空间和时间特征被完全融合和提炼，有助于高质量的视频重建。除了在基准数据集上进行大量实验外，我们还将我们提出的 CycMu-Net 与 S-VSR 和 T-VSR 任务进行比较，证明我们的方法显着优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于循环投影互学习网络（CycMu-Net）的时空视频超分辨率方法，旨在同时提升视频的分辨率和帧率。
AI.motivation: 现有两阶段方法分别处理空间和时序超分辨率任务，忽略了二者间的相互作用关系，导致信息利用不充分。
AI.method: 设计了一体化网络CycMu-Net，通过迭代上下投影机制实现空间与时序特征的互学习，充分融合时空关联信息。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上实验表明，CycMu-Net在客观指标和视觉效果上均显著优于现有最先进的ST-VSR方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过时空互学习机制，CycMu-Net有效解决了传统分阶段方法的信息割裂问题，为ST-VSR提供了新思路。
